title: SEMrush Specialist (Remote)
description:
About Us:

gigCMO is a growth consultancy that provides strategic marketing leadership to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs. As part of our ongoing efforts to enhance our clients' digital presence and performance, we heavily rely on SEMrush for data-driven insights and strategy development. We are seeking a SEMrush Specialist to manage our SEMrush platform, analyse its data, and provide actionable recommendations to optimise our clients' digital strategies.





Job Summary:

We are looking for an experienced SEMrush Specialist to oversee the management and analysis of SEMrush data, offering insights and recommendations to various internal teams. This role is critical for developing and refining SEO and digital marketing strategies, based on in-depth analysis of SEMrush data. The ideal candidate will be highly proficient in using SEMrush and have a strong understanding of SEO, PPC, and competitive analysis.





Key Responsibilities:



Manage and monitor the SEMrush platform to track SEO performance, keyword rankings, and overall site health for our clients.

Analyse SEMrush data, providing detailed reports on SEO, PPC campaigns, competitor analysis, backlink profiles, and content performance.

Develop and recommend strategies for improving organic search rankings, increasing website traffic, and optimising digital marketing efforts based on SEMrush insights.

Collaborate with content, SEO, and marketing teams to align strategies with SEMrush data, ensuring all digital efforts are data-driven.

Conduct keyword research using SEMrush to identify high-potential keywords and provide recommendations for content optimisation.

Identify and track competitors' activities, providing insights on their strengths and weaknesses using SEMrush competitive analysis tools.

Stay up to date with SEMrush updates, new features, and industry trends to ensure we are maximising the platform's potential.

Generate regular reports on SEMrush performance metrics for different teams, including SEO health, keyword movements, and traffic changes.

Offer training and support to internal teams on SEMrush best practices and usage to ensure everyone is leveraging the platform effectively.

Work with teams to ensure technical SEO issues flagged by SEMrush are addressed and resolved.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Proven experience in using SEMrush as a core tool for digital marketing analysis and strategy development.

Strong understanding of SEO, PPC, keyword research, and competitive analysis.

Ability to interpret SEMrush data and translate it into actionable insights and strategies.

Experience in creating reports and dashboards that effectively communicate SEMrush findings to various teams.

Familiarity with SEO best practices, on-page optimisation, and technical SEO.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to prioritise recommendations based on impact.

Strong communication skills to present data and insights to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Familiarity with digital tools like HubSpot, Basecamp, and SharePoint or similar for managing workflows and collaboration.



Preferred Skills:



Experience in SEO strategy development, using SEMrush data as a foundation.

Knowledge of content marketing and its relationship to SEO performance.

Familiarity with Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and other digital marketing tools.

Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a remote work environment.



Personal Attributes:



Detail-oriented with strong analytical skills.

Proactive in identifying trends and making strategic recommendations.

Self-motivated and able to work independently while collaborating with teams across departments.

Eager to stay up to date with the latest SEO trends, SEMrush updates, and digital marketing innovations.



Application Process:

This role requires full-time commitment. To apply, please fill out the form using this link: 



Note: Only successful candidates will be contacted for interviews.



Compensation: Php 30,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)

title: HubSpot Specialist
description:

About us:

gigCMO Ltd. is a HubSpot Gold Partner. We are dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.

mbers on HubSpot workflows, best practices, and system capabilities to drive user adoption, enhance productivity, and optimise the platform's use.

mbers to develop automated reporting processes and scheduled reports to streamline data delivery and improve decision-making efficiency.

title: Legal Assistant
description:
Job Summary

This position is for a highly motivated and exceptionally organized Legal Assistant within a fast-paced legal environment. This hybrid role is essential to the success of our practice, providing a full range of support to attorneys in both pre-litigation and litigation phases.



The ideal candidate is a proactive problem-solver with strong technical skills and a client-focused attitude. You will be responsible for a blend of paralegal and legal assistant duties, managing case files from inception through resolution.



Core Responsibilities

Administrative & Client Support

• Answer and screen incoming phone calls, acting as a professional first point of contact for clients, opposing counsel, and courts.

• Handle, process, and distribute all incoming/outgoing faxes and mail.

• Serve as a key point of contact for clients, providing non-legal status updates and gathering necessary information.

• Perform conflict checks for all potential new matters.

• Open new client matters and maintain physical and electronic files in accordance with firm standards.



Case Management & Development

• Maintain and meticulously update the firm's case management software with deadlines, contact information, case status, and notes.

• Manage and maintain attorney calendars, including scheduling appointments, calls, and critical case deadlines.

• Draft and send letters of representation to clients, opposing counsel, insurance carriers, and healthcare providers.

• Obtain, track, and follow up on all case-related records, including medical bills/reports, employment records, police reports, and insurance information.

• Draft detailed medical summaries and chronologies.

• Acknowledge and track liens from providers, insurers, and government agencies (e.g., Medicare/Medicaid).

• Assist attorneys with the preparation and assembly of settlement demand packages.



Litigation & Discovery

• Assist with drafting initial pleadings, including Summons, Complaints, and Answers.

• Coordinate service of process for summonses, complaints, and subpoenas.

• Draft outgoing discovery, including Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests for Production of Documents, and Requests for Admission.

• Prepare "skeletons" for discovery responses, coordinate the collection of responsive documents and information from the client, and prepare final responses.

• Organize and Bates stamp document productions (both incoming and outgoing).

• Review and analyze discovery responses from other parties, identifying deficiencies and assisting with "meet and confer" correspondence.

• Prepare and issue deposition and records subpoenas.

• Schedule depositions, mediations, and hearings, including coordinating with all parties, court reporters, and videographers.

• Prepare and serve Notices of Deposition (NODs) and other hearing notices.

• Set up and manage remote appearances (e.g., via Zoom or court-specific portals).

Motion, Trial, & Case Resolution

• Assist with drafting notices of motion and declarations; prepare and organize motion exhibits.

• Assist with trial preparation, including the creation of exhibit binders, witness lists, and trial binders.

• Coordinate and communicate with expert witnesses to schedule, obtain reports, and prepare expert designations.

• Prepare, serve, and electronically file various legal documents in state and federal courts (e.g., OneLegal, File&Serve, CM/ECF).

• Negotiate lien reductions with medical providers and insurers.

• Prepare and file CMS-related documents and declarations.

• Draft settlement agreements, releases, and Requests for Dismissal.

• Prepare final distributions/disbursement schedules and corresponding check letters for clients and providers.

• Handle all file-closing procedures, including archiving documents and returning original materials to the client.



Qualifications & Skills

• Experience: 3+ years of experience as a legal assistant or paralegal in a civil litigation environment. Experience in personal injury legal assistant work in California is a plus. 

• Education: Paralegal Certificate or equivalent combination of education and experience is a plus.

Technical Skills:

o High proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Outlook, Excel).

o Experience with case management software (e.g., PracticePanther, Clio, MyCase, ProLaw, etc.).

o Proficiency with PDF software (e.g., Adobe Acrobat) for Bates stamping, redacting, and exhibits.

o Experience with state and federal e-filing portals is required.

Core Competencies:

o Exceptional organizational skills and meticulous attention to detail.

o Strong written and verbal communication skills.

o Ability to manage multiple priorities, meet deadlines, and work effectively under pressure.

o Proactive and resourceful, with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.

o Understands and maintains strict confidentiality.

title: Cinematic Video Editor (FCPX & CapCut) for Growth-Focused YouTube Creator
description:
About the Role

I am a growing content creator (Sony/DJI shooter) focused on cinematic "Life Log" and vlog-style content centered on growth mindset and personal narrative. I am looking for a long-term, dedicated video editor to join my team. This role is highly collaborative; I provide the vision and the footage, and you bring the story to life.



I need a self-taught problem solver. If I send you a reference video, I need you to study the pacing, transitions, and sound design, then replicate that energy using your own creative intuition.



Expectations & Growth



Starting Rate: $4.00 / hour.



Hours: 40 hours per week (Regular shift schedule).



KPIs: Your primary metric is Accuracy and Efficiency. Raises are directly tied to minimizing revision cycles. The closer you get to a "one-and-done" first draft, the faster your pay increases.



Milestone Bonuses: A permanent raise will be triggered once the channel hits monetization, with additional bonuses for hitting content quality benchmarks.



Core Requirements



Fluent English: High-level comprehension for dialogue editing and seamless communication.



Software: Expert-level skills in Final Cut Pro (FCPX) and CapCut. Willingness to manage tasks in Notion.



Hardware: Must handle large files (50GB+ per project). 1TB+ available storage and high-speed internet are non-negotiable.



Timezone: Available for 1:1 syncs between 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time (PT).



Vibe Check: You should have an eye for cinematic storytelling, not just "cutting clips."



How to Apply

Please reply with the following:



The Montage: A 1-minute edit of your best cinematic work.



The Lookbook: 5 original frames/shots you have edited that show your color grading or composition taste.



The Questionnaire:



What is your favorite movie from the past 10 years, and why?



Do you watch anime? (Yes/No).



How do you organize 50GB of raw, unorganized footage?



Screenshot of your internet speed & PC/Mac specs.



How long do you see yourself growing with this channel?

title: Executive Assistant to the CEO
description:
APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED





About Us:

gigCMO is a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



Executive Assistant to the CEO



We are seeking a highly experienced Executive Assistant (EA) to provide dedicated, senior-level support to our CEO/Founder. This role is suited for candidates with extensive experience in high-pressure, fast-paced environments, especially those accustomed to working at the executive level in a corporate or professional services setting. The EA will ensure smooth operations by managing the CEO’s schedule, external communications, and high-level administrative tasks.



The ideal candidate will have a strong background in executive support, impeccable organisational skills, excellent communication abilities, and experience in managing high-level relationships both internally and externally. Professionalism, discretion, and proactive problem-solving are essential qualities for this role.



Key Responsibilities:



Executive Administrative Support:

Manage the CEO’s complex schedule with precision, including high-stakes meetings, international travel, and detailed itineraries.

Act as the primary gatekeeper for the CEO, handling all forms of communication, including
s, phone calls, and meeting requests.

Organise and prepare meeting agendas, documents, and reports for both internal and external meetings.

Handle confidential and time-sensitive information with the utmost discretion.

Draft and proofread professional communications on behalf of the CEO, ensuring clarity, accuracy, and appropriate tone.

External Stakeholder Management:

Serve as the first point of contact for external parties, representing the CEO in interactions with high-level stakeholders, including clients, partners, and board members.

Maintain and nurture professional relationships on behalf of the CEO, ensuring timely follow-up and proactive communication.

Project Coordination & Task Management:

Collaborate with the CEO on strategic initiatives, ensuring timely execution of tasks and deliverables.

Assist in managing ongoing projects by coordinating with internal teams and tracking progress.

Oversee special assignments that require high attention to detail and organisational oversight.

Document & Data Management:

Ensure the organisation of key documents and maintain efficient filing systems (both digital and physical), leveraging Microsoft SharePoint for data integrity and accessibility.

Prepare polished presentations, reports, and briefing materials for the CEO’s meetings with key stakeholders.

High-Level Communication and Meeting Coordination:

Manage and prioritise the CEO’s communications with high-profile contacts.

Coordinate video and phone conferences using platforms such as Microsoft Teams, Zoom, Google Meets or other online applications.

Ensure that follow-up actions fro
etings are captured and appropriately addressed.

Financial Oversight:

Manage basic financial administrative tasks, such as expense tracking, budget reconciliation, and vendor payments.

(Optional) QuickBooks proficiency is an advantage for light bookkeeping tasks.



Qualifications and Skills:

At least 6 years of experience as an Executive Assistant supporting C-suite executives, preferably in a corporate or professional services environment.

Exceptional organisational and time-management skills, with the ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritise effectively.

Outstanding communication and interpersonal skills, with a professional and composed demeanour in dealing with high-level external contacts.

Mastery of Microsoft Office (especially advanced Word, Excel, PowerPoint), and familiarity with SharePoint for document management.

Proven ability to handle confidential information with absolute discretion.

Highly detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of working independently with minimal supervision.

Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to anticipate needs and act decisively.



Preferred Attributes:

Previous experience in a corporate secretary or similar role, providing support to high-level executives or board members.

Familiarity with UK and international business practices, including working across time zones and managing global relationships.

Flexible availability to accommodate business demands that may occasionally extend beyond standard working hours.



Compensation: Php 30,000 to Php 50,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)

title: Remote Medical Coder
description:
Position Summary:

We are seeking an experienced and credentialed Remote Medical Coder to join our growing team. The ideal candidate will be CPC (AAPC) or AHIMA certified, with a strong background in coding operative notes and E/M visits. Preference will be given to candidates with prior experience in orthopedic, pain management, or anesthesia coding. This role offers flexible hours and requires attention to detail, accuracy, and a deep understanding of medical documentation and coding guidelines.



Key Responsibilities:



Accurately assign CPT, ICD-10, and HCPCS codes for operative reports and office visits (E/M).



Review and interpret medical documentation to ensure appropriate code assignment and compliance with payer guidelines.



Ensure all coding is completed within established turnaround times and meets quality standards.



Stay current on coding updates, guidelines, and payer policies relevant to assigned specialties.



Communicate with providers or internal tea
mbers to clarify documentation when needed.



Support coding audits and respond to inquiries or corrections as required.



Qualifications:



Current CPC, CPC-A, CCS, or equivalent AHIMA credential required.



Minimum 2 years of experience in professional coding, with a focus on operative and E/M coding.



Experience in orthopedic, pain management, or anesthesia coding highly preferred.



Proficient in the use of coding software, EMRs, and billing systems.



Strong understanding of NCCI edits, modifier use, and documentation requirements.



Excellent attention to detail, accuracy, and time management.



Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.

title: Real Estate Acquisition Specialist (Direct-to-Agent Expert)
description:
Finding someone who understands the Direct-to-Agent (DTA) model is a smart move. You need a "Dispositions specialist" or a "Lead Generator" who knows how to speak the language of a Realtor without sounding like a robotic telemarketer.



Here is a ready-to-use job post template designed to attract high-quality candidates who know how to navigate the MLS and build agent relationships.



Job Title: Real Estate Acquisition Specialist (Direct-to-Agent Expert)

Role Overview

I am looking for a savvy, relationship-driven Lead Generator to help me scale my real estate investment portfolio. Your primary goal is to identify and build relationships with real estate agents to source off-market deals or "pocket listings" before they hit the general market.



This is not a standard cold-calling role; it requires a sophisticated understanding of how agents operate and how to position me as their preferred buyer.



Key Responsibilities

Agent Outreach: Contact active listing agents via phone,
, and text to discuss their current and upcoming inventory.



The "DTA" Approach: Use the Direct-to-Agent model to find deals that are stalled, expired, or have unique seller circumstances (distressed properties, probate, etc.).



Relationship Management: Build a "Power List" of agents in our target markets who consistently bring us deals.



Deal Vetting: Perform initial triage on properties to ensure they meet my specific buy box (location, price point, and condition).



Follow-Up: Maintain a strict follow-up schedule with agents to stay top-of-mind.



Required Skills & Experience

Proven DTA Experience: You must have prior experience working within the Direct-to-Agent real estate model.



Agent Fluency: You know how to talk to Realtors. You understand commissions, the value of a "double-end" deal, and how to build rapport quickly.



CRM Proficiency: Experience using Podio, REISift, Salesforce, or similar tools to track leads.



Negotiation Skills: Ability to handle objections and pivot conversations toward a "win-win" for both the agent and the investor.



Self-Starter: You don't need your hand held; you know how to hunt for deals.



Why Work With Me?

Simple Buy Box: I know exactly what I want to buy, making your job easier.



Fast Closings: I have the capital ready to go, which is a huge selling point when you talk to agents.



Growth Potential: Competitive base pay plus performance-based bonuses for every deal we close.

title: Rockstar CPA / Accountant / Bookkeeper
description:
Hey there!



I hope that you’re having an amazing day so far.



I’m Serenity, the founder, operator, and CEO of Manifesting Serenity. 



Manifesting Serenity offers inspiration, empowerment, and liberation, supporting you to explore this beautiful world and yourself with confidence, a courageous outlook, and sustainability in mind. All through manifestation mindset shift, 100's of resources, digital products, group trips, events, coaching packages, workshops, and more!



Currently and honestly we’re facing some financial limitations and disorganization and we’re looking to bring a talented CPA/ Accountant/ Bookkeeper on our team to help support our efforts in gaining more funding and supporting growth in 2026.



In January of 2026 we’re expecting to onboard countless clients, reach new heights with grant funding, have events book out, sell more products, and more! This is a great role for someone to have part time while they have other clients or alongside their full time work - it compliments whatever it is that you might be building or already have!



So if you’re someone that genuinely wants to help and grow alongside us, while also helping others - then this role is for you!!







TIMING & AVAILABILITY EXPECTATIONS

Approx. 5 hours per week to start (Opportunity for more hours in the future)

Initial setup and onboarding will require additional time

Opportunity for role growth based on performance, skills, and reliability





SKILLS & KNOWLEDGE

Experience and proficient using accounting software (Xero) + Google Sheets  (organization, formulas, dashboards)

Strong understanding of separating personal and business finances

Detail-oriented, reliable, and able to work independently

Clear written communication and proactive follow-through





OVERVIEW OF ONGOING SUPPORT

Core Financial Support

Reconcile accounts weekly and monthly

Track income and expenses

Track profits and losses

Prepare and organize tax return documents

Track quarterly tax deadlines, send reminders, and assist with filing

Flag financial trends, inconsistencies, or concerns

Provide strategic insights related to financial health and efficiency

Assist with forecasting future income and planning major expenses

Review subscriptions regularly and recommend cost-saving or temporary-use options

Support grant research, tracking, management, and reporting

Assist with organizing and reviewing investment summaries





Event & Project Support

Build event budgets (expected revenue, venue, supplies, food, marketing, etc.)

Track event RSVPs, payments, and refunds

Log raffle basket donations and sponsor details

Track outreach to nonprofits, sanctuaries, and partners

Maintain event timelines and task checklists (deadlines, progress, completion)

Create and maintain vendor contact lists

Track inventory for event supplies and merchandise





Client, Coaching & General Support

Track session bookings, payments, and outstanding balances

Maintain structured spreadsheets for client goals and progress milestones (content provided; structure handled by you)

Organize digital products (vision board book, workbooks, etc.) and track sales

Track professional development funding resources

Maintain a list of local organizations for donations, pro bono workshops, and sanctuaries

Organize annual planning documents (goals, OKRs, income projections)

Create and maintain a centralized resource index (links, research, grants, directories, certifications)

Track personal and business subscriptions with renewal dates





FINANCIAL TRACKING & ADMIN (GOOGLE SHEETS + WAVE)

Enter and categorize transactions weekly in Wave

Reconcile bank, PayPal, and Stripe accounts in Wave

Track income by source in Google Sheets (coaching, content creation, events, affiliates, etc.)

Maintain a financial dashboard showing monthly revenue, expenses, and net income

Log upcoming expenses, renewals, and subscriptions with due dates

Maintain a running list of deductible business expenses

Track tax-deductible mileage, meals, supplies, and travel

Create a Year-at-a-Glance financial summary for tax preparation

Flag missing receipts or unclear transactions





ONBOARDING PROCESS

Connect accounts and systems

Share access credentials securely

Upload past statements, receipts, and records

Walk through tools, spreadsheets, and workflows

Review deadlines, communication, and expectations





PAY & BENEFITS

Pay increases based on loyalty, integrity, performance, and continued education

Performance-based bonuses

Holiday bonuses for contractors with 3+ months tenure

Annual virtual holiday celebration (around New Year)

Flexible weekly schedule as long as deadlines are met

Annual birthday massage gift for contractors with 6+ months tenure

Fully remote position (no commuting)

Creative, collaborative environment where ideas are welcomed





PAYMENT DETAILS

Payments via OnlineJobs.ph PayPal (transitioning to Wise in 2026)

Paydays are the 2nd and 4th Fridays of each month

If a holiday falls on payday, payment will be sent the following Monday

Monitask is required for time tracking





If this sounds like a role you’re confident stepping into and growing with long-term, I’d love to connect!



Please send me your resume, portfolio, software that you have the most experience with, and include the word “diagram” in your subject line, failure to do so will have your application dismissed.



It’s also important to note, I truly appreciate every application. Due to the volume received, only applicants selected for the next step will be contacted.



Best,

Serenity

 Management

etc.

s for Manifesting Serenity and 3–5 aligned podcasts currently seeking guests

If you are confident in your ability to operate at an executive support level, I look forward to reviewing your application.



Best,

title: Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and independent video editor for our fast growing Ecommerce brand Cookware Niche.



You must be able to create Meta ad creatives independently based on competitor videos, creative references, and our briefings. We are not looking for someone who needs step by step guidance. We want someone who can think creatively, work fast, and deliver performance driven ads with minimal input.



This is a long term opportunity with strong potential to grow into a full time role if the work is good.



What you will do

You should be able to handle the full creative process:

•?  ?Source relevant video footage

•?  ?Generate video footage using AI when needed

•?  ?Edit complete video ads for Meta

•?  ?Create strong hooks, pacing, ad structure, and overall flow

•?  ?Turn briefings and competitor inspiration into original, high converting creatives

•?  ?Work independently and make good creative decisions



What we are looking for

•?  ?Strong experience with video editing for Meta ads

•?  ?Good understanding of direct response advertising

•?  ?Experience with ecommerce creatives

•?  ?Experience using AI tools for video generation, enhancement, or support

•?  ?Strong English communication skills

•?  ?Fast, reliable, and easy to work with

•?  ?Someone who can take ownership and move quickly without constant back and forth



Communication

Good communication is very important to us.

•?  ?We communicate mainly through Slack

•?  ?For urgent things, we may also use WhatsApp

•?  ?You should be responsive, clear in communication, and comfortable in a fast paced workflow



Delivery time

Fast turnaround is a hard requirement.

•?  ?Every task must be delivered within 24 hours

If you cannot consistently deliver within 24 hours, this role is probably not the right fit.



Trial assignment

To apply, shortlisted candidates will be asked to create one video ad for 
 based on our briefing and competitor references.

The best candidate will be hired.



Long term potential

If your work is strong, this can become a full time position with ongoing work and a lot of growth potential.



To apply, please send

•?  ?A short introduction in English

•?  ?Your best examples of Meta or ecommerce video ads

•?  ?Examples of ads you edited yourself

•?  ?The AI tools you use

•?  ?Your average turnaround time

•?  ?Confirmation that you can deliver within 24 hours

•?  ?Confirmation that you are comfortable communicating via Slack and WhatsApp when needed

title: Appointment Setter
description:
As an Inside Sales Agent, you will play a crucial role in qualifying leads, setting up appointments, following up, nurturing client relationships, and assisting in the overall sales process while making sure that all interactions are properly documented in the CRM and company platforms and performing other ISA-related research, tasks, and duties, as required.



Responsibilities:

1. Qualifying the Leads

- Communicate effectively with potential clients to determine their timing and motivation



2. Appointment Setting

- Schedule appointments for clients to view properties or meet with real estate agents

- Coordinate with the sales team and real estate professionals to ensure seamless client experiences



3. Follow-up and Nurture

- Conduct timely and strategic follow-ups with leads to maintain interest and address any concerns

- Nurture long-term relationships with potential clients to convert leads into active prospects



4. Documentation

- Maintain detailed and accurate records of client interactions and transactions in the CRM system and company platforms



Qualifications:

- At least 1 year of call/contact center experience

- Real Estate Inside Sales Agent or Appointment Setter is a PLUS

- Strong communication and interpersonal skills, with an ability to build rapport quickly

- Attention to details

- Basic Knowledge of Google Apps and Microsoft Office

- Knowledge of real estate processes, terminology, and market dynamics is a PLUS

- Familiarity with real estate CRM software and lead management tools is a PLUS

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced and target-driven environment



System and Work Requirements: 

* Internet Speed: 15Mbps or higher

* Processor: At least the latest version of ICore-i3 quad-core or later versions

* Memory: At least 4GB RAM

title: Senior Graphic Designer with Modern Skill with AI Prompting Master Skils and proven experience with Amazon
description:
ABOUT US



Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: E-commerce video editor
description:
*NOTE: Test Application Video Required*



We are looking for a skilled Video Editor to join our creative team. You will work directly from detailed creative briefs to make ad creatives..



What You Will Be Working On



You will be editing a wide variety of ad formats including:

UGC-style creatives edited to feel authentic and organic.

Founder video ads with a premium, high-end feel.

Animated and AI-generated concept videos (Pixar CGI style, podcast formats, cinematic storytelling).

Social proof and testimonial mashup videos.

Voiceover-driven science and biology explainer ads.

Short-form content for TikTok and Reels.

Split-screen and "before and after" formats.



Every project comes with a detailed brief including the script, persona, awareness stage, angle, visual direction, and reference images. Your job is to bring that brief to life.



Important Points

AI Proficiency: You must be comfortable and experienced using AI to generate videos, images, and voiceovers. (Think Nano Banana Pro and Kling 3.0



Precision: Able to follow a brief while bringing creativity to the edit.



Communication: Fluent in English (written and spoken).



What Working With Us Looks Like

You will receive a fully detailed creative brief for every project (typically 2 per day). No guessing or vague direction. We move fast, test frequently, and iterate based on data. Your job is to execute the brief at the highest level and deliver a polished final cut ready to go live.



Application Requirement: Test Video

To ensure you have the specific skills required for this role, all applicants are required to submit a short test video. This allows us to see your editing style and technical qualifications in action.



Note: Detailed instructions for the test video, can be found down below. Please review these instructions carefully before submitting your application. We will NOT respond to applications without a test video. 



Hours and Payment

Schedule: 4–6 hours of work per day, minimum 5 days a week.

Rate: 3 USD/hour (with potential for increase over time).

Growth: Potential for both more work hours and higher pay based on performance.





****************************************************************************

Test video instructions:



Concept



Pixar 3D CGI style (use this in the image prompting to get the right style)



Informative/educational video on the fact that dogs only see yellow.



Female AI Voice over



FORMAT: Pixar 3D CGI animated educational video. Think the style of an Inside Out or Up short — warm, cinematic, emotionally intelligent and visually stunning. The animation brings the science to life in a way that feels magical rather than clinical. No talking heads. Pure visual storytelling with a warm authoritative voiceover.



VISUAL DIRECTION The video moves between two worlds throughout. The human world — full color, rich and vibrant. And the dog world — heavily desaturated and grey except for yellow which glows with vivid warmth. The contrast between these two worlds is the visual engine of the entire video. 





Script and scenes



[INTRIGUING STATEMENT — 0:00 to 0:07] [Opens on a beautiful wide Pixar shot of a richly decorated living room, warm colors everywhere, a golden retriever sitting in the center looking directly at the camera with large curious eyes]

VOICEOVER: [warm, slightly mysterious] "Your dog has lived in your home for years, slept in every corner, memorized every sound and every smell."

[Slow push in toward the dog's eyes]

VOICEOVER: "But he has never once seen it the way you do."



[BUILD TENSION — 0:07 to 0:16] [The camera enters the dog's perspective. The entire living room slowly drains of color. The warm walls fade to grey. The rich furniture blurs into flat neutral shapes. The carefully chosen dog bed in the corner — beige and beautiful —turns colorless and gray. Everything the owner carefully designed becomes colorless gray.]

VOICEOVER: [building, slightly unsettling] "To your dog, this is your home, grey and colorless."

- Answer member questions daily inside our 
 community with clear, beginner-friendly responses

- Answer our support ticket desk — responding with Loom video walkthroughs when needed, not just text answers

- Create short Loom recordings showing members exactly how to set things up step by step

- Serve as the technical lead and head of community support — keeping members unblocked and moving forward

- Keep the community active and engaged — spark conversations, share tips,



TOOLS YOU'LL WORK WITH

Claude, ChatGPT, Manus, GemSpark, N8N, Make, 
, Zoom, Loom, and other AI agent and automation tools



YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF…



You have hands-on experience building AI agents using tools like Claude, Manus, GemSpark, or similar

You can explain technical concepts in simple, friendly language for complete beginners

You're comfortable on camera — Zoom calls and Loom recordings don't intimidate you

You genuinely enjoy community building and helping people succeed

You can work independently and manage your own schedule

You have strong written English — clear, warm, and professional



BONUS POINTS



Experience with no-code or low-code AI automation platforms

Prior experience as a community manager or online course support lead

You've created tutorial content or taught tech topics before

Familiarity with prompt engineering and LLM workflows



HOW TO APPLY

We read every application. Show us your personality — we're not just hiring a resume, we're hiring you.



Send your resume and a short cover letter explaining why you're the right fit for this role

Include links to AI agent projects you've built, tools you've used, or communities you've supported

Record a 2–3 minute Loom video introducing yourself and explaining one AI agent concept as if you're talking to a complete beginner

Include your expected monthly rate and availability (hours per week)

title: Credit Repair Sales/Closer/Appt Setter
description: We’re looking for a motivated, confident Sales Representative to join our growing credit repair company. This role focuses on speaking with warm leads, setting appointments, and closing clients into our done-for-you credit repair programs. title: Client Acquisition Specialist
description:
About LexNavi

LexNavi Agency is a Legal Process Outsourcing (LPO) company providing back-office estate planning paralegal drafting support to U.S. law firms. We deliver execution-ready trust packages on a monthly retainer so attorneys can focus on client relationships and revenue — not document production.

We are building for long-term, process-driven growth. This role is the first dedicated sales hire at LexNavi, and the person who fills it will help shape how the agency acquires and retains clients.







The Role

The Client Acquisition Specialist is responsible for filling and moving the pipeline: generating qualified leads, booking discovery calls, running the sales process with the CEO, and closing new retainer clients.

This is not a volume-spam role. Our target market is U.S. estate planning law firms in California, Florida, New York, and Massachusetts. The outreach is specific, the messaging is precise, and the goal is earning long-term client relationships — not one-time transactions.

In addition to pipeline activity, you will help build the sales infrastructure: CRM setup, outreach SOPs, proposal templates, and a repeatable process the agency can scale.



Core Responsibilities

Generate qualified leads from U.S. estate planning law firms via LinkedIn, cold
, referrals, and other outreach channels

Build and maintain a structured lead list targeting PST and EST time zones (CA, FL, NY, MA)

Execute outreach campaigns that follow LexNavi voice standards — specific, process-oriented, no pressure

Qualify prospects against LexNavi's Ideal Client Profile (established EP workflow, WealthCounsel or comparable platform, desire for long-term drafting support)

Book and facilitate discovery calls with CEO; support the proposal and closing process

Manage the CRM — accurate pipeline data, follow-up tracking, deal stage documentation

Create SOPs with the CEO covering: Lead Qualification, Discovery Call Script, Lead Gen & Outreach, CRM Management, Proposal & Contract Drafting, and Client Acquisition Playbook

Report on weekly KPIs: outreach volume, response rates, calls booked, calls completed, proposals sent, clients signed

Gather and report market intelligence: client objections, competitor positioning, new service opportunities

Coordinate with COO for smooth client handoff after signing

Participate in weekly 1-on-1 with CEO for pipeline review and strategy



Qualifications

Required

Demonstrated experience in B2B sales, outreach, or business development — remote setting strongly preferred

Strong written English — outreach and proposal copy must be precise, specific, and professional

Comfortable working asynchronously with a small, remote team

Process-oriented: you build systems, not just activity

Accountable to KPIs — you track what you do and report it honestly



Preferred

Prior experience selling to law firms, legal services, or professional services B2B clients

Familiarity with estate planning, legal drafting, or LPO services

CRM experience (any platform — we will configure during onboarding)

LinkedIn Sales Navigator experience

Experience writing cold outreach that converts at above-average rates



Disqualifiers

Relies on volume-spray tactics over targeted, specific outreach

Cannot or will not follow documented communication standards

Uncomfortable with a transparent, KPI-tracked performance environment

title: Experienced Fire Alarm / Security Systems Designer (Remote)
description:
Experienced Fire Alarm / Security Systems Designer (Remote)



Location: Remote

Compensation: $6–$10/hour (based on experience)



We are a fire & security contracting and engineering company seeking for  a skilled Fire Alarm / Security Systems Designer to join our team on a freelance, part-time, or full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise in fire alarm systems, security systems, CCTV, and access control. Projects will include system design, drafting, and documentation for submittals and installations.



Key Responsibilities



- Design fire alarm, security, CCTV, and access control systems in compliance with NFPA, IBC, IFC, and local codes.

- Produce professional drawings and submittal packages using AutoDesk AutoCAD.

- Coordinate system layouts, device locations, riser diagrams, and wiring details.

- Collaborate with project managers, contractors, and AHJs as needed.

- Revise and update designs based on feedback or code requirements.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience designing fire alarm and/or low voltage security systems.

- Proficiency in AutoCAD (required).

- Familiarity with NFPA 72 and other relevant fire/life safety codes.

- Strong attention to detail and ability to meet deadlines.

- Good communication skills and ability to work independently.



Preferred (not required):

- NICET certification in Fire Alarm Systems or equivalent experience.

- Experience preparing full submittal packages for AHJ approval.

- Knowledge of manufacturer-specific equipment (e.g., Fire Lite, DMP, Kidde, Silent Knight, Honeywell, etc.).



Position Details

-Flexible arrangement: freelance, part-time, or full-time

-Remote: work from anywhere

-Compensation: $6–$10/hour (based on experience and performance)

-Must be responsive and available to coordinate during business hours



Growth & Career Path



We’re building for the long term, and the right candidate will have the opportunity to grow with us:

-Potential to transition to a full-time or Engineering Lead role.

-Be part of a fast-growing, tech-enabled contracting & engineering company that values operational excellence and innovation.



Application Instructions (Read Carefully)



To apply, you must complete all the steps below:



1.) Write a short paragraph explaining why you are a good fit for this role.



2.) Answer this logic/comprehension question in 2–3 sentences:

          “If you are designing a fire alarm system and the AHJ requests additional devices after your initial submittal, how would you handle the change?”



3.) Use this subject line in your application
:

          “Designer Application – [Your Name]”



4.) At the very end of your application, include this exact phrase:

           “I want to synergize with you”



5.) Submit a 2-minute video explaining your experience in fire alarm/security system design (portfolio samples encouraged).          

           **Upload via Google Drive or Loom and share the link.**

title: Amazon PPC Manager (Full-time Position/Work-from-Home)
description:
Fast-Growing American Marketing Agency looking for an Amazon PPC manager

(Work-from-Home/Full-time Position)



You:

• …paid for your own stuff as a teenager and take full accountability for your wins and losses

• …take pride on the work you do, if it has your signature then it must be done right

• …are never afraid about the statement: to be reliable

• …see obstacles as opportunities to become better, exhibiting a growth mindset

• …have the ability to apply your skills to solve and array of different problems effectively

• …are never afraid about the statement: to be reliable

• …would rather work with David instead of Goliath



We:

• …really care about our team; the soul of this company is our people, and we value every single member of the team

• …believe that the internet is shaping how we work and how products are sold, we prefer to adapt instead of fighting it. Ecommerce is here to stay

• …are deep subject matter experts on all things 

• …care more about your values and intelligence than your experience

• …are committed to creating a team dynamic that fosters empowerment rather than entitlement

• …don’t tolerate mediocrity. The only way we know is to always be in it to win it

• …strive to be the #1 Amazon Agency in the world, we are obsessed with being the best



Our Values:

• Give a sh!t

• Say it as it is

• Always-improving learning machine

• Be obsessed with serving others

• Do your best and expect the best from others



About AMZ Clever:

We manage awesome brands on 
 around the world since 2015. We are a fully remote team in several countries helping clients from all over the world. We work with brands that have made it to the Inc’s 500 Fastest Growing Companies list; listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange; and very exciting product startups. When companies think of winning on 
 we want them to think AMZ Clever.



Responsibilities:

• Analyze performance of Amazon advertising for accounts assigned, this includes Sponsored Products Ads, Headline Search Ads (Sponsored Brands), Sponsored Display Ads, and new ad types that become available

• Work alongside Account Manager to establish advertising goals, provide Account Manager with in-depth analysis of advertising performance

• Design, deploy, and manage Amazon Advertising “PPC” (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.)

• Routinely optimize Amazon advertising campaigns according to account/SKU goals (ACoS goal, order count goal, click count goal, etc)

• Perform KW research to identify new opportunities to advertise and identify KWs to add as negative KWs

• Launch new Amazon advertising campaigns, primarily using Bulk Operations and Excel

• Continue learning about the latest trends and processes within Amazon PPC and provide new ideas, strategies, and insights



Qualifications:

• Proven previous experience dealing with PPC on Amazon Seller Central. Do not apply if you're lacking this

• Deep experience with Microsoft Excel

• Fluent English level (written and spoken)

• Reliable Computer and Internet Speed

• Working knowledge of analytics tools is a plus

• Deep experience in data analysis and reporting



A plus if you have:

• Proven work experience managing PPC on Walmart

• Proven work experience at an Amazon Marketing Agency working with clients

• Proven work experience utilizing Amazon Seller Central for more than 1 region (e.g. North America + Europe)

• Work experience inside an international company, dealing with people from different nationalities and cultures



Perks:

• 100% work from home/remote

• Travel and work OR stay home with your family (we really don’t care as long as you do your work. Some time zones may be required)

• Flexible Hours (4 hours of overlap with daytime hours in Asia per week are needed)

• Report directly to the executive team

• We offer competitive compensation

• Build a career in one of the most relevant industries today, e-commerce is here to stay and we’re in it for the long run

• 15 days of vacation per year



Who we are not looking for:

• You’re too much of a thinker rather than a doer

• You’re more of a big picture person than a detail-oriented one

• Messes don’t really bother you

• You prefer to improvise instead of preparing and then following a system

• You don’t like spreadsheets

• You’re unpredictable rather than reliable

• You don’t want to work from home or remote

• You can’t stay calm when problems happen but rather become too emotional

• You’re not coachable

• You are too fast-paced and therefore miss details because you think it's better to get it done than to get it right

• You like to make your own system instead of implementing a system that already works

• Handling multiple objectives feels like a lot to you



How to apply:

Use the following subject line for your application to be considered: PPCM

 the following answers:

1) How much is 5 + 67? (Write in letters)

2) Describe yourself in less than 200 characters

3) Describe your Amazon PPC experience in less than 200 characters

4) How many GB of RAM does your computer have?

title: Inside Sales Associate | Growth Path to Appointment Setter and Closer ( $4-$6/Hour + Commission )
description:
Inside Sales Associate | Growth Path to Appointment Setter and Closer



Job Type:

Remote | Part-Time or Full-Time

Base Pay + Commission + Growth Opportunity



About the Role



We are looking for an Inside Sales Associate to join our growing U.S.-based team, focused primarily on our Fire Alarm and Safety business.



This role is a strong fit for someone who wants to build a real future in sales. You will start by supporting lead generation, prospect research, lead organization, and follow-up coordination. As you gain experience, improve your communication, and prove your performance, you will be trained into Appointment Setting and may eventually grow into a Closer role.



This is not just a basic support position. It is a long-term opportunity for someone who is coachable, organized, strong in English, and serious about growing in sales.



Growth Path



This role is designed to develop over time:



>>Stage 1: Inside Sales Associate



>>Stage 2: Appointment Setter



>>Stage 3: Closer



We are looking for someone who is willing to learn step by step and grow with the company.



What You’ll Do



Your responsibilities will include:



>>>Researching potential clients online

>>>Building targeted lead lists

>>>Finding key decision-makers and accurate contact details

>>>Organizing and updating lead data in spreadsheets or CRM

>>>Supporting lead qualification based on company criteria

>>>Assisting with outreach preparation and follow-up tracking

>>>Helping maintain a clean and organized sales pipeline

>>>Supporting appointment-setting efforts as training progresses



As You Grow, You May Also Be Trained On



>Lead qualification

>Outreach follow-up

>Appointment setting

>Warm lead handling

>Early-stage sales conversations

>Supporting or eventually taking on closing responsibilities



Who We’re Looking For



We want someone who is:



>>Strong in written English

>>Good in spoken English

>>Organized and detail-oriented

>>Good at online research

>>Reliable and consistent

>>Able to follow systems and instructions

>>Coachable and willing to improve

>>Interested in building a long-term career in sales



Preferred but Not Required



>>Experience in lead generation

>>Experience in inside sales

>>Experience in appointment setting

>>Experience in B2B sales

>>Background in fire alarm, low voltage, construction, engineering, or technical services

>>Experience using CRM tools or lead tracking systems



Compensation



>>Base pay to start, depending on experience

>>Commission opportunities

>>Increased earning potential as responsibilities grow

>>Performance-based advancement



********Why Join Us*******



>Clear path for growth in sales

>Hands-on training and development

>Opportunity to work in a specialized U.S. service industry

>Long-term opportunity for the right candidate

>Performance-based promotion into bigger responsibilities



*****How to Apply****



To be considered, please send all of the following:



Your resume



A short voice recording introducing yourself in English



A 2-minute video recording explaining why you are a strong candidate for this position



A short written summary of your relevant experience



Your expected hourly rate



Your availability

Inside Sales Associate Application - [Your Name]



****Very Important!!****



Applications that do not include the voice recording and 2-minute video may not be prioritized.



> Screening Question



If you were asked to find companies that may need fire alarm and safety services, how would you identify the best leads and d
 which ones should be contacted first?

title: Shipment Tracking & Customer Communication Specialist (Parcel Panel | Shopify | E-Commerce)
description:
We are a fast-growing women's fashion e-commerce brand selling to customers in the US and UK. We are looking for a detail-oriented Shipment Monitoring Specialist to keep our order fulfillment running smoothly and our customers informed at all times.



What you will be doing

- Monitor all open orders daily using Parcel Panel and flag shipments that are delayed or not shipped out within the expected timeframe

- Identify orders with fulfillment issues such as incorrect addresses, out-of-stock items, or stalled tracking

- Contact customers proactively by
 (via Gorgias) when their order has an issue — including size availability problems, address corrections needed, or shipping delays

- Escalate supplier-side delays to the internal team when needed

- Keep a clear daily log of flagged orders and actions taken

- Follow up on unresolved cases until the issue is closed



What we are looking for

- Hands-on experience with Parcel Panel — this is a hard requirement, please do not apply without it

- Experience working with Shopify-based e-commerce stores

- Experience with Gorgias or a similar customer support helpdesk

- Strong written English — you will be communicating directly with customers in the US and UK

- Highly organized with a proactive attitude — you spot problems before customers do

- Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable internet connection and availability during agreed working hours



Nice to have

- Experience with dropshipping or fashion/footwear e-commerce

- Familiarity with fulfillment workflows and supplier coordination

- Previous experience flagging and resolving address issues or out-of-stock situations

title: Accountant
description:
Job Title: Accountant (Cost Accounting & Financial Operations)

Department: Business Services

Reports To: Owner / Leadership Team

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-time



About Town Web and HeyGov

Town Web is a Wisconsin-based digital agency specializing in website design, development, and ongoing maintenance for municipalities across the United States. Through our sister brand HeyGov, we empower local governments with digital tools that simplify services like online forms, payments, and permit requests, making civic engagement more efficient and accessible for residents. Together, Town Web and HeyGov provide a complete digital ecosystem for municipalities, from modern websites to integrated citizen-facing solutions.



As our organization continues to grow, we’re strengthening our financial and operational foundations to better connect costs, performance, and profitability in real time, ensuring we deliver reliable, scalable value to every community we serve.



Role Overview

We are hiring a full-time in-house accountant who can deliver cost-accounting discipline, weekly profitability reporting, and proactive expense control across all product lines. This role goes beyond bookkeeping, it’s about bringing clarity to how each project, launch, and event affects the bottom line.

You will work within Xero (our primary accounting platform) to establish clear cost structures, reporting methods, and financial rhythms that give leadership weekly visibility into margins and spending.



Key Responsibilities



Financial Operations & Reporting

-Manage full accounting operations in Xero, including general ledger, journal entries, bank reconciliations, and financial statements.

-Produce weekly reports on:

--Project and product margins

--Labor efficiency and utilization

--AR and collections

-Expense highlights and variances

-Prepare monthly and quarterly financial summaries with recommendations for improvement.

-Work with leadership to build EOS-aligned financial scorecards and ensure data consistency across teams.



Cost Accounting & Profitability Tracking

-Implement and maintain cost-per-project accounting to understand true margins.

-Track direct labor (developers, designers, project managers).

-Allocate overhead (software, hosting, administrative costs).

-Monitor profitability per website build or client engagement.

-Develop standard cost templates and reporting methods to ensure consistency across all projects.

-Support pricing validation by analyzing margins per product, package, and promotion.

-Produce post-launch and post-conference ROI reports, linking actual spend to lead generation and revenue impact.



Expense Maintenance & System Audits

-Own the subscription and system audit process: regularly review all active tools (Adobe, Figma, Zoom, etc.) to eliminate waste and redundancies.

-Maintain a central expense tracker linking costs to projects, departments, and events.

-Monitor vendor payments, renewals, and contract terms to ensure accuracy and savings.

-Enforce expense-approval processes and ensure clean records for audit readiness.



Accounts Receivable & Collections

-Oversee client invoicing, payment schedules, and follow-ups.

-Maintain current aging reports and reduce AR > 30 days.

-Coordinate with Sales for accurate invoicing on new subscriptions, websites, renewals, upgrades and upsells.



Compliance & Payroll

-Prepare and process payroll for employees and contractors (via Gusto, Xero Payroll, or equivalent).

-Support tax filings and compliance in coordination with the external CPA or tax attorney.

-Establish internal consistency between bookkeeping and tax reporting to minimize rework.



Collaboration & Continuous Improvement

-Partner with leadership, operations, and marketing to tie cost data to decision-making.

-Participate in cross-functional reviews: e.g., evaluating conference ROI, campaign effectiveness, and staffing costs.

-Support leadership with budget planning, forecasts, and scenario modeling.

-Document processes and train backup staff for continuity.



What Success Looks Like

-Weekly visibility into which projects and launches are profitable (and which aren’t).

-Zero waste: all dormant subscriptions and unnecessary expenses eliminated.

-Accurate and timely reporting: Weekly scorecards delivered by Tuesday each week.

-Conference ROI clearly tracked, linking spend to lead conversions.

-Collections improved, with AR > 30 days reduced to under 10%.

Tighter cost controls enabling better pricing, hiring, and raise decisions.



Qualifications

Required:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting

-Must have 5+ years working at a growing business. Preferably an agency or SaaS that is doing $3M+ a year

-Demonstrated expertise with Xero (bookkeeping, reporting, and integrations)

-Proven experience with cost accounting or job-order costing

-Strong analytical skills; able to turn data into insights and recommendations

-Excellent attention to detail, organization, and accountability in a remote setup

-Employment from past employers/business references will verified

-Knowledge of U.S. accounting practices a must



Preferred:

-Familiarity with Profit First, Simple Numbers, or similar financial frameworks

-Experience in multi-entity or SaaS-style businesses with recurring revenue

-Proficiency in Excel / Google Sheets (pivot tables, formulas, dashboards)

-CPA or equivalent certification is an advantage.



Compensation & Benefits

-Competitive salary: $1,800 to $2,500 USD per month, depending on experience

-Paid time off

-Fully remote setup aligned with U.S. Central Time hours

-Long-term opportunity to build and lead the finance function of a growing international company



Why Join Town Web and HeyGov

-You’ll be stepping into a pivotal role, bringing financial clarity to a company scaling fast. Your work will shape how the leadership team makes decisions on pricing, hiring, and investments, while ensuring every dollar is accounted for with purpose.



Interested? Visit our official job posting in Workable: 



Job Type: Full-time



Benefits:

Work from home

Work Location: Remote

title: Recruiter (Part-Time, with Potential to Grow Full-Time)
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Recruiter to support talent sourcing, hiring, and onboarding across our mentor and team pipeline. This role will be responsible for identifying strong candidates, managing the hiring process from outreach through onboarding, and helping ensure an excellent candidate experience throughout.



The ideal candidate is an excellent communicator with strong English fluency, professional screen presence, and sharp judgment. They should be comfortable operating within clear systems and processes while moving quickly, staying organized, and maintaining a high bar for talent. This person will also support the creation and refinement of candidate and mentor bios to ensure clarity, consistency, and alignment with our brand.



This is a part-time role with the potential to grow into a full-time position.



Key Responsibilities



Source, screen, and evaluate candidates across multiple roles, including mentors, staff, and contractors

Manage the full hiring pipeline, including outreach, interview coordination, candidate follow-up, and offer support

Lead onboarding processes to ensure new hires are prepared and set up for success

Write, edit, and refine candidate and mentor bios for clarity, quality, and brand consistency

Maintain accurate applicant tracking systems and candidate records

Coordinate with internal stakeholders to understand hiring priorities and role requirements

Support continuous improvement of hiring workflows, candidate experience, and operational efficiency



Qualifications



Strong English fluency, both written and verbal

Strong screen presence and professional communication skills

Experience in recruiting, talent acquisition, or HR operations preferred

Strong writing and editing skills, especially for drafting and refining bios and profiles

Highly organized, with the ability to manage multiple hiring pipelines at once

Detail-oriented, with strong judgment in candidate evaluation

Able to work efficiently within structured processes and SOPs

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):

title: Social Media Manager | Graphic Designer | Video Editor
description:
We are a growing credit repair company based in the United States looking for a talented and reliable part-time tea
mber to handle our social media presence, graphic design, and video editing needs.



You will manage and post content across our social media platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok), create eye-catching graphics for ads and posts, and edit short-form videos and reels from raw footage or podcast-style content. You need to understand how to make content that stops the scroll and speaks to people who want to fix their credit and improve their financial situation.



To apply, send your portfolio or examples of past work — specifically social media posts you have managed, graphics you have designed, and videos or reels you have edited. Applications without examples will not be considered.



Requirements: video editing software; proficiency in Canva or Adobe tools for graphic design; experience managing business social media accounts; strong attention to detail; good English communication skills; reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines consistently.



This is a part-time role starting with room to grow. We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work, communicates clearly, and wants to build a long-term working relationship.
