title: SALES REPRESENTATIVE (CONSTRUCTION / B2B)
description:
Role Overview



Gobind Trades is hiring a high-performance Sales Representative to drive new business with developers, general contractors, and builders across Canada.



This is not a “talking job.”

This is a deal-closing role.



You will be responsible for:



Generating and qualifying leads

Reaching out to GCs, developers, and site supervisors

Presenting Gobind Trades as a one-stop trade solution

Handling objections and pushing deals forward

Closing contracts and securing project opportunities

Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

Fluent English with a Canadian or U.S.-level accent

Strong verbal communication and confidence on calls

Proven experience in sales, business development, or client acquisition

Ability to handle rejection and still push deals forward

Sharp negotiation and persuasion skills

Professional tone when dealing with construction stakeholders

Preferred (High Value)

Experience in construction, subcontracting, or B2B services

Understanding of developers, GCs, and project pipelines

Experience with cold outreach (calls,
, LinkedIn)

Ability to manage leads and follow-ups consistently

What We Actually Care About

Can you book meetings consistently?

Can you convert conversations into contracts?

Can you represent Gobind Trades like a serious company, not a small subcontractor?



If not, don’t apply.



Compensation

Base + performance-based incentives

Commission tied to deals closed

High earning potential based on performance

How to Apply



Send:



Short introduction

Your sales experience

Voice recording (mandatory) — this is where we evaluate your communication

Any proof of past results (if available)

title: Commercial Cleaning Sales Representative VA
description:
Position Type: Remote / Virtual Assistant

Industry: Commercial Cleaning Services

Schedule: Part-time

Location: Remote – must have excellent English communication skill



Position Overview:

We are a growing commercial cleaning company looking for a highly motivated Commercial Cleaning Sales

Representative (Virtual Assistant) to help us expand our client base.

This role focuses on outbound prospecting, cold calling, and converting leads into scheduled walk-through

appointments for our sales team.

Because we are a growing company, this position will also play an important role in helping develop sales

processes, scripts, and internal documentation to support our long-term growth.

The ideal candidate is confident on the phone, highly organized, proactive, and comfortable helping build

systems in a startup-style environment.



Key Responsibilities:

Lead Generation & Prospecting

Research and identify potential commercial cleaning clients

Maintain and organize prospect data in CRM

Cold Calling & Outreach to leads 

Conduct outbound cold calls to introduce our commercial cleaning services

Follow a structured script while adapting to conversations naturally

Overcome common objections professionally

Build rapport with decision-makers

Qualify prospects to determine cleaning needs

Appointment Setting

Convert cold prospects into scheduled walk-through appointments

Coordinate with internal sales team calendars

Confirm appointments and send follow-up
s

Ensure all appointment details are documented in CRM



Sales Support:

Track outreach activity and results

Follow up with warm prospects

Manage
 communication with prospects

Support the sales pipeline



Process & System Development:

Since we are an early-stage company, this role will also help:

Develop and refine cold calling scripts

Create internal sales SOPs

Document processes for lead generation and appointment setting

Help organize sales workflows and CRM procedures

Identify improvements to increase conversion rates



Required Skills:

Fluent spoken English & Excellent written English

Strong communication and persuasion skills

Confident making high-volume outbound calls

Ability to speak with business owners and/or decision makers

Strong organizational skills

Detail-oriented and process-driven

Comfortable working independently

Experience with sales



Preferred but not required:

Experience in cold calling or telemarketing

Experience in appointment setting

Experience in commercial cleaning or B2B sales

Ideal Candidate - We are looking for someone who is:

Self-motivated and proactive

Comfortable working in a growing and evolving company

Interested in building systems and improving processes

Professional and reliable

Persistent but respectful when prospecting



If you are interesting in the position, don't apply without including a brief introduction video of you and your experience including your CV.

No applications will be considered without the video and CV.

title: Social Media Content + Creative VA
description:
We are a US-based marketing agency that works with luxury brands, and we are looking for a Social Media Content + Creative Virtual Assistant to join our growing team.



This role focuses on creating and managing social media content, including graphics, short-form videos, and AI-assisted creative assets. You will work closely with our marketing team to help maintain and grow our clients’ social media presence through high-quality visual content and consistent engagement.



Responsibilities



Social Media Management:

• Schedule and publish posts across social media platforms (Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.)

• Monitor and respond to comments and direct messages

• Ensure posts follow the content calendar and brand guidelines



Creative Content Production:

• Design and edit graphics for social media posts and paid ads

• Edit short-form videos for Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Optimize visuals for different social media platforms



AI-Assisted Content Creation:

• Use AI tools to generate images and short videos

• Edit and refine AI-generated visuals to ensure brand quality

• Write prompts and experiment with AI tools to create creative assets



Image and Video Editing:

• Edit and enhance photos for social media and marketing campaigns

• Produce short promotional clips and looping videos

• Ensure visual consistency across all client accounts



Content Support:

• Assist with preparing content for social media campaigns

• Organize creative assets and maintain content libraries

• Support the marketing team with visual content needs



Tools You Will Use



• Canva

• CapCut

• Adobe Express

• Adobe Photoshop

• Adobe Premiere Rush

• AI image and video generation tools



Requirements



• Experience managing social media accounts for brands or businesses

• Strong graphic design and visual editing skills

• Experience editing short-form social media videos

• Familiarity with AI tools and prompting for content creation

• Proficiency in tools such as Canva, CapCut, Photoshop, Adobe Express, or Premiere Rush

• Strong attention to detail and visual aesthetics

• Ability to manage multiple social media accounts and deadlines

• Good written communication skills



Nice to Have



• Experience working with marketing agencies

• Understanding of luxury brands and premium aesthetics

• Familiarity with social media scheduling tools

• Basic understanding of social media trends and platform algorithms



Work Setup



• Remote position

• Must be available during US working hours

• Work with an international marketing team



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:

• Your portfolio or samples of social media graphics and videos you have created

• Links to social media accounts you have previously managed

• A list of the design or editing tools you are most experienced with (Canva, CapCut, Photoshop, etc.)



To confirm that you have read the full job description, please start your application with the phrase:



Creative VA – Ready to Create



Applications that do not include this phrase may not be reviewed.

Please do not send generic applications. We review every application carefully.

title: CPA Bookkeeper (Onsite - BGC, Taguig)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and experienced CPA Bookkeeper to join our growing team.



This is a full-time onsite position based in BGC, Taguig. Applicants must be willing to work from the office during Philippine business hours.



In this role, you will manage the company’s financial operations including payroll, invoicing, and financial reporting, while ensuring compliance with local regulations.



We’re looking for someone who is detail-oriented, highly organized, and trustworthy, with strong experience in bookkeeping and payroll.



Must Have:

-Certified Public Accountant (CPA) license

-Minimum of 5 years experience in bookkeeping or accounting

-Experience handling payroll processing

-Experience managing invoices and financial documentation

-Strong understanding of financial reporting and compliance

-Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

-High level of integrity and reliability

-Ability to work on-site in BGC, Taguig



Responsibilities:

-Manage the company’s payroll processing

-Handle invoicing and billing records

-Prepare and organize financial reports

-Ensure compliance with local financial and tax regulations

-Maintain accurate financial records and documentation

-Support the company in managing the financial side of operations

-Coordinate with management regarding financial updates and reporting



Plus to Have

-Experience working with international companies

-Familiarity with accounting and payroll software

-Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

-Experience setting up or managing financial processes for growing businesses

description:

title: Apple Motions Graphics Artist
description:
Responsibilities



Design and build Apple Motion templates (.motn, .moti, .moef, .motg) ready for Final Cut Pro

Publish editable parameters (text, colors, logos) so editors can customize without touching Motion

Deliver organized template libraries with clear naming conventions

Maintain consistent on-brand typography, color palette, and motion style across all assets

Revise templates based on editor feedback with quick turnaround

Optimize assets for smooth playback on Apple Silicon Macs

Provide brief usage notes or a short Loom walkthrough for each template batch





Requirements



3+ years of professional experience with Apple Motion 5.x

Deep familiarity with Final Cut Pro and how Motion templates integrate into the FCP browser

Strong command of Motion's publish parameters, rigs, and behaviors

Experience with kinetic typography, particle effects, and replicators

A strong eye for sports broadcast design — you understand pace, energy, and on-screen hierarchy

Ability to match and extend an existing brand style guide

Reliable Mac setup running a current version of macOS

Ability to meet deadlines (e.g. same-week turnaround for game-day templates)

Portfolio or reel showing Apple Motion and FCP template work — required with application

title: Looking for editor For Rap Documentary Channel
description:
Hi, we're looking for an editor to edit crime related videos that are around 20 - 30 minutes long.



For these videos its very important that you are able to find 'hard to find' images and clips that are related to the topic or the case of the video.



Example channel:







Important:

Its extremely important you understand the video style and are able to find clips and images. Do not apply if you are not good with this.



Payment per video: $0.85/minute

Average video length: 20 - 30m ($25/video)



Looking for someone to edit 3+ videos per week depending on what you can handle.

title: Amazon Marketing Expert
description:
Job Summary:

We are hiring an Amazon Marketing Expert to take full ownership of our Amazon store's growth strategy. This is not a basic ads management role — we are looking for someone who can lead listing optimization, keyword strategy, and paid advertising to deliver real, measurable revenue results. If you have a strong Amazon background and a data-driven mindset, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

- Plan, launch, and optimize Amazon PPC campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display)

- Build campaign structures from Auto to Manual to Scaling phases

- Manage bids, budgets, and keyword targeting to hit ACoS, TACoS, and ROAS targets

- Lead listing strategy including titles, bullet points, descriptions, and A+ Content

- Define product positioning and USP, and direct designers on high-converting visuals

- Conduct keyword research to identify high-ranking opportunities and improve organic visibility

- Align PPC and SEO strategies for maximum impact

- Analyze performance data (CTR, CVR, ACoS, TACoS, revenue) and identify growth opportunities

- Plan and execute product launch strategies for new products

- Deliver weekly performance reports with actionable insights and next steps

- Coordinate with the operations team on inventory, pricing, and promotional activities



Mandatory Skills:

- Proven experience managing Amazon PPC with measurable, results-oriented outcomes

- Deep understanding of the Amazon algorithm, ranking factors, and conversion optimization

- Experience optimizing listings including titles, bullets, A+ Content, and image direction

- Proficiency in Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar Amazon tools

- Strong analytical skills with the ability to turn data into clear strategies

- Comfortable taking ownership and working independently without constant supervision

- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal

- Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented with strong time management



Preferred Skills:

- Experience managing multiple products or brands at the same time

- Track record of scaling Amazon products to significant revenue levels

- Hands-on experience with Amazon product launches

- Knowledge of external traffic strategies such as TikTok Ads or influencer campaigns

- Experience collaborating with design and operations teams



Why Join Us:

This role gives you real ownership over Amazon marketing strategy — not just execution. You will work alongside a dedicated operations and design team so you can focus entirely on growth. If you are ready to step into a high-impact position where your work directly drives revenue, this is the right opportunity for you.

title: Real Estate Lead Manager (Cold Calling + Follow-Up)
description:
We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company looking for a long-term Lead Manager to handle seller communication, follow-up, and appointment setting.



This role is critical to our business. You will be the first point of contact with motivated sellers and responsible for qualifying leads and setting appointments.



Responsibilities:

- Call and follow up with motivated seller leads (inbound and outbound)

- Build rapport and gather key information (condition, timeline, motivation, price)

- Qualify leads and update CRM daily (REsimpli or similar)

- Send and respond to SMS messages

- Set appointments for acquisitions manager

- Maintain consistent follow-up with leads



Requirements:

- Experience working with U.S. real estate investors (wholesaling preferred)

- Strong cold calling and communication skills

- Fluent English with clear speaking voice

- Experience with CRM systems (Podio, REsimpli, GoHighLevel, etc.)

- Reliable internet and quiet work environment



Preferred:

- Experience qualifying motivated sellers

- SMS follow-up experience



Compensation:

- $600–$1,000/month depending on experience

- Performance bonuses available

- Long-term opportunity with growth



Schedule:

- Full-time (40 hours/week)

- U.S. business hours (EST)



IMPORTANT – To apply:

1. Include a short voice recording introducing yourself

2. Answer:

   - What real estate experience do you have?

   - How do you qualify a motivated seller?

   - What CRM systems have you used?

3. Include the word “BLUE” in your application



We are looking for someone reliable, consistent, and long-term.

title: Cold Caller, B2B, Architects and Design Firms,
description:
**About Us**

We are a U.S.-based engineering firm working with architects, builders, and developers and General Contractors. We are growing and looking for a reliable caller to help us build new relationships.



**Job Overview**

We are hiring a full-time cold caller to contact architecture firms and introduce our company.



Your role is NOT to sell or close deals.



Your job is to:



* Start conversations

* Identify the right contact

* Create interest

* Pass warm leads to our Business Development Manager



**Daily Responsibilities**



1. Make 100 plus outbound calls per day

2. Speak with architects (or other specified prospect) and office staff

3. Deliver a short introduction script

4. Identify decision makers

5. Collect name,
, and notes

6. Log all activity in our CRM Apptivo

7. Pass interested leads to our BDM (Business Development Manager)



**What Success Looks Like**



* You consistently generate interested contacts

* You collect accurate information

* You stay organized and reliable

* You communicate clearly and professionally



**Requirements**



1. Strong spoken English

2. Confident and friendly on the phone

3. Comfortable with high call volume

4. Reliable internet and quiet workspace

5. Experience in cold calling, appointment setting, or lead generation preferred



**Work Schedule**

U.S. business hours, Central Time preferred



**Pay**

$5 to $8 per hour depending on experience

Plus bonus for qualified leads passed to our team

$5 per qualified lead





**How to Apply**

Please include:



1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

2. Your experience with cold calling or outbound sales

3. Your internet speed and headset setup



**IMPORTANT**

To be considered, start your application with the word: **ENGINEERING**

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (High-Velocity Implementation)
description:
Job Description

We are looking for a top-tier, proactive Developer from the Philippines who doesn't just write code but helps build a product. We need a "builder" with an "outside-the-box" mindset who can suggest better ways to do things and solve complex problems at lightning speed.



Key Responsibilities:

Rapid Execution: Implement changes and new features quickly and efficiently.

Proactive Innovation: Don't just follow instructions—suggest improvements, identify potential issues, and offer creative solutions to enhance the platform.

Rapid Problem Solving: Troubleshoot and fix bugs with a high sense of urgency and minimal guidance.

Full Ownership: Take a product-oriented approach to development, ensuring the best user experience.



Technical Requirements:

Core Stack: Expert-level Node.js, TypeScript, and Next.js.

Ecosystem: Deep experience with Clerk (Auth) and Vercel (Deployment/Edge).

Frontend: Mastery of Tailwind CSS and modern React patterns.

Database: Experience with PostgreSQL / Prisma / Supabase or similar.



Who You Are:

Innovative Thinker: You have an "outside-the-box" approach to technical challenges.

Fast Learner & Doer: You thrive in a high-velocity environment and love moving fast.

Product-Minded: You understand the "why" behind the code and offer ideas to make the product better.

Proven Experience: 5+ years in professional web development with a strong portfolio.

Communication: Excellent English (written/verbal) for brainstorming and daily updates.



PLEASE ANSWER

Describe a time when you suggested a technical or product improvement that wasn't in the original requirements. What was the impact?

title: Amazon Listings Virtual Assistant
description:
Job Summary:

We are hiring an Amazon Listings Virtual Assistant to support our e-commerce team with product listing creation, uploads, and catalogue maintenance across multiple Amazon marketplaces. This role requires someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, and confident working inside Amazon Seller Central. You will be a key part of ensuring our product catalogue is accurate, compliant, and up to date at all times.



Key Responsibilities:

- Create and upload new product listings across Amazon marketplaces as directed by the internal team

- Manage parent/child variation structures, product attributes, and listing data

- Enter product details including titles, bullet points, descriptions, sizes, HS codes, and images

- Upload pricing, inventory, and attribute updates via flat files, StoreFeeder, and Seller Central

- Ensure content is correctly formatted and consistent across all marketplaces

- Update image sets, A+ content, and brand store elements when provided by the creative team

- Run scheduled accuracy checks to ensure all listing content is correct and current

- Monitor listings for suppressions, variation breaks, mismatched attributes, image removals, and compliance issues

- Flag and escalate listing problems to the team and assist in resolving them

- Upload compliance documents and maintain high data quality standards

- Communicate clearly via
, Slack, WhatsApp, and 

- Follow internal SOPs, workflows, and instructions from the Listing Supervisor



Mandatory Skills:

- Demonstrated experience as a VA or in an Amazon catalogue/listing support role

- Strong knowledge of Amazon Seller Central listing processes and flat-file uploads

- Familiarity with parent/child variations, product attributes, and catalogue structures

- Strong Excel and/or Google Sheets skills

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

- Sharp attention to detail and strong commitment to accuracy

- Able to work independently, follow processes, and deliver on time

- Reliable, detail-oriented, and able to work independently with minimal supervision

- Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate effectively



Preferred Skills:

- Experience across multiple Amazon marketplaces including UK, EU, US, Canada, or UAE

- Familiarity with StoreFeeder or other multi-channel listing tools

- Experience updating A+ content or Amazon brand store pages

- Understanding of Amazon suppression issues and how to resolve them

- Experience using 
 or similar project management platforms

- Background in fashion, apparel, or consumer goods e-commerce



Why Join Us:

This is a stable, long-term role with a well-established e-commerce team that values clarity, structure, and quality. You will receive thorough onboarding and training on our tools and workflows, with clear expectations from day one. If you enjoy working in a detail-driven, organised environment and want consistent, meaningful work, we would love to hear from you.

title: Tax and Billing Specialist
description:
Job Description:

JWe are seeking a detail-oriented and organized Tax and Billing Specialist to manage sales tax compliance, billing verification, and tax-related processes. This role is responsible for ensuring accurate tax filings, invoice processing, and maintaining compliance with US and international tax regulations.

Job Type: Full Time (40 hours)  - Remote

Schedule: 9AM - 6PM EST

Responsibilities:

Tax Compliance & Reporting

Prepare and submit sales data for US sales tax and international GST/VAT compliance.

Verify US sales taxes and international GST/VAT calculations to ensure accuracy.

Handle in-house tax filings for US entities in a timely and compliant manner.

Serve as the primary liaison for tax-related concerns, inquiries, and issues.

Compile tax returns and maintain organized, up-to-date tax records.

Billing & Invoice Verification

Review, verify, and process warehouse invoices for accuracy and completeness.

Review, verify, and process freight invoices in alignment with company records.

Verify and process customs and broker invoices, ensuring proper documentation and compliance.

Ensure all invoices are accurately recorded and processed within deadlines.



Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

Proven experience in tax compliance, billing, or accounts payable.

Knowledge of US sales tax and international GST/VAT regulations.

Strong attention to detail and organizational skills.

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines.

Excellent communication skills for handling tax-related concerns.

title: Lead Generation Specialist – Short-Term Rental / Lease Arbitrage
description:
**Send your CV and an introduction video to be entertained for this role.**



**Job Title:** Lead Generation Specialist – Short-Term Rental / Lease Arbitrage



**Job Overview:**

We are looking for a highly resourceful and proactive Lead Generation Specialist to support our growing business in the short-term rental space. This role goes beyond typical cold outreach. We need someone who can identify real opportunities, find the right people at the right time, and help build a strong pipeline of potential lease arbitrage clients and viable rental property deals for short-term rental use.



**Key Responsibilities:**



* Source and identify individuals who are actively looking to get into lease arbitrage

* Find rental property opportunities that may be suitable for short-term rental use

* Research landlords, property owners, and market opportunities aligned with our acquisition criteria

* Generate high-quality leads through online research, platforms, communities, listings, and other creative sourcing methods

* Qualify leads based on relevance, intent, and business fit

* Maintain accurate lead data and organize prospects in spreadsheets or CRM systems

* Coordinate with the team to ensure leads and opportunities are properly tracked and followed up

* Continuously look for smarter and more targeted ways to source quality opportunities



**Qualifications:**



* Proven experience in lead generation, prospecting, or market research

* Strong understanding of short-term rentals, real estate, or lease arbitrage is preferred

* Ability to identify and qualify high-intent prospects, not just build large contact lists

* Excellent research and communication skills

* Highly organized with strong attention to detail

* Self-starter who can work independently and produce results

* Experience using lead sourcing tools, property platforms, social platforms, and spreadsheets/CRM tools is a plus



**What We’re Looking For:**



* Someone who understands that this is not just generic outreach

* A person with good judgment who can spot real business opportunities

* Someone who can help us connect with the right people and uncover deals that make sense for the short-term rental market



**Application Requirement:**

Please send your CV and a short introduction video explaining your experience in lead generation, real estate, short-term rentals, or lease arbitrage, and why you are a good fit for this role.

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Remote Sales Development Representative

Kelly Agency: Allstate – Pottstown, PA



Our challenge:

The Kelly Agency, a leading Allstate Insurance Agency, is looking for a dynamic Remote Sales Development

Representative to join our Outside Sales Team. Earn a 240 PHP base wage plus daily and monthly bonuses, with

top performers averaging 10,000+ PHP/month in bonuses.



Who we are:

At the Kelly Agency, we are driven by passion and teamwork, committed to building strong personal

relationships. As one of Pennsylvania’s largest remote-friendly Allstate Agencies, we rank in the top 10%

nationwide for new business growth and customer satisfaction. Our team thrives on shared incentives and

continuous improvement, all while maintaining a healthy work-life balance. Embracing cutting-edge technology,

we utilize digital tools such as social media, texting, video, online quoting, and lead management software to

enhance our operations.

We take immense pride in our customer experience, safeguarding what matters most to our clients and their

families. Our core values are: putting customers first, staying positive, being honest, embracing growth, and

working together.



Follow us on Social 

Visit our Website: 



The job description:

Insurance is essential, yet often confusing. As a Sales Development Representative, you'll provide a friendly,

reliable, and informative experience to prospective customers, by connecting with them on the phone and

introducing them to our licensed agents for quoting. This entry-level position offers a career path within our

agency, with opportunities for growth and advancement.



The traits we are looking for:

- Passion for helping people protect their assets and gain peace of mind.

- Highly motivated with a hunter’s mentality.

- Skilled at handling objections while prioritizing customer interests.

- Strong computer skills and the ability to multitask across various programs.

- Drive to win and a willingness to follow our proven success system.



The core job requirements:

- Must have ability to work from home. This includes: a quiet working space, computer, monitor, headset, mouse.

- Make 475+ calls daily to provide warm leads to our licensed agents.

- Pre-qualify insurance prospects for insurability and quality of risk.

- Transfer a minimum of 8 qualified leads to our Outside Sales Team daily.

- Collect and maintain accurate data in the CRM system, including contact information, market data, and

qualifiers.

- Participate in daily meetings to ensure team alignment.



Some benefits we provide:

- Work from home

- 13th Month Bonus

- Paid time off after 180 days

- Health Insurance



Join us at the Kelly Agency and be a part of a forward-thinking, tech-driven team dedicated to customer

excellence and personal growth.

title: AI Video Editor (Full-Time)
description:
IMPORTANT: If you don't have portfolio or AI models experience, please don't apply, this is not for you. 



We're looking for a creative, fast, and AI-savvy Video Editor who lives and breathes the latest generative AI video tools. You won't just be cutting clips — you'll be generating footage, creating AI avatars, producing motion content from text prompts, and pushing the boundaries of what's possible with AI-powered video production.



If you've already been experimenting with tools like HeyGen, Higgsfield, SeedDance, and Sora — and have a portfolio to prove it, we want to hear from you. 



What You'll Do



- Produce polished video content using a combination of traditional editing and AI-powered generation tools

- Generate video clips, scenes, and motion sequences using AI models (SeedDance, Sora, Kling, Runway, Veo, etc.)

- Create and manage AI avatars and talking-head videos using HeyGen

- Produce AI-generated motion and character animation using Higgsfield and similar platforms

- Edit and composite AI-generated footage into cohesive, professional final cuts

- Stay on top of the rapidly evolving AI video landscape — test new tools, suggest better workflows, and bring fresh ideas

- Use AI for scripting, storyboarding, and content strategy

- Manage your own pipeline and deliver on time with minimal supervision



Requirements (Must-Have)



1. Proven AI video experience — you must demonstrate hands-on work with at least 3 of the following tools:

HeyGen (AI avatars / talking heads)

Higgsfield (AI motion / character animation)

SeedDance (dance/motion generation)

Sora (OpenAI's video model)

Kling, Runway, Veo, Pika, or similar generative video platforms



2. Portfolio required — share a reel, Google Drive folder, or website showing AI-generated or AI-assisted video work. 

Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



3. Strong proficiency in video editing software (Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve)



4. Understanding of prompt engineering for video models



5. Eye for composition, pacing, color, and storytelling



6. Ability to work independently and meet daily/weekly deadlines



7. Reliable internet connection and a capable workstation



8. Strong English communication skills (written)



How to Apply: Send us the following:



1. Your portfolio — link to AI video work (Google Drive, Behance, YouTube, personal site, etc.)

2. List of AI tools you have hands-on experience with

3. A short intro (3–5 sentences) telling us why you're the right fit

4. Your expected monthly rate (in USD) - (This is full time job. You will work 8 hours a day for 6 days a week) 



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor for E-commerce Beauty Brand – Full Time
description:
We’re a fast-growing e-commerce beauty brand, scaling quickly through Meta Ads. With demand increasing and our creative volume growing every week, we’re now looking for a full-time Video Editor who specializes in UGC-style and direct-response ads for Meta.



We’re looking for someone who:

- Has edited for eCommerce brands before

- Understands UGC and scroll-stopping hooks

- Cares about performance, not just aesthetics

- Communicates clearly, meets deadlines, takes feedback well

- Wants a long-term role, not freelance hopping



What You Get

• Stable workload and long-term

• $10/h + $50 USD bonus for every winning ad

• Weekly creative coaching and performance breakdowns

• 44 hours/week



More About Our Team

Right now we are 3 creative strategists, 2 video editors, and 1 graphic designer. Each creative strategist works with 1 editor. So we need 1 more editor to join our team.

We have our creative system setup easily in Notion to follow.

We do 2 weekly calls where we go through learnings and ideation ideas.

If you have more questions, let me know in our meeting



Process

I (owner) will personally go through all applications and setup a call with the ones I think will be a good fit. After the calls I'll choose the one I think will fit us the best. This whole process will take 3 days.



How to Apply

1. Send 3 video ads you’ve edited (UGC/product style) (not just a portfolio dump – show me your top weapons)

2. Write 3-5 sentences about why this job fits you

3. Use subject line: LET'S GET WINNING ADS



If you’re reliable, ambitious, and ready to grow – we’d love to see what you can do.



Apply now and let’s build something big together.

title: Influencer Marketing Campaign Manager (full-time)
description:
We're hiring an experienced Influencer Marketing Campaign Manager who can own the entire influencer marketing process from start to finish — sourcing creators, pitching them, negotiating deals, managing deliverables, and reporting on results. This is not an assistant role. You'll be running campaigns independently and making strategic decisions daily.



If you've managed real influencer campaigns, have the receipts to prove it, and know how to stretch a budget while landing quality creators — keep reading.



What You'll Do



Research & Source Creators — Identify and vet influencers across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and other platforms that align with brand goals, audience, and budget

Outreach & Pitching — Craft personalized outreach messages, manage conversations across DMs,
, and talent manager communications

Negotiate Deals — Handle rate negotiations, usage rights, exclusivity terms, deliverable specs, and timelines with creators and/or their management

Campaign Management — Build and manage campaign timelines, creative briefs, content calendars, and approval workflows from kickoff to wrap

Relationship Building — Maintain an organized database of creator contacts, rates, and past performance; nurture long-term partnerships with top-performing creators

Content Review & QA — Review creator drafts for brand alignment, messaging accuracy, and quality standards before publishing

Tracking & Reporting — Monitor campaign performance (reach, engagement, conversions, ROI), compile post-campaign reports, and recommend optimizations

Stay Current — Keep up with platform algorithm changes, trending creators, emerging platforms, and industry benchmarks



Requirements: Must-Have



1. Proven influencer marketing experience — you've managed campaigns end-to-end, not just assisted. You know the full A-to-Z workflow.



2. Portfolio required — share case studies, campaign summaries, screenshots, or any documentation showing campaigns you've managed, creators you've worked with, and results achieved. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



3. Demonstrated experience sourcing and vetting influencers across Instagram, TikTok, and/or YouTube



4. Hands-on experience with creator outreach, negotiation, and contract/deal structuring



5. Familiarity with influencer marketing platforms and tools (e.g., Grin, Aspire, CreatorIQ, Upfluence, Modash, or similar)



6. Strong written English — your outreach messages represent the brand



7. Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple campaigns and creator relationships simultaneously



8. Comfortable working with spreadsheets, CRMs, or project management tools to track pipelines and performance



9. Write 999 in subject while applying. 



How to Apply: Send us the following:



1. Your portfolio — case studies, campaign screenshots, performance reports, or a deck showcasing influencer campaigns you've managed (Google Drive, Notion, PDF, personal site, etc.)



2. A brief summary of the types of brands/industries you've managed influencer campaigns for



3. List of tools/platforms you've used for influencer sourcing and campaign management



4. Your expected monthly rate (in USD)



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We're looking for someone who doesn't just "post and pray" — we want a strategic operator who knows how to find the right creators, close the right deals, and deliver real results. If that's you, let's talk.

title: Direct Response Video Editor (German-Speaking) - Remote
description:
About the Role:

We're one of the fastest-growing direct-to-consumer supplement brands in the DACH market, with over 30,000 active customers and millions in revenue. We're scaling our creative team and looking for a high-caliber video editor to own our Meta ad output.



This is not an agency gig. You'll go deep on one brand, see the direct impact of your work on revenue, and have a clear path to leading the creative function.



Responsibilities:

- Edit 15-25+ direct response ad variations per week across hooks, bodies, and CTAs

- Work with UGC footage, AI-generated voiceovers, and animated content

- Integrate AI tools into daily editing workflows (voiceover generation, animated ads, AI-assisted editing)

- Tailor pacing and creative approach to diverse audience segments

- Partner with creative strategists and copywriters to execute high-performing scripts

- Review ad performance metrics and iterate rapidly on winning concepts



Qualifications:

- Demonstrated track record editing direct response video ads

- Native or fluent German proficiency (DACH market focus)

- Hands-on experience with AI-powered creative tools, or a strong drive to adopt them

- Data-oriented mindset - you understand ROAS, CTR, and what makes ads convert

- Ambition to grow into a Lead Editor or Creative Lead role



What We Offer:

- Full-time remote position with flexible working hours

- Competitive compensation with performance-based bonuses

- Leadership track - grow into Lead Editor / Creative Lead within 6-12 months

- Direct collaboration with the founder

- Focused, fast-moving team that ships daily



How to Apply:

- Along with your application, please include a short Loom video (3-5 minutes) where you walk through 2-3 direct response ads you've edited. Show us the work, explain the strategy behind it, and highlight what drove results. Experience with AI voiceover or AI-generated video is a strong plus.

title: Assistant Property Manager for After Hour Calls
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



EJF is a property management company headquartered in Washington, DC. We are looking for an Assistant Property Managers for After-Hours Call for our growing team. A successful candidate will enjoy solving problems, is responsible, organized, detail oriented, and reliable.



Position Overview:

EJF Property Management is seeking experienced After-Hours Assistant Property Managers to support our growing portfolio of community associations during non-business hours (Eastern Standard Time). This role is critical in ensuring continuity of service, handling urgent matters, and maintaining high levels of responsiveness for board members, homeowners, and vendors outside of standard business hours.



The ideal candidate is proactive, highly organized, detail-oriented, and thrives in a fast-paced environment while working independently. Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to manage urgent situations with professionalism are essential.



Schedule:  2 am - 10 pm (EST) | 2 pm to 10 pm (PHT)



Key Responsibilities:

After-Hours Operations & Support:

- Serve as the primary after-hours point of contact for homeowners, board members, and vendors

- Monitor and respond to incoming calls,
s, and system alerts, ensuring timely and professional communication

- Triage and prioritize requests, distinguishing between routine inquiries and urgent/emergency issues.



Maintenance & Emergency Coordination:

- Dispatch and coordinate emergency maintenance requests (e.g., plumbing leaks, electrical issues, safety concerns)

- Communicate with on-call vendors and ensure timely response and resolution

- Document all i
 and actions taken for next-day team follow-up



Work Order & System Management:

- Create, update, and track after-hours work orders in property management systems (e.g., Vantaca, CINC)

- Ensure all after-hours activities are accurately logged and communicated to daytime teams



Client & Resident Support:

- Provide prompt assistance to homeowners regarding urgent concerns or service needs

- Maintain professionalism and empathy when handling escalations or sensitive situations



Administrative & Documentation Support:

- Maintain accurate and organized digital records of after-hours activities

- Prepare detailed shift reports summarizing key issues, actions taken, and pending follow-ups

- Assist with documentation requests as needed during after-hours coverage



Financial & Compliance Support (Limited After-Hours Scope):

- Flag urgent billing or vendor-related issues requiring immediate attention

- Support basic invoice or contract inquiries when necessary



Other Duties

- Perform additional responsibilities as assigned to support business continuity



Qualifications:

- Required: Experience in property management, real estate, or community association management

- Minimum 1 year experience in HOA and/or condominium management

- At least 2 years of remote work experience, with proven ability to work independently

- Experience handling after-hours support, emergency coordination, or on-call operations is highly preferred

- Familiarity with property management platforms such as Vantaca or CINC (strong plus)

- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, Excel, Teams, etc.)



Benefits: HMO and PTO after 90 days.



How to apply:

1. Please check out the company website before submitting an application: 
.

2. Send an
 attachment with your updated resume in PDF format.

3. Please indicate that you're comfortable to start with $6 USD per hour.

4. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description, and include your OnlineJobs.PH profile link.



Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Assistant Property Manager for After Hour Calls - your name.



*Applicants who will apply through onlinejobs.ph will not be considered.

*Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.

Looking forward to working with you!

title: Program Manager, Student Succes
description:
We are seeking a Student Success Manager to support students throughout their journey in our programs. This person will manage day-to-day student communication, respond clearly and professionally to
s, check in with students regularly, and help ensure a smooth and supportive experience from onboarding through completion.



This role is part-time, with potential for full-time. 



The ideal candidate is friendly, organized, and learns quickly. They should be an excellent
 communicator, comfortable following clear processes, and able to help create or improve processes when needed. They should also have strong program management skills, with the ability to keep students on track, manage multiple moving pieces, and provide consistent, thoughtful support.



This role is ideal for someone who is warm and student-focused, but also highly dependable, detail-oriented, and execution-driven.

title: Real Estate Video Editor (Part-Time | Remote VA)
description:
Schedule: Flexible (consistent weekly workload)

 Hours: Minimum 15 hours per week (guaranteed)

 Location: Remote



We are looking for a high-level video editor to join our growing real estate media team. This is a long-term VA role for someone who is fast, creative, and wants to be part of a team - not just complete tasks.

Our goal is simple: produce the best real estate videos in our market. We are looking for someone who can help us get there.



What You’ll Do

Edit real estate listing videos with fast turnaround times

Standard videos should take approximately 1-1.5 hours to complete

Edit premium and more advanced videos (longer turnaround expected)

Add transitions, music, and pacing that elevate the final product

Collaborate with the team and contribute creative input

Continuously improve video quality and style



Tools & Software Experience Needed

Adobe Premiere Pro (preferred)

CapCut or DaVinci Resolve

Experience using AI tools (Higgsfield.AI or similar) for transitions and enhancements



Compensation

$8-$9 per hour based on experience

Minimum 15 hours/week guaranteed (opportunity for more as we grow)

Paid every other week (bi-weekly schedule)



What We’re Looking For

Strong experience in video editing (real estate experience is a plus)

Excellent written and spoken English

Ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality

Strong time management and reliability

Creative thinker who brings ideas and suggestions, not just execution

Team-oriented mindset with a desire to contribute



This Role Is NOT For You If:

You only want to complete assigned tasks without input

You struggle with deadlines or turnaround times

You are not comfortable communicating ideas or feedback

You are not interested in growing with a team



Why This Role Is Different

We are not just hiring an editor - we are looking for a key creative partner.

We want someone who:

Stays on top of trends

Experiments with new ideas

Helps us innovate, not just follow

This is a chance to have a real impact on a growing company and be part of building something better.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

Guaranteed weekly hours

Long-term opportunity with room for growth

Creative freedom and input valued

Supportive, team-first environment

Opportunity to sharpen high-demand video skills



How to Apply

If you are fast, creative, and want to be part of a team that is serious about producing top-tier video content, we want to hear from you.

To apply, please submit:

Your resume

A short 1-minute introduction video

Samples of your previous video editing work (if available)

Apply today and show us what you can do.

title: Full Time Dispatcher
description:
About the Role



We are seeking a highly motivated and experienced Dispatcher with a positive attitude and excellent communication skills. The ideal candidate will have expertise in load negotiation, scheduling, and route planning, while adhering to DOT and ELD regulations.



Vehicles Being Dispatched



26-Foot Box Trucks (10,000 lb weight capacity) – Dock-high with lift gate

Sprinter Vans / Cargo Vans / Ram ProMaster (High Roof)



About Us



Eveready Express is a well-established leader in the trucking, courier, logistics, and distribution industries, founded in 1984. We pride ourselves on honesty, integrity, and mutual respect.



Key Responsibilities

Dispatching Vehicles



Negotiate rates with drivers while aiming for a minimum 40% margin, and assign vehicles to specific routes and deliveries based on customer orders, schedules, and driver availability.



Communication with Drivers



Maintain constant communication with drivers by providing instructions, updates, and support throughout their routes.



Routing and Scheduling



Plan efficient routes to minimize travel time, fuel costs, and vehicle wear. Adjust schedules as needed to accommodate changes or unexpected events.



Tracking Shipments



Monitor shipments in real time using tracking systems and GPS technology. Address delays or issues as they arise.



Customer Interaction



Serve as the primary point of contact for customers after dispatch, providing delivery updates, addressing inquiries, and resolving concerns or complaints promptly.



Documentation



Maintain accurate records of trucking activities, including driver logs, delivery schedules, and customer communications. Ensure compliance with company policies and regulations (e.g., BOL, POD).



Problem-Solving



Resolve logistical problems or emergencies such as vehicle breakdowns, traffic delays, or adverse weather conditions.



Safety Compliance



Ensure trucks and drivers comply with safety regulations and company policies. Regularly verify driver credentials, vehicle maintenance, and adherence to transportation laws in collaboration with HR.



Team Collaboration



Work closely with Customer Service, Fleet Drivers, Billing, Sales, HR, and Warehouse staff to coordinate operations and improve efficiency.



Continuous Improvement



Identify and suggest improvements to dispatching processes, customer satisfaction, and operational efficiency. Offer feedback and innovative solutions to the management team.



Working on Load Boards



Bid on Sylectus, DAT, Amazon Relay, and other broker platforms during the off-peak season.



Qualifications



• At least 2 years of experience in the U.S. logistics industry, with proven experience in dispatching, logistics coordination, or transportation management.



• Strong verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to effectively interact with drivers, customers, and tea
mbers.



• Excellent organizational and multitasking skills, with strong attention to detail and the ability to prioritize tasks in a fast-paced environment.



• Proficiency in dispatching software, GPS systems, and other relevant technology tools.



• Knowledge of transportation regulations, safety procedures, and industry best practices.



• Ability to remain calm under pressure, with a problem-solving mindset and flexibility to adapt to changing circumstances.



• Availability to work irregular hours, including evenings, weekends, and holidays, to ensure 24/7 coverage.



Hardware & Technical Requirements



• Processor: 2.0 GHz or higher (Intel Core i5/i7 preferred)

• RAM: Minimum 8 GB

• Disk Space: 100 GB of free space

• A second monitor for multitasking

• Backup computer

• Noise-canceling headset

• Internet: Minimum 10 Mbps wired connection for both primary and backup ISPs

• USB sticks are not allowed for backup ISP connections



Perks of the Job



• Competitive weekly salary

• Opportunity to receive HMO benefits

• Opportunities for advancement within the company



To Apply



Please send an
 with the subject line:



“I want to dispatch for Eveready”



to 



Your
 must include:



• A voice recording (via Speakpipe or Vocaroo) explaining why you are a good fit for the role

• A PDF copy of your resume

• A photo of your workstation

• A screenshot of your internet speed test from speedtest.net



Please follow all instructions above. Only applicants who demonstrate genuine interest in the role will be considered.



If selected, you will be invited to a brief
 or Google Meet interview, which will require a video call.



Equal Opportunity Employer



Eveready Express is an Equal Opportunity Employer and does not discriminate based on race, religion, color, disability, medical condition, genetic information, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, marital status, gender identity or expression, sex (including pregnancy), age, veteran status, or other legally protected characteristics.



We are committed to fostering a culture of diversity, equity, and inclusion.



Note



Eveready Express reserves the right to modify job duties and assignments at any time. The job description provided is not all-encompassing and may change depending on business needs.

title: YouTube Video Maker
description:
We have an AI tool to assist in making YouTube videos. 



You'll be using this tool to make videos, however the tool needs inputs (such as a proper script and video structure).

We are looking for someone who has experience with YouTube and can confidently make these outlines, operate the tool, and carefully checks the output.



The reviewing is a big part of the role aswell, checking to make sure the video looks good, and making revisions if necessary.

Price per video made: $5

You'd be doing atleast 1 - 2 videos per day (more depending on what you can handle).

title: Customer Service Agent (Phone-Based Remote)
description:
UK Gym Equipment E-Commerce Business



Gymsets UK is a fast-growing gym equipment e-commerce company supplying premium home and commercial fitness products across the United Kingdom.



We are looking for a Customer Service Agent based in the Philippines to join our team and support customers primarily via phone calls, with some
 and live chat support when required.



This is a long-term, fully remote role suited to someone confident speaking with customers and comfortable working UK hours.



Key Responsibilities



Handle inbound and outbound customer calls in a professional and friendly manner.

Provide clear and confident support for product enquiries, order status and delivery updates, returns, exchanges, and after-sales support.

Resolve customer issues efficiently while maintaining a positive experience.

Follow up with customers via phone,
, or live chat when needed.

Proactively update customers regarding delays or resolutions.

Log and maintain accurate records of all interactions.

Escalate complex issues to internal teams when required.

Identify recurring issues and suggest improvements.



Requirements



Excellent spoken English is very important. You must be clear, confident, and easy to understand.

Previous phone-based customer service experience is preferred.

You should be comfortable handling a high volume of calls.

Ability to deal with difficult or frustrated customers calmly.

Good written English for follow-up communication.

Reliable internet connection, good-quality headset, and a quiet working environment.

Strong attention to detail and organisation.



Working Hours



You must be available to work UK hours, including evenings in Philippine time.

This is a full-time role, approximately 40 hours per week.



What We Offer



Long-term, stable role with a growing UK company.

Full training, systems, and support provided.

Structured processes and clear expectations.

Performance-based bonus opportunities.



IMPORTANT – APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, you must complete the following:



Send a 30 to 60 second voice or video recording answering this question:

“How would you handle a customer calling to complain about a late delivery?”



Also record yourself saying the following exactly:



“Hi, thank you for contacting Gymsets. My name is [insert name], and I’m part of the customer support team. We specialise in supplying high-quality gym equipment across the UK. I’d be happy to help you with your enquiry today, so please let me know how I can assist you.”



Please say this in a natural, conversational tone as if you are speaking to a real customer.



Applications without a voice recording will not be considered.

title: 3D Motion Graphics Artist & Blender Expert (YouTube Production)
description:
Are you a Blender wizard who can turn a script and a voiceover into a cinematic visual experience? Do you thrive on tight deadlines and have a workflow optimized for speed without sacrificing quality? If so, we want to talk to you.



We are looking for a high-level 3D Render/Blender Expert to join our production pipeline for a fast-growing YouTube channel. We provide the vision; you provide the technical magic.



The Role

You will be responsible for creating full 3D environments and animations for YouTube videos ranging from 10 to 20 minutes in length.



Visual Style: We are looking for a visual aesthetic and storytelling quality similar to the Fern YouTube channel. You should be comfortable creating immersive, atmospheric scenes that help drive a complex narrative.



We Provide: The voiceover (VO), a detailed storyboard/explanation of the scenes, and the creative direction.



You Provide: Scene assembly, lighting, animation, and final rendering within Blender.



The Goal: High-quality, engaging 3D visuals that keep viewers hooked.



Requirements

Blender Mastery: Absolute proficiency in Blender is a must. You should know every shortcut and trick to speed up the rendering process (Eevee vs. Cycles optimization, etc.).



Speed & Reliability: We work on a tight production schedule. You must be able to hit deadlines consistently.



Visual Storytelling: An eye for composition, lighting, and camera movement that complements a narrative.



Communication: Ability to take direction well and iterate quickly based on feedback.



How to Apply

To ensure you have a sharp eye for detail, please start the subject/first line of your application with the keyword: NEBULA. Applications without this keyword will not be considered.



Please include the following in your proposal:



Portfolio: Links to your best 3D animation/render work (YouTube links preferred).



The Quote: Provide a flat-rate quote per video (assuming a 10–20 minute length).



Turnaround Time: How long does it typically take you to complete a project of this scale once you receive the VO and brief?



Tech Specs: Briefly mention your hardware/render farm setup to demonstrate how you handle high-volume output.



Note: We are looking for a long-term collaborator. If you are fast, talented, and reliable, there is a consistent stream of work waiting for you.

title: Inside Sales Demo Representative (Remote - Philippines
description:
Job Description



Primary Focus: Conduct structured live product demonstrations for qualified prospects and support the sales team in converting opportunities into closed deals. This role is focused on demo execution and not outbound prospecting.



Role Classification

Contract position (Remote).

Compensation: $4 to $5 per hour + performance-based bonus per closed deal.



Key Qualifications

1+ year experience in inside sales, SaaS demos, or product presentation

Strong ability to present from PowerPoint confidently

Clear, professional English communication skills

Comfortable screen sharing and navigating software live

Able to follow structured demo scripts

Coachable and receptive to feedback

Reliable internet connection and professional demo setup



Responsibilities



Planning:

Review demo script prior to each presentation

Understand prospect industry and use case before demo

Coordinate with Account Executive regarding opportunity stage



Executing:

Conduct live product demos via Zoom

Follow structured demo flow

Highlight product value aligned to prospect needs

Handle common objections using approved responses

Log demo notes into CRM immediately after session



Optimizing:

Participate in weekly demo review sessions

Improve demo-to-close conversion rate

Track common objections and recommend slide updates



Incentive Compensation:

$X bonus per closed deal originating from completed demo

Additional bonus for exceeding monthly demo-to-close target



**PERMANENT REMOTE (MUST HAVE OWN EQUIPMENT)**

**4-5 USD BASE PAY PER HOUR FIXED + COMMISSIONS (Paid bi-weekly via Payoneer/Paypal)**

**40 HOURS PER WEEK (Weekends Off)**

**PACIFIC STANDARD TIME (Night Shift)**

**MONITASK TIME TRACKER**

title: Staff Accountant (Remote - Philippines)
description:
Title: Staff Accountant



Reports To: Controller



Location: Remote Anywhere in the PHILIPPINES ONLY



Hourly Range: $7.00 - $11.00 (Paid bi-weekly via Payoneer/Paypal)



**PERMANENT REMOTE (MUST HAVE OWN EQUIPMENT)**

**40 HOURS PER WEEK (Weekends Off)**

**PACIFIC STANDARD TIME (Night Shift)**

**MONITASK TIME TRACKER**



About Gala Capital Partners (GCP):

GCP is a leading private investment firm based in Southern California, specializing in the restaurant industry. We focus on investing in or acquiring growth-oriented restaurant brands, as well as SaaS software companies that support these operations.



Our portfolio includes several prominent franchisors such as MOOYAH, Dunn Brothers Coffee, Dillas Primo Quesadillas, and Rusty Taco, along with innovative SaaS solutions like Ecotrak, Targetable, Stream, and Lunchbox. As we anticipate significant growth and further expansion, we are building our internal team to strengthen our capabilities.



Position Summary:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, analytical, and proactive Staff Accountant to join our fast-growing finance team. This role plays a key part in the day to-day management of Accounts Payable (AP), Vendor Management, General Ledger (GL) coding, Accounts Receivable (AR), and Franchise/Tenant billing and collections, while also assisting in treasury operations, including intercompany transfers and settlement activities.



This position requires strong ownership, accuracy, urgency, and a continuous improvement mindset. The ideal candidate has a passion for numbers, thrives in a fast paced environment, and is naturally curious with a knack for problem-solving and streamlining operations.



Key Responsibilities:



Accounts Payable & Vendor Management

- Process vendor invoices, ensure accurate GL coding, and manage timely payments via Ramp.

- Maintain and update vendor records; onboard new vendors and validate documentation.

- Perform regular reconciliations and ensure compliance with internal controls.

Accounts Receivable & Billing

- Prepare and issue billings to franchisees and tenants; monitor and -manage collections.

- Work closely with operations to reconcile customer accounts and resolve discrepancies promptly.

- Provide regular updates and AR aging analysis to management.

Treasury & Intercompany

- Assist with daily cash management and positioning; support payment

processing and approvals.

- Monitor and manage intercompany activity, settlements, and bank transfers.

- Support treasury reporting, banking relationships, and reconciliation of balances across entities.

Reporting & General Ledger

- Perform accurate and timely GL coding and journal entries related to

transactional accounting.

- Assist in the preparation of month-end and year-end financial reports.

- Track and analyze spend trends and report exceptions or variances from budget/forecast.

Continuous Improvement & Support

- Identify and implement opportunities for process optimization and automation.

- Serve as a go-to resource for systems such as Microsoft Dynamics GP

Collaborate cross-functionally with finance, operations, and external partners.

Qualifications & Requirements:



CPA/CMA License required.

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

3-5 years of hands-on accounting experience in a transactional or general accounting role.

Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial processes.

Experience with Microsoft Dynamics GP highly preferred.

Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, modeling); experience with financial systems and dashboards a plus.

Demonstrated attention to detail, speed, and accuracy in a high-volume environment.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; ability to ask why and dig deeper.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Proven ability to manage multiple priorities with urgency and efficiency.

Entrepreneurial mindset with a proactive and solutions-oriented approach.

Comfortable working in both collaborative and independent settings.

.

title: Property Manager
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a Client Success Manager to manage a portfolio of residential rental properties. You’ll be the primary point of contact for clients and will coordinate with vendors, leasing, maintenance, and occasionally vendors to keep properties performing well and clients confident. We are hiring a Client Success Manager to manage a portfolio of residential rental properties. This is an execution and communication role. In this role your mantra will be systems, clean notes, accurate records, fast follow-through, proactive updates, and clear reporting. We operate with a “Good Data In  Great Results Out” methodology. Your ability to maintain accurate information and turn it into great decisions matters.





What You’ll Be Doing





1) Client Management & Communication



Conduct onboarding calls and set expectations using our Good Data In  Great Results Out approach.



Maintain detailed notes of all client communications both inbound & outbound.



Provide proactive outreach: portfolio updates and recommendations build productive relationships.



Respond to escalated client
s within SLA timeframes.



Obtain client approvals per policy before authorizing work.





2) Portfolio Operations, Leasing & Vacancy Control



Monitor vacancies and review showing/leasing reports weekly with clients and provide recommendations focused on keeping DOM low and increasing Resident retention. 



Setting rental rates using our Rental Analysis methodology.



Oversee unit turns to ensure they’re completed quickly and cost-effectively.







3) Maintenance & Vendor Coordination



Oversee maintenance workflows: requests, vendor coordination, approval ( If needed), completion close-out.



Oversee work orders documentation accuracy( notes, photos, invoices, approvals).



Follow up on open items to ensure tasks close and do not stall.



Review vendor performance and escalate recurring issues with a focus on a final resolution. 





4) Financial Oversight



Review and collect outstanding client payables in a timely manner.



Secure client funds as needed before approving work orders or expenses.



Review monthly owner statements for accuracy prior to dissemination.



Oversee legal filings against delinquent Residents. 







5) Compliance & Documentation



Maintain working knowledge of rental compliance basics and follow internal compliance checklists.



Ensure client and property compliance with all federal, state, and local regulations 



Store all client/property documents correctly using HWPM’s internal file structure.





How You’ll Be Measured



Collections: 90%+ of client payables collected within 45 days



Client Response Time: 90% of escalated client
s resolved within SLA



Owner Statements: 90% Accuracy in statement review before dissemination



Days on Market: Maintain DOM under 45 days for vacant units



Unit Turns: 95% of turns completed within 14 days of vacancy



Compliance: 100% of rental/lead registrations completed on time



Client Retention: Maintain 90%+ annual client retention







Requirements

Required Skills & Experience

2+ years of experience in long-term residential property management (U.S. portfolio experience is a plus).



Strong written and spoken English; professional client communication is a must.



Confident coordinating vendors, maintenance, unit turns, and leasing workflows.



Excellent organization: you track details, follow up without being reminded, and keep clean records.



Comfortable with property management systems (any of these is great): Buildium, AppFolio, and Rent Manager is preferred



Bachelor's Degree  



Ideal Candidate

You’re proactive: you don’t wait for problems to grow.



You’re systems-driven: accurate notes, consistent reporting, and clear documentation are normal for you.



You’re calm under pressure and can handle escalations with empathy and firmness.



Stakeholder mindset: you balance speed, cost, compliance, and resident experience.







Benefits

Compensation & Benefits

Probation Period- 6 weeks 200.00 per week. 



Post-Probation Full-time:

$220/week ($880).



Paid Time Off (PTO): 

Accrues at 1 day per month 



Sick leave 5 Days per year 

13th Month Pay (Performance-Based)



Birthday Leave (Paid)



Philippine Government Reimbursements:

SSS: Up to ?2,400/month

PhilHealth: Up to ?800/month

Pag-IBIG: Up to ?800/month



Health Insurance Card



Language Bonus:

-Spanish fluency incentive

*Items 3,4,5,6, and 7 begin at the 6th month mark of employment. 



Required Skills & Experience



2+ years of experience in long-term residential property management (U.S. portfolio experience is a plus).

Strong written and spoken English; professional client communication is a must.

Confident coordinating vendors, maintenance, unit turns, and leasing workflows.

Excellent organization: you track details, follow up without being reminded, and keep clean records.

Comfortable with property management systems (any of these is great): Buildium, AppFolio, and Rent Manager is preferred.

Comfortable with task/project tools Zoho crm is preferred. 

Bachelor's Degree  

Ideal Candidate

You’re proactive: you don’t wait for problems to grow.

You’re systems-driven: accurate notes, consistent reporting, and clear documentation are normal for you.

You’re calm under pressure and can handle escalations with empathy and firmness.

Stakeholder mindset: you balance speed, cost, compliance, and resident experience.



Our Core Values

Accountability: We own and learn from mistakes.

Growth: In mindset, skill, and service.

Innovation: We always ask, “How can we do this better?”

Teamwork: We support each other to succeed.

Urgency: We act with intention and finish strong.

Communication: Clear, respectful, and frequent.









To Apply :

title: Video Editor - Corporate Videos
description:
Who We Are



We partner with video production businesses, agencies, and creative teams to connect them with high-quality editors who can seamlessly integrate into their workflow.



Instead of building in-house teams from scratch (and dealing with the time, cost, and uncertainty that comes with it), our clients rely on us to match them with editors who are already equipped to deliver.



No middle layers.

No unnecessary markups.

Just the right editor, placed with the right team, ready to do great work.



Who We're Looking For



We’re looking for well-rounded video editors who understand that editing is more than just cutting clips — it’s about communicating a message clearly and effectively.



This is not limited to one format.



Our clients work across:



- Brand videos

- Corporate content

- Testimonials

- Ads & marketing content

- Long-form and short-form storytelling



If you can adapt your editing style based on the goal of the project, you’ll fit right in. Or if you have one area of expertise, let us know so we can profile you to the right client.



The Role:



As an editor placed through C3 Studios, you’ll work directly with video teams and businesses who need someone reliable, fast, and detail-oriented.



This is a full-time, remote opportunity for editors who:



- Are comfortable working in a fast-paced environment

- Can handle consistent workload

- Take ownership of their work without constant supervision



You’ll be expected to plug into an existing system and deliver high-quality outputs with minimal friction.



Key Responsibilities



Editing & Storytelling



- Turn raw footage into polished, client-ready videos

- Adapt editing style depending on the project (brand, social, corporate, etc.)

- Maintain clarity, pacing, and engagement



Audio & Visual Quality



-Clean and balance audio

-Apply color correction and grading for consistency



Enhancements



-Add graphics, text, and motion where needed

-Use effects intentionally (not excessively)



Collaboration



-Work with project managers, producers, or clients

-Implement feedback clearly and efficiently



Efficiency



-Handle multiple projects when needed

-Meet deadlines without sacrificing quality



Required Skills & Experience



Experience



-3+ years of video editing experience

-Strong portfolio across different formats



Technical Skills



-Advanced in Adobe Premiere Pro

-If you are working on Davinci Resolve, you can send application too!

-After Effects is a plus

-Solid understanding of audio, color, and pacing



Work Ethic



- Reliable and responsive

- Able to manage time and priorities independently

- Comfortable working remotely with international teams



Communication



- Strong English communication skills

- Can clearly understand feedback and apply it



Technical Requirements

-Minimum 200/200 mbps internet speed

-Computer capable of handling 4K workflows (10-bit 422 preferred)



How This Works

-We match you with clients that fit your skillset

-You work directly with them (no micromanagement from us)



We focus on creating long-term, sustainable partnerships between editors and clients.



What We're Looking For (Important)



To make sure you’ve read everything:



When you apply, please include:



-Your portfolio

-Your monthly rate and hourly rate

-A short message on why you’re a good fit

-Your favorite local actor/actress (this helps us see who reads the post )

-Confirmation that you are comfortable working in a US-based timezone



Why Work With C3 Studios

- Access to consistent, high-quality clients

- No need to chase projects, we bring opportunities to you

- Work remotely with global teams

- Be part of a growing network of professional editors



Apply Now



If you’re an editor who values clarity, consistency, and strong storytelling across different formats, we’d love to connect.



Send your application and let’s find the right fit for you.
