title: News Creator/Designer
description:
What the role is:

This is an Instagram-first news role focused on creating thumb-stopping, title-driven content that makes VeeFriends updates feel exciting, clear, and highly engaging. Think Topps / ESPN-style news presentation, but tailored to VeeFriends’ tone, audience, and storytelling style.



What you’ll be responsible for:



• Creating engaging, thought-provoking news graphics

Design scroll-stopping visuals that communicate updates quickly and clearly. Focus on strong headlines, clean layouts, and formats that make people pause, read, and share.



• Sourcing updates from VeeFriends channels and internal info

Stay on top of VeeFriends blogs, announcements, and internal communications. Identify what’s worth posting and ensure all information is accurate, timely, and relevant.



• Packaging updates into strong content formats

Turn information into compelling formats—carousels, single posts, or short-form video—based on what best tells the story. Prioritize clarity, pacing, and engagement.



• Helping keep the account consistent, clear, and fast-moving

Maintain a cohesive visual and editorial style while posting consistently. Ensure content is easy to understand, up-to-date, and aligned with the overall direction of the account.

title: Social Media Manager (Mortgage Broker) – Video Editing Rockstar – Part-Time (20 hrs/week, EST)
description:
L’EVATE is hiring on behalf of a successful Mortgage Broker in Ontario, Canada. We’re looking for a high-performing Social Media Manager with strong video editing skills who can take ownership of content execution and help us build a consistent, professional, high-trust online presence. 



This role is for someone who can take long-form content (Zoom recordings, interviews, walkthroughs, webinars) and turn it into scroll-stopping short-form videos and posts that actually get watched — plus create marketing materials and resources that support the business.



THE PROCESS WILL BE:

1. Initial Interview

2. Trial (Video edit)

3. Final Interview



SCHEDULE (REQUIRED)

• 20 hours/week

• Monday–Friday, 11:00am–3:00pm EST



WHAT YOU’LL DO

• Own the content calendar and ensure consistent posting

• Edit short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts (and
 as needed)

• Repurpose long-form videos into multiple high-quality clips with strong hooks, captions, and clean pacing

• Create supporting social content (posts, carousels, stories) aligned to weekly themes

• Create marketing materials and resources such as flyers, simple brochures/one-pagers, client guides/checklists, event promos, and branded graphics

• Keep assets organized and on-brand (clean naming, folders, versions)

• Track what performs and improve content based on results (views, retention, engagement)



MUST-HAVES (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

• Proven short-form video editing skills (you can produce polished reels end-to-end)

• Strong ability to repurpose long-form videos into multiple clips efficiently

• Strong English skills (for captions, hooks, and on-screen text)

• Strong design sense for clean, professional marketing materials (Canva or similar)

• Extremely organized: you can run a content calendar and deliver on deadlines

• Tech-savvy and fast with tools and workflows

• Reliable and consistent (you hit deadlines every week)

• Must be able to work 11am–3pm EST, Monday–Friday



NICE-TO-HAVE

• Experience in mortgages, real estate, finance, or other professional services

• Comfortable turning raw talking points into hooks/scripts

• Familiarity with scheduling tools (Meta Business Suite, Later, Buffer, etc.)

• Experience creating client-facing resources (guides, checklists, explainers)



YOUR PORTFOLIO IS REQUIRED

To be considered, you MUST submit:

• Your resume

• A portfolio link that includes:

Short-form video edits (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)

Examples of repurposed clips from long-form content

Marketing materials/graphics you created (flyers, guides, branded assets)

• A short note confirming you can work 11am–3pm EST (M–F)



IMPORTANT: Applications without relevant video editing samples and marketing material samples will not be reviewed.

title: Executive Assistant & Amazon E-Commerce Manager (A-Player)
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant & Amazon E-Commerce Manager (A-Player)



(up to 40 hours per week | Remote)



About Us: A Brand Portfolio & An Agency



HighTechcom GmbH is an internationally operating e-commerce company headquartered in Munich. We manage a portfolio of successful brands – including Natureich (wooden toys), Tallox (chainsaw accessories), and more. Beyond our own brands, we are also a rapidly growing Amazon Agency. We help other brands scale their businesses by taking over their Amazon PPC, SEO, and overall e-commerce operations. We offer an intensely professional environment, fast-paced growth, and exceptional development opportunities.



The Opportunity: Ultimate Mentorship

This is not a standard assistant role. You will be the direct Executive Assistant to company leadership, learning the business from the inside out. You will receive comprehensive, hands-on mentorship, daily calls, and deep training directly from the management team. In exchange for your extreme organization and dedication, you will learn the exact blueprint for running a successful e-commerce brand and a highly profitable agency.

Mandatory Requirement: Proven hands-on experience in E-Commerce and/or Amazon (Seller Central, PPC, or SEO).

The Mission



Your mission is to act as the ultimate force multiplier for the executive team. You will manage schedules to keep leadership highly effective, while simultaneously taking on direct operational work for our agency clients (Amazon PPC, SEO, and listings). By flawlessly executing agency contracts, keeping clients thrilled, and radically organizing day-to-day operations, you will reduce the team's administrative workload by 25% annually, freeing up time for visionary projects.

Measurable Outcomes (What you must achieve)



A-Players are driven by results. You will be measured on the following outcomes:



Flawless Client Execution: Successfully fulfill the contractual hours and deliverables for our agency clients (PPC, SEO, E-com services). Maintain a 95%+ client satisfaction rate by ensuring all work is done accurately and on time.

Liberate Leadership Time: Reduce the executive team's operational and administrative workload by 25?ch year. Within 3 years, 75% of leadership time must be freed up for new strategic projects. This involves ruthlessly managing calendars, filtering
s, and organizing tasks.



Zero Dropped Balls: Build and maintain an airtight task management system. Ensure that 100% of assigned tasks are completed reliably, thoroughly, and documented without follow-up.

Drive Financial Growth: Directly contribute to increasing company and agency revenue by 25% per year and increasing the EBITDA margin by 7% by the end of Year 3 through efficient campaign management and process optimization.

Team Alignment: Conduct quarterly check-in meetings with tea
mbers to gather feedback, track open tasks, document expectations, and optimize internal processes.



Role-Specific Competencies (Hard Skills)



Amazon & E-Commerce Mastery: Proven experience in Amazon Seller Central, Amazon SEO, and/or PPC advertising. You know how the ecosystem works.

Extreme Organization & Time Management: You are highly structured. You can plan calendars, prioritize tasks ruthlessly, and manage multiple client projects simultaneously without losing overview.

Direct Client Work Execution: Ability to work directly inside e-commerce accounts, optimize listings, and manage advertising budgets efficiently.

Communication: Excellent knowledge of English (spoken and written) for precise communication with clients and leadership. Good camera and internet connection.

Technological & Data Competence: Proficient in using e-commerce tools, task management software, and interpreting data to derive actionable business insights.



Cultural Competencies (Who you are)



A-Player Mentality: You don't wait to be told what to do; you proactively identify problems and solve them.

Integrity & Honesty: You do the right thing even when no one is watching. Your words and actions align perfectly.

Reliability & High Performance: Consistently delivering high-quality work and never missing a deadline. If you say it will be done, it gets done.

Obsession with Optimization: You strive to make improvements every single day. Not a day goes by without optimizing a process, a product, an ad, or your own workflow.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant for Home Search and Client Management
description:
Position Type: Full Time



We are hiring a detail oriented and consistent Virtual Assistant to manage rental clients by preparing and sending curated home options. This role is focused on accuracy, organization, and consistency across a high volume of clients.



Role Overview



Your main responsibility is to prepare and send home options to clients based on their timeline, qualifications, and preferences. Every client must be worked on consistently. No client should be skipped.



You will be working inside a structured system that prioritizes clients and ensures each one receives the right homes at the right time.



What You Will Be Doing



You will review assigned clients daily and prepare a list of relevant homes based on their criteria. Each list must be carefully selected and paired with a clear, structured message explaining the options.



You will follow a priority system to ensure the most active and time sensitive clients are handled first.



All work must be submitted for approval before being sent.



What Success Looks Like in This Role



Consistent execution across all assigned clients

Accurate home selection based on criteria and timeline

Clear and well structured messaging

Ability to manage multiple clients without missing anyone

Strong attention to detail and organization



Key Responsibilities



Prepare and send curated home options to rental clients

Follow a structured priority system for all clients

Select strong and relevant homes based on criteria

Adjust search criteria when needed and clearly explain why

Draft clear, concise messages for each client

Ensure all work is completed and submitted for approval



Client Management System



Clients are worked based on priority and timeline, including responsive and unresponsive clients, as well as short term and long term movers.



Some clients will require outreach multiple times per week depending on their timeline and readiness.



You must stay organized and ensure every client is consistently updated.



Home Selection Guidelines



You will typically send between 2 to 4 homes per client, with flexibility based on available inventory.



Homes must match location and pricing as closely as possible. When adjustments are made, they must be explained clearly.



You will prioritize lifestyle fit, not just price.



You will also identify opportunities such as homes that have been on the market longer or show signs of landlord motivation.



What We Are Looking For



Strong English writing skills with clear and structured communication

High attention to detail and ability to follow systems

Consistency in completing tasks without missing clients

Ability to think critically when selecting homes

Comfortable working with data, property lists, and CRM systems



Bonus if You Have



Experience in real estate or rental markets

Experience using CRMs or property search platforms

Experience writing client facing messages



Important Application Test



When applying, include the number 81 at the end of your name in the subject line.



Example:

Real Estate CRM VA John Smith 81



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered. This helps ensure the full job description has been read.



How to Apply



Please send the following:



Your resume or CV

A short introduction about yourself and why you are a good fit for this role

A screenshot of your internet speed test

An example of a simple spreadsheet or organized data you have created



We are looking for someone long term who can take ownership of this role and grow within the business.

title: Client Onboarding Specialist
description:
KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.



The Onboarding Specialist is responsible for ensuring a smooth transition when a new association begins management services. Their tasks are front-loaded and focused on gathering, organizing, and setting up essential information for the Community Management Team for effective oversight. Onboarding responsibilities end once the setup tasks are completed, and the day-to-day management is fully transferred to the Property Manager (CAM) and Assistant Property Manager (ACAM).



Duties & Responsibilities:

- Data Collection: Gather association documents from the outgoing manager or board for onboarding.

- Vendor Coordination: Distribute vendor packets with billing updates, VIVE registration, and invoice procedures.

- Board Information: Compile board member contact details and provide regular transition updates.

- Community Welcome: Send welcome communications covering payments, contacts, and emergency procedures.

- Setup & Configuration: Initiate VIVE setup and notify the after-hours team. Set up utilities, insurance, and compliance registrations. Configure assessments, fees, and Condo Certs. Upload key documents to the system.

- File Management: Store all onboarding files in SharePoint under the appropriate folder.

- Billing Oversight (First 2 Months): Ensure accurate receipt and processing of vendor bills.

- Post-Transition: Coordinate reserve transfers and close-out tasks. Enter homeowner balances, review final financials, and arrange delivery of physical assets. Special Projects: Support additional projects as assigned.



Benefits: HMO and PTOs after 90 days.



Working conditions:

- Candidate must be able to work from 9 am to 5 pm EST.

- Comfortable working with Hubstaff.

title: Technical Support Specialist / Customer Service Representative / Executive Assistant
description:
### **About the Role**



We are looking for a highly structured, detail-oriented, and exceptionally organized individual to join our team in a hybrid role combining technical support, customer service, and executive assistance.



This role is not for someone who “tries to stay organized.” It is for someone who is naturally wired to think in systems, thrives on order, and takes pride in maintaining clean, structured workflows across tools, files, and communications.



If your default state is organized, methodical, and precise, you will excel here.



---



### **Key Responsibilities**



**Technical Support**



* Provide timely and accurate support to customers via chat,
, and SMS

* Troubleshoot SaaS/CRM-related issues and guide users step-by-step

* Document recurring issues and solutions clearly



**Customer Service**



* Deliver a high-quality, professional customer experience

* Maintain fast response times and strong follow-through

* Track conversations and ensure no customer falls through the cracks



**Executive Assistance**



* Manage calendar scheduling with precision and zero oversight

* Organize tasks, priorities, and follow-ups systematically

* Handle phone calls and communications on behalf of the executive

* Maintain structured digital systems for notes, files, and projects

* Anticipate needs and proactively handle operational details



---



### **What This Role Actually Requires (Read Carefully)**



This role is heavily dependent on your ability to stay organized at all times.



You will:



* Be given new information, tasks, and context daily

* Receive documents, files, notes, and instructions continuously

* Be asked to make phone calls where you must accurately remember details and context provided beforehand



If you do not have a system to track, organize, and retrieve information quickly, things will fall apart.



If you do not consistently organize files into folders, subfolders, and structured systems, everything will become scattered.



If you do not actively keep track of everything you are given, you will not succeed in this role.



This is not a job where you can “wing it” or rely on memory alone. You must operate with structure.



---



### **What We’re Looking For**



This role requires someone who:



* Is extremely detail-oriented and does not overlook small things

* Naturally builds and maintains organized systems without being asked

* Keeps digital environments clean, structured, and easy to navigate

* Has a strong internal sense of order, consistency, and follow-through

* Does not rely on reminders to stay on top of responsibilities

* Takes ownership of tasks and ensures nothing is forgotten or dropped



You should be comfortable:



* Creating and maintaining folders, subfolders, and structured file systems

* Tagging, labeling, and categorizing information for easy retrieval

* Managing knowledge bases and documentation

* Using tools like Notion, Obsidian, or similar organizational systems



---



### **Non-Negotiables**



* High attention to detail and accuracy

* Strong memory and ability to track multiple moving parts

* Consistent follow-through without needing supervision

* Clear, professional written communication

* Reliability and accountability in daily work

* **Experience with SaaS or CRM platforms (required)**



---



### **Important Fit Note**



This role requires sustained focus, exceptional memory, and consistent attention to detail across many moving parts. If you have ADD/ADHD or similar challenges that significantly impact focus, organization, or follow-through, this role will likely not be a good fit.



On the flip side, if you naturally bring an almost obsessive level of organization to your digital life—where everything has a place, systems are second nature, and structure brings you satisfaction—you will thrive here. That level of precision is a huge advantage in this role.



---



### **Why This Role Is Unique**



A major part of this role is helping organize not just business operations, but also digital life systems—especially Google Drive, documents, folders, and workflows.



You will be directly responsible for preventing chaos and creating clarity across everything you touch.



---



### **How to Apply**



Please include:



1. A brief summary of your experience

2. Examples of systems or organizational structures you’ve built or maintained

3. Tools you’ve used to stay organized (Notion, Obsidian, etc.)

4. Why you believe you are exceptionally detail-oriented and structured by default



---



We are looking for someone who treats organization as second nature, not something they have to force. If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Full-Time Video Editor (Mini VSLs) – Long-Term Position – $700/month
description:
Full-Time Video Editor (Mini VSLs) – Long-Term Position – $700/month



We are looking for a full-time video editor to join our growing team. This is a long-term opportunity for someone reliable, fast, and committed to producing high-quality video ads and mini VSLs.



Important: This is a full-time position only. We do not accept freelancers working multiple jobs. We need someone fully focused on our company.



Position Overview



You will be editing mini VSL videos (3–5 minutes) used for online marketing campaigns. These videos include:



-AI spokesperson videos

-AI-generated B-roll

-UGC-style footage

-Motion graphics and captions



On average, you will be expected to produce 2.5–3 minutes of finished video per day.



We provide SOPs, detailed training, and step-by-step video tutorials explaining our entire workflow.



Tools & Workflow



We provide access to all required tools, including:



-AI spokesperson tools

-AI B-roll generators

-Envato Elements

-Canva

-Other AI video tools



You will only need to provide your own video editing software (Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, Final Cut, etc.).



Our workflow is organized through:



-Trello (task management)

-Slack (daily communication)



Languages & Markets



We create videos for multiple markets, including:



-United States

-Germany



You do not need to speak these languages. We provide English transcripts for all videos so you can follow the structure easily.



Responsibilities



-Edit mini VSL videos (3–5 minutes)

-Generate AI spokesperson videos

-Create AI B-roll footage

-Source UGC-style clips from TikTok and other platforms

-Add captions, transitions, and engaging visual elements

-Follow provided scripts and transcripts

-Deliver projects on time and respect deadlines

-Collaborate with the team via Slack



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who is:



-Fast and efficient

-Reliable and consistent

-Detail-oriented

-Comfortable learning AI tools

-Able to follow structured SOPs

-Good at researching UGC-style content

-Available full-time

-Comfortable communicating in CET time zone



Work Schedule



Monday – Saturday

Full-time availability required.



You must be able to communicate with the team during CET working hours.



Salary & Growth



Starting salary:



$700 per month



After 3 months:

Salary increases to $800/month



After that:



-Performance reviews every 6 months

-Bonuses for strong performance

-Long-term growth opportunities

-We value loyalty and long-term tea
mbers.



Paid Test



Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid test:

This helps us evaluate editing speed and quality.



How to Apply



Please include the following in your application:



-Your portfolio or previous video work

-Your video editing software

-Your experience with AI tools or AI video editing

We are looking for someone who can start immediately and grow with our team long-term.

title: EXPERIENCED Executive Assistant for E-commerce brand
description:
We’re a fast-growing e-commerce brand looking for a detail-oriented, proactive, and highly organized virtual assistant to support us across customer service and key operational tasks.

Your role with managing our customer support
 inbox but expands into high-leverage responsibilities that impact customer experience, financial operations, and business efficiency.



If you’re someone who thrives on structure, takes initiative, and loves turning chaos into clarity, we’d love to work with you.



Key Responsibilities:

-
 Customer Service & Inbox Management

- Responding to customer
 inquiries with clarity, empathy, and accuracy

- Tracking and flagging escalations, common issues, and feedback

- Ensuring inbox stays organized, up to date, and on-brand

- Turning raw feedback into weekly customer insights reports (likes, dislikes, objections, FAQs, product issues, positive experiences)

- Customer Experience Insights & Strategy

- Spotting trends in customer behaviour and flagging growth opportunities

Updating and maintaining weekly/monthly cashflow forecasts

You’re a Great Fit If You:

title: Appointment Setting & Lead Outreach $350 – $650/month USD (Part- time, Weekend Shift)
description:
Love the Work, Not the Corporate Chaos? This Role Is for You.



If you have call center or appointment-setting experience and enjoy outbound calling but do not like rigid scripts, micromanagement, or corporate pressure, you will feel right at home here.



At Grow Pro Agency, we value people, not just numbers. We offer a supportive remote environment where your skills matter, your voice is heard, and your work creates real impact.



If you are looking for a role that combines structure, growth, and a positive team culture, keep reading.



About Us



We are Grow Pro Agency, a fast-growing U.S.-based digital marketing agency that has been ranked on the Inc. 5000 list for three consecutive years. We help over 600 martial arts schools across North America grow through proven online marketing strategies.



Our services include PPC, Google Business Profile optimization,
 marketing, CRM systems, and live lead follow-ups. We work closely with our clients as long-term partners, not just vendors.



Our founder, Cris Rodriguez, is a martial artist and school owner herself, which gives us a deep understanding of our niche and the results our clients need. Our Philippines-based team plays a huge role in our continued success.



The Role: Appointment Setter (Weekend Shift)



This is more than a typical appointment-setting role. You will work primarily on outbound calls and lead outreach to help convert prospects into booked appointments for our clients.



This role is weekend-focused, ideal for VAs who thrive during off-peak hours and enjoy connecting with leads in a high-energy, results-driven environment.



Work Schedule:



3 days per week: Friday, Saturday, Sunday



Weekend hours: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM EST



Outbound calls and lead follow-ups



You will thrive here if you enjoy meaningful conversations, a modern and supportive remote-first culture, and being part of a team that celebrates wins and growth.



What You Will Do



Make outbound calls to prospects and follow up on leads



Set qualified appointments for niche clients using warm and cold leads



Build rapport and handle objections professionally and confidently



Manage and update records accurately using CRM and Google tools



Collaborate with a supportive, goal-driven team



Help improve client ROI through consistent and quality follow-ups



Skills That Make You a Great Fit



Tech-savvy and comfortable using Google Drive, Docs, and Sheets

title: HIRING: Static Ad Designer — Long-Term Role with Scandinavian E-Commerce Brand
description:
???? HIRING: Static Ad Designer — Long-Term Role with Scandinavian E-Commerce Brand



We're a fast-growing e-commerce brand based in Sweden scaling our paid ads on Meta 
/Instagram).



We need a static ad designer who understands that design serves the message — not the other way around. A beautiful ad that doesn't stop the scroll is worthless. An ugly ad with the right hook wins every time.



This is not a branding job. This is a direct response job.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



• Design static ads for Meta based on angles and briefs we provide

• Adapt and place copy in Nordic languages (Swedish, Norwegian, Danish)

• Design promotional materials when needed (sales, launches, campaigns)

• Deliver multiple static ads per day consistently

• Iterate quickly based on feedback



---



YOU MUST UNDERSTAND



• Direct response design — the hook and copy are the hero, not the visuals

• How to create scroll-stopping static ads, not just pretty graphics

• That we will give you the angle — your job is to make it impossible to scroll past



---



YOU MUST HAVE



• Experience designing paid social ads (Meta)

• A portfolio with static ad examples — not just social media posts or branding work

• Proficiency in Figma, Photoshop, or similar (tool doesn't matter, output does)

• The ability to follow a brief without going off-script creatively

• Reliable delivery and fast turnaround



---



DO NOT APPLY IF



• Your portfolio only shows branding, logos, or organic social content

• You prioritize aesthetics over message

• You have no experience with paid social ads

• You cannot commit to a long-term role



---



TO APPLY



We have a small test task.



Here is your angle:



"Women who color their hair at home have spent 45 minutes carefully following every instruction — and still see gray roots in the mirror."



Design one static Meta ad based on this angle. The goal is to stop a woman scrolling through her feed and make her feel seen.



Send us:

1. Your test ad

2. Your portfolio (paid social ads only)



Write “DESIGNER” at the top of your application or it will not be read.



---



$5 per hour, paid weekly

Long-term role

title: Senior Video Editor in Abobe Premiere Pro
description:
Video Editor – Performance Ad Cutting (Freelance)



We're a German designer lighting brand creating high-converting video ads for e-commerce. Our ads sell through aesthetics first — the visual is the product. We're looking for a skilled video editor who understands pacing, storytelling, and lifestyle-driven content.



What you'll do



You receive raw footage, video assets, and an English voiceover (including hook variations) and cut a finished ad ready for localization. Your job is clip selection, pacing, zooms, and text overlays — fully done. We handle audio swapping, subtitles, and final sync adjustments on our end. You always deliver a Premiere Pro project file (.prproj) exported via Project Manager with all assets included — never an MP4.



What a typical order looks like



1 main voiceover + 3 hook variations (.mp3)

Raw footage + visual assets

Reference ads to match our style



Deliverable: 3 visually identical video ads, each with a different hook — one .prproj file per hook.



What we're looking for



- Strong feel for pacing and visual storytelling in lifestyle/design content

- Comfortable working from a voiceover rather than a brief

- Ability to match an established editing style based on reference material

- Clean, consistent output — no loose ends, no missing assets

- Experience with B-roll integration (stock footage or AI-generated video welcome, used sparingly)

- Reliable and organized — we need project files we can open and finalize without chasing you



Our style in a nutshell



Open with a person, not the product. Script and visual tell the same story. When in doubt, default to a beautiful, well-staged product shot. No shaky clips, no unflattering angles.

title: IRS Tax Resolution Associate
description:
Role Overview

If you enjoy solving complex IRS issues, helping clients navigate stressful tax situations, and want to build expertise in tax resolution (IRS audits, IRS notices, IRS submission) rather than traditional tax prep—this role is for you.



DiLucci CPA Firm has been serving business owners and real estate investors since 2005. For nearly two decades, we’ve built a reputation for doing tax differently—by going deeper than compliance, telling clients the truth, and using the tax code strategically to protect and grow their wealth. Our mission is simple: help clients keep more of what they earn while giving them clarity, confidence, and a long-term plan. We hold ourselves to a high bar: Genuine Care, Great Communication, Speed to Learning, and Fun Tax Energy.



As an IRS Tax Resolution Specialist, you will focus primarily on resolving IRS notices, assisting clients with tax issues, and acting as a key point of contact for IRS-related matters. This role is ideal for someone with a foundational understanding of tax preparation who is more interested in problem-solving and representation work than ongoing tax compliance.

This is a client-facing, growth-oriented role with the opportunity to develop deep expertise in IRS resolution work. The firm will sponsor your Enrolled Agent (EA) license as part of your professional development.



Key Responsibilities



IRS Resolution & Notices

- Review and respond to IRS notices on behalf of clients

- Communicate directly with the IRS to resolve client issues (e.g., notices, payment plans, compliance matters)

- Assist clients in understanding their IRS situation and next steps

- Prepare documentation and correspondence required for IRS cases

- Client Communication & Support

- Serve as a  main point of contact for clients dealing with IRS-related issues

- Clearly explain tax situations and resolution strategies in a calm, professional manner

- Maintain consistent communication and follow-ups with clients



Tax Knowledge Application

- Utilize prior tax preparation experience to understand client filings and identify issues

- Assist in gathering and organizing financial and tax documentation

- Support the team in ensuring accuracy and compliance in all IRS-related work



Professional Development

- Work toward obtaining Enrolled Agent (EA) certification (firm-sponsored)

- Continuously build knowledge in IRS procedures, tax law, and resolution strategies



Role Expectations

- Handle IRS notices and resolution cases efficiently and accurately

- Communicate clearly and professionally with both clients and the IRS

- Stay organized while managing multiple client cases

- Demonstrate a strong willingness to learn and grow in tax resolution



Requirements

- At least 2+ years of U.S. tax experience (public accounting or similar)

- At least 1+ years handling IRS related concerns.

- Foundational knowledge of individual and/or business tax returns (1040, 1065, 1120S preferred)

- Strong written and verbal communication skills. (C2 English Proficiency)

- Detail-oriented and highly organized

- At least 2 years experience speaking with clients or government agencies

- Interest in specializing in IRS resolution work rather than tax preparation.



Benefits & Perks

- Enrolled Agent (EA) license sponsorship (with commitment to remain with the firm or repay cost)

- Work from home

- Growth opportunity into a specialized tax resolution career path with a well established accounting firm.



DiLucci CPA Core Values

- Genuine Care – Trusted advisor relationships, not transactional work

- Great Communication – Clear, proactive, and timely

- Speed to Learning & Implementation – Adapt quickly as laws and strategies evolve

- Fun Tax Energy (FTE) – We take pride in excellent tax work

title: Insurance Appointment Setter
description:
We're looking for a motivated, thick-skinned cold caller to drive new business opportunities across our personal and commercial lines divisions. You'll be the first voice prospects hear — your job is to open doors, qualify leads, and book appointments for our producers. This is a high-volume, performance-driven role best suited for someone who genuinely enjoys talking to people and doesn't take rejection personally.



What You'll Be Doing



Making outbound calls to Florida homeowners, small business owners, and contractors to generate insurance leads

Qualifying prospects across personal lines (home, auto) and commercial lines (GL, WC, BOP)

Handling and overcoming common objections ("we're all set," "not interested," "I'll call you back")

Booking qualified appointments and warm transfers for producers

Maintaining accurate records of call activity and lead status in the CRM

Following up on leads via phone, text, and

Meeting or exceeding daily call volume and appointment-setting targets



What We're Looking For



Prior experience in outbound calling, telemarketing, or inside sales (insurance experience a plus but not required)

Confident, clear communicator who can hold a conversation and think on their feet

Comfortable with high call volumes and the inevitable "no"

Self-motivated and disciplined — this is a remote role, so you need to show up for yourself every day

Basic computer skills and ability to navigate a CRM

title: Senior Business Systems Specialist (Client Services)
description:
Job Overview

We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a high-level Senior Business Systems Specialist to help us build, lead, and scale our Software Solutions department. This is a unique, multi-disciplinary role designed for a strategic thinker who sits at the intersection of Finance, Business Operations, and Technology.

 

We aren't just looking for an implementer; we are looking for a partner in growth. You will work directly with leadership to build out our service offerings, meet with potential clients to architect solutions, and eventually help us recruit and mentor the team that will execute your vision. If you have a deep understanding of Dynamics 365, a passion for Power BI analytics, and the business acumen to solve complex operational problems, we want to hear from you.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Practice Development & Strategy

  - Partner with leadership to define and build out our Software Solutions Department services and "go-to-market" strategy.

  - Develop standardized implementation methodologies, project templates, and best practices for the team.

  - Identify and vet new tools and integration patterns that can be productized for our client base.



*Presales & Solution Architecture

  - Join leadership in high-level discovery meetings with potential clients to identify pain points and opportunities.

  - Translate business requirements into technical "Proof of Concepts" and high-level solution designs.

  - Lead the technical scoping and pricing of projects, ensuring Scopes of Work (SOWs) are accurate, profitable, and achievable.



*Senior Implementation & Delivery

  - Act as the lead consultant for high-value Dynamics 365 and Power Platform implementations.

  - Architect advanced Power BI reporting suites that provide clients with real-time visibility into their financial and operational health.

  - Oversee complex data migrations and system integrations, ensuring data integrity across the client's tech stack.



*Team Building & Mentorship

  - Help define the roles and skills needed as we scale the Software Solutions department.

  - Assist in the interviewing, hiring, and onboarding of junior specialists and engineers.

  - Provide technical mentorship and "over-the-shoulder" guidance to ensure high-quality delivery across all projects.



*Operational & Financial Consulting

  - Use your understanding of business operations and finance to advise clients on process improvements (e.g., automated billing, inventory management, financial consolidation).

  - Ensure system configurations align with GAAP/audit requirements and support the client's long-term scalability.

 

Required Qualifications

* Experience: 7–10+ years in business systems consulting, solution architecture, or IT leadership (MSP or Professional Services experience is a major plus).

* Business & Finance Acumen: A strong understanding of core business operations and accounting principles (P&L, Cash Flow, AP/AR, and operational workflows).

* Dynamics 365 Mastery: Proven track record of architecting and implementing Dynamics 365 environments.

* Power BI Expertise: Advanced skills in data modeling and creating executive-level dashboards.

* Presales & Scoping: Experience meeting with clients, identifying needs, and building out detailed project scopes and pricing models.

* Leadership Mindset: A desire to move beyond "doing the work" into building a practice and leading a team.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

* Professional accounting background or deep experience with ERP financial modules.

* Experience with the broader Microsoft Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate).

* Previous experience in a "Founding" or "Lead" role within a growing technical practice.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

* Phase 1: You are successfully co-leading sales meetings, closing new projects, and delivering high-value implementations.

* Phase 2: You have established a repeatable "playbook" for our business systems offerings and project delivery.

* Phase 3: You are leading a small, high-performing team of specialists, allowing you to focus more on strategy, high-level architecture, and practice growth.



Why Join Us?

We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:

* Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

* Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

* Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

* Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?

* Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

* Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

* Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

* Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply:

If you’re ready to take your career to the next level as a Senior Business Systems Specialist, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (2027) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Junior Systems Administrator (Client Services)
description:
We are seeking a proactive Junior Systems Administrator to help manage and maintain the IT infrastructure and business applications for our diverse group of clients. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring that our clients' systems are secure, up-to-date, and performing optimally.

 

This is a dynamic MSP role where no two days are the same. You will move between different client environments, gaining hands-on experience managing various cloud setups, security protocols, and enterprise software. This is a perfect role for someone who wants to move beyond basic helpdesk support and into multi-tenant systems management.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Client System Administration

   - Assist in the administration of core business platforms for clients (e.g., Microsoft 365, Entra ID/Active Directory, and CRM systems).

  - Monitor client system health, performance, and security logs to identify and resolve potential issues proactively.

  - Manage user onboarding/offboarding, permissions, and access levels across various client software platforms.

*Security & Compliance Management

  - Help implement and enforce security best practices for clients, including MFA, password policies, and endpoint protection.

  - Assist with software patching, updates, and system backups to ensure client data integrity and business continuity.

  - Participate in basic security audits and help document compliance procedures for client environments.

*Infrastructure & Network Support

  - Support the configuration and maintenance of client network devices (firewalls, switches, and Wi-Fi access points).

  - Assist in managing client cloud infrastructure and virtual environments.

  - Troubleshoot hardware and software issues escalated from the general support level.

*Documentation & Client Communication

  - Maintain accurate records of client system configurations, hardware inventory, and software licenses.

  - Create and update "How-To" guides and technical documentation for client users and internal tea
mbers.

  - Provide clear, professional updates to clients regarding the status of their systems and projects.



Qualifications (Required)

*Technical Foundation: 0–3 years of experience in IT support or a related technical role (MSP experience is a major plus).

*Operating Systems: Strong familiarity with Windows 10/11 and a basic understanding of Windows Server.

*Cloud Basics: General knowledge of Microsoft 365 administration (users, groups, and licenses).

*Networking Knowledge: Understanding of basic networking concepts (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPNs).

*API Awareness: Basic understanding of how APIs work and comfort navigating technical documentation.

*Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills with a strong customer-service mindset.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

*Experience with virtualization (Hyper-V, VMware) or cloud platforms (Azure, AWS).

*Familiarity with security tools (Antivirus, Firewalls, MDM solutions).

*Any IT certifications (CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft Fundamentals).



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



**Submit your application and include the numbers (1989) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Urgent Hiring! Video Editor with skills in 3D, Motion Graphics & Animation
description:
***You must be comfortable with monthly payments for compensation.***



Location: Remote (Philippines-based referred)

Employment Type: Full-Time (40 hours/week, Monday to Friday)



About the Role

We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented Video Editor to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for creating high-quality, visually engaging videos tailored for social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
.



Your work will directly impact the brand’s online presence, so we are looking for someone with strong technical skills, a keen eye for detail, and the ability to tell compelling stories through video.







Key Responsibilities

Editing & Post-Production

Assemble and refine video clips to create cohesive, high-quality content.

Add transitions, effects, and other creative elements to elevate visual storytelling.

Sync and edit audio, incorporating music and voiceovers for a polished final product.



Color Grading & Correction

Adjust color tones and lighting to maintain visual consistency across all videos.

Perform detailed color correction to enhance footage quality.



Motion Graphics & Animation

Create motion graphics, lower-thirds, and animations to make content more dynamic.

Work with 3D models and advanced graphics to enhance production value.



Collaboration

Work closely with social media coordinators and marketing teams to align content with creative goals and brand strategy.



File Management & Organization

Maintain organized folders and version control for all project files and assets.

Ensure files are stored securely for easy access and future use.



Quality Control

Review final edits to ensure videos are free of errors, including audio syncing, subtitles, and visual quality.

Meet deadlines without compromising attention to detail.



Platform-Specific Optimization

Export videos in correct formats, file sizes, and aspect ratios for various platforms.

Optimize content for mobile-first platforms like Instagram Reels and TikTok.

Continuous Learning & Creativity

Stay updated with the latest video editing trends, tools, and techniques.

Suggest new ideas and innovative approaches to enhance content quality.



Requirements

Proven experience as a Video Editor with a strong portfolio.

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro – essential for advanced editing.

Knowledge of VFX tools such as Adobe After Effects or Blender.

Ability to create animations and work with 3D models.

Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and narrative flow.

Excellent attention to detail and a creative eye.

Familiarity with exporting content across multiple platforms and devices.

Ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.

Strong collaboration and communication skills for working with remote teams.



Work Schedule

Hours: 40 hours per week

Days: Monday to Friday

100% remote – must have reliable internet connection and ability to collaborate online.

Familiarity with exporting content across multiple platforms and devices.

Ability to manage multiple projects under tight deadlines.

Strong collaboration and communication skills for working with remote teams.



Work Schedule

Hours: 40 hours per week

Days: Monday to Friday

100% remote – must have reliable internet connection and ability to collaborate online.

title: Email Marketer
description:
Please include the words "Kitchen Bowls" at the top of your application and include a short loom intro video where you review the latest project you worked on, problems you solved, results you were able to get, and anything else you'd like to share. Just a short 3 minute video is all that is required to show that you are serious about this pos

 

---

 

WHO WE ARE

 

KB Creative is a digital marketing agency that helps small businesses scale their eCommerce sales. We handle everything under one roof — web design & development, SEO, PPC, content,
 marketing, and strategy. We've been in business for 10 years and work primarily with WooCommerce clients across a range of markets.

 

We're a small, tight-knit remote team. Most of our tea
mbers have been with us for years, and that's by design — we're looking for people who want to grow with us long-term, not just fill a seat.

 

---

 

WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 

We need an experienced eCommerce
 marketer who can own the
 channel across multiple client accounts. You'll manage campaigns, build automations, write copy, design templates, and monitor performance — all while working closely with our team to drive real sales for our clients.

 

This is a part-time position with a real opportunity to grow into full-time as you prove to be a great fit. We love people who love to learn, take initiative, and want a long-term partnership — not just a gig.

 

You'll report to the Operations Manager and collaborate with other tea
mbers across client accounts.

 

---

 

WHAT YOU'LL DO

 

Strategy & Planning

- Generate campaign ideas based on client goals, seasonal trends, and product launches

- Plan
 calendars and coordinate with the team on timing and messaging

- Recommend improvements to flows and campaigns based on performance data

 

Execution

- Design attractive
 templates that match each client's brand

- Write compelling copy that drives opens, clicks, and sales

- Build and manage automations (welcome flows, abandoned cart, post-purchase, win-back, etc.)

- Manage lists and segments to keep audiences clean and targeted

- Publish campaigns on schedule across client accounts

 

Performance

- Monitor key metrics across all accounts (open rates, click rates, revenue attribution, list health)

- Make adjustments to subject lines, send times, segments, and content based on what's working

- Share insights with the team and flag opportunities or concerns

 

---

 

WHAT YOU NEED

 

Required:

- Proven experience with eCommerce
 marketing — this is not an entry-level role

- Strong knowledge of Omnisend and/or Drip (experience with both is ideal)

- WooCommerce experience — most of our clients run WooCommerce stores

- Fluent English with strong copywriting ability — all clients are US-based

- Ability to both design and write
s (you're not handing off to someone else)

- Detail-oriented with strong organizational skills

- Comfortable with project management tools, Google Drive, Zoom, and Slack

- Self-motivated and reliable — you manage your own time and hit deadlines

 

Big Pluses:

- Experience with Uscreen or membership/subscription platforms

- Golf industry experience or familiarity

- Experience using AI tools for copywriting, subject line testing, or workflow optimization

 

---

 

WHAT WE VALUE

 

- Curiosity and a drive to learn — we're always adapting and we want people who are excited by that

- Ownership — if it's your task, you see it through or ask for help before it's overdue

- Communication — we'd rather hear "I'm stuck" than silence

- Honesty — if you think there's a better way to do something, say so. We encourage pushback from experience.

- Long-term thinking — we want teammates, not temps

 

---

 

HOW WE'LL HELP YOU SUCCEED

 

You bring the
 marketing expertise. We'll bring the client context, systems knowledge, and team support to get you up to speed quickly. We'll train you on our tools, products, and clients so you can apply your skills from day one.

 

We also listen. If something isn't working or you have an idea, we want to hear it. We're building something together.

 

---

 

POSITION DETAILS

 

- Part-time to start, with opportunity to transition to full-time

- Remote / work from home

- Must have some availability in eastern US time zone for meetings 9am - 2pm ET

- All clients are US-based

title: Finance Manager with US Real Estate Experience
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



Who We Are:



Tracing our history back to 1920, EJF Real Estate Services has been a family-owned and family-operated business for over 30 years, specializing in community association management and real estate sales across the Washington, DC metropolitan area. Today, we are the largest DC-based property management firm, proudly serving hundreds of clients throughout the DMV. Our extensive market knowledge, hands-on industry experience, and best-in-class customer service help communities thrive. 



What You'll Do:



As a Finance Manager, you’ll oversee the financial reporting and analysis for a portfolio of community associations. This is a client-facing, oversight role — not transactional bookkeeping. You’ll ensure accurate monthly financials, guide Boards of Directors in understanding their financial position, and partner with internal teams to resolve issues. This position is ideal for an experienced accounting professional who thrives in a dynamic, client-service environment.



Requirements:



Ensure monthly financial reports accurately reflect the association’s financial position.

Review general ledgers, statements of revenue/expenses, and balance sheets to resolve issues and correct errors.

Serve as the primary financial resource for both internal tea
mbers and external clients (board members and association representatives).

Oversee and ensure completion of administrative tasks, including tax payments, end-of-year tax returns, and government filings.

Support external audits for associations within the portfolio.

Review and monitor banking and investment activity.

Analyze and review loans, special assessments, and other financial obligations as required.

Provide long-term financial planning guidance for capital projects.

Attend weekly tea
etings, set goals, and complete assigned tasks on time.

Perform additional duties as assigned.



Qualifications:



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (or equivalent experience).

3+ years of accounting, financial experience in property management (HOA, condo, coop) is required.

Experience working with Vantaca property management software is required.

Strong knowledge of GAAP and financial reporting.

Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.

Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to present financial information clearly to non-financial stakeholders.

Must be able to analyze data issues and execute on solutions.

Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.



Working Hours: 9:00 am – 5:00 pm EST; Monday – Friday (US time zones)



Benefits: HMO and PTO after 90 days.



How to apply:

1. Please check out the company website before submitting an application: 
.

2. Send an
 ATTACHMENT with your updated resume in PDF format.

3. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description, and include your OnlineJobs.PH profile link.



Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Finance Manager with US Real Estate Experience - your name.



*Applicants who will apply through onlinejobs.ph will not be considered.

*Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Senior Video Editor with AI Experience
description:

Entertaining

Collaborative — willing to reach out and work with tea
mbers when needed

title: video editor for social media posts - (seeking a superstar in organic reach)
description:
We need someone to create 2 short videos a day for our company and 2 sets of before and after slides of our work per day. - we post these on social media.



You would be given access to our photo and video files of work we are doing and create an entertaining video, with catchy thumbnail and intro, these videos will be between 10 and 30 seconds, your KPI will be organic reach across the platforms we use (insta, tiktok, reels, linkedin, YT) - we use metricool for cross posting and scheduled posting and you would be required to create enough for 2 per day - with captions.  the requirement is that you are always posting 2 weeks ahead, so you could do this at any time that suits you. - full details will be provided 



You will be required to carefully analyse what is working and gaining traction and continually iterate and improve the rankings.



If you are interested,, please provide 

1) a link or links  to similar work you have done where you have created videos that have gained organic traction.

2) brief summary of how you acheived the results on the social videos you created

3) references will be asked for and checked of projects you have worked on and achieved success with on organic reach, - so if we proceed with your application and you are willing we would ask your permission to directly contact and seek references from companies you have created videos for, if you are not comfortable with this, please do not apply





Please note, the hourly pay is a guideline, this will be a per video payment.



The KPI is organic reach and you will receive bonuses for increasing our reach and impact



This is a permanent position and we are looking for a long term video partner



suitable candidates will be asked to attend a video meeting.







Thanks so much for reading!

title: AI Solutions Engineer (Automation & Integrations)
description:
Google Docs Version [Copy & Paste In Browser]: 



We are seeking a competent AI Solutions Engineer to join our team. This role is responsible for designing, building, and supporting practical AI-powered systems that improve student support, internal operations, workflow automation, and execution across our organization.



This position includes working directly with the founder, Dexter, & our Infrastructure support team to build and maintain AI-driven tools that integrate with our support workflows, documentation systems, internal knowledge bases, Slack, Google Docs, Google Sheets, and other operational platforms from day one.



We are looking for a full-time AI Solutions Engineer who can take real operational problems, architect practical solutions, and build structured systems that improve support quality, response speed, and internal leverage throughout the organization. This role is ideal for someone with backend engineering, automation, API integration, and applied AI systems experience who understands how modern AI tools are built and used in real-world environments.



If you're willing to take ownership, follow systems, and help build useful AI-driven solutions in a structured business environment, you will be SUCCESSFUL and find a long-term career opportunity with room for growth.



Time spent in the organization should reflect a 90/10 ratio for production/organization.



Your Essential Techs:



Your Essential Techs is a top-rated digital marketing agency in El Cajon, California, founded in 2021 by Dexter Blanco. We streamline, optimize, and scale local businesses’ online presence with data-driven SEO, CRO, and web design.



We also operate an Information Technology training and mentorship division, helping individuals break into IT roles through hands-on labs, structured programs, and accountability-driven education.



Role Purpose:



->Design and build practical AI systems that solve real support and operational problems

->Integrate AI workflows into internal business systems and support environments

->Improve support speed, quality, and consistency using grounded AI-assisted processes

->Create maintainable systems that connect LLM reasoning with real company data and workflows

->Help build the foundation for future AI tooling across training, operations, and service delivery



Key Responsibilities:

->AI Systems Design & Implementation

->Design and build practical AI-powered workflows and internal tools

->Translate business and operational requirements into real technical systems

->Create MVPs that can be tested quickly and improved over time

->Own implementation from architecture through working delivery

->Slack Bot & Support Automation

->Assist Dexter with designing and building a Slack-based AI support assistant for student support operations

->Build support workflows that:

-->Ask clarifying questions

-->Suggest safe troubleshooting steps

-->Reference internal documentation

-->Escalate to a human when needed

->Integrate AI responses into real Slack support operations

->Knowledge Base & Retrieval Systems

->Help ingest, structure, and retrieve internal documentation

->Build retrieval pipelines across:

-->Knowledge base content

-->Google Docs

-->Google Sheets

-->Curated internal support playbooks

->Improve AI response quality by grounding outputs in real company information

->Backend Integrations & Workflow Automation

->Build and maintain integrations with:

-->Slack APIs

-->Google Docs / Sheets / Drive APIs

-->Knowledge base systems

-->Internal workflow tools

->Connect LLMs to APIs, retrieval systems, and operational logic in a safe and maintainable way

->Prompting, Orchestration & Guardrails

->Create and improve prompts for support, triage, and internal automation use cases

->Structure AI outputs so they can be used reliably inside production workflows

->Implement validation, guardrails, and confidence handling

->Testing, Monitoring & Reporting

->Test AI workflows against real support and business scenarios

->Log outputs, analyze failures, and improve system quality over time

->Identify when AI should answer, ask follow-up questions, or escalate

->Provide visibility into system performance, limitations, and improvement opportunities



Preferred Technical Background (Strong Advantage):



This role is strongly preferred for candidates with technical experience, including:



->Backend software engineering

->API integrations and webhooks

->LLM application development

->Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)

->Slack app development

->Google Workspace API integrations

->Database experience such as PostgreSQL

->General scripting / automation experience



You do not need to be a machine learning researcher or senior AI scientist, but you must understand how to build and ship applied systems in practice.



Our Technical Knowledge Alignment:



You should be comfortable with:



->Backend application development

->APIs and system integrations

->Prompt design and structured outputs

->Knowledge retrieval concepts

->Automation workflows



It is also a strong advantage if you understand the fundamentals or can quickly learn our Core-4 technology educational pillers we cover in our Career Launcher program:



->Computer/Server Hardware

->Operating Systems (Windows & Linux)

->Systems Networking

->Active Directory



This allows you to build tools that align with the real student environments and support workflows we operate in.



Requirements:



->Strong English written and verbal communication skills

->Excellent organization and follow-up abilities

->Comfort enforcing structure and accountability

->Ability to manage onboarding, progress, and workflows simultaneously

->Experience working full-time for one employer is strongly preferred

->Self-starter — requires minimal supervision

->Strong work ethic, punctuality, and consistency

->Ability to evaluate information, identify patterns, and escalate issues clearly

->Desire to be part of a structured, success-driven team



How to Apply:



To apply for this position, please visit Your Essential Techs Careers Page (
) and submit an application. We encourage all applicants to include a cover letter, portfolio, GitHub, technical case study, or examples of previous automation / AI / integration work with their submission.



This is a full-time remote position (40 hours per week). During the initial phase of the role, work hours will primarily align with U.S. Pacific Time for collaboration, implementation meetings, and support workflow alignment, typically:



->8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST, Monday through Friday



Depending on the needs of the organization and support operations, some flexibility for overlap with after-hours support discussions or implementation coordination may occasionally be required.



Candidates must be:



->Comfortable working in a founder-led organization

->Flexible and open to evolving technical priorities as the role and systems mature

->Available for consistent overlap with U.S. Pacific Time throughout all phases



This role is long-term, and schedule adjustments will be communicated clearly in advance as operational needs change.



Equal Opportunity Employer:



Your Essential Techs is an equal-opportunity employer. All employment decisions, hiring, promotion, discipline, or discharge, are based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender identity/expression, sexual orientation, veteran status, or any protected category under local, state, or federal law.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About Paradiso Insurance

At Paradiso Insurance, we believe insurance is about people first. We serve our clients and community with energy, heart, and commitment to growth—both personally and professionally. We move fast, support each other, and take pride in building something meaningful together.

Position Overview

We’re looking for a creative and detail-oriented Static Marketing & Social Media Coordinator to bring our brand to life across digital and print platforms. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys creating clean, engaging static visuals, keeping social media fresh and consistent, and ensuring our websites and blogs stay current and on-brand.

You’ll play a key role in how our audience experiences Paradiso every day—from social posts and flyers to website updates and blog content.

Key Responsibilities

Creative & Design

• Design static marketing assets including social media graphics, flyers, one-pagers, and promotional materials

• Maintain brand consistency across all visual content

• Support campaigns, events, and community initiatives with creative assets

Social Media Management

• Manage and schedule content across social platforms (e.g., Instagram,
, LinkedIn)

• Create engaging static posts aligned with marketing goals and campaigns

• Monitor comments and messages and flag opportunities for engagement

Website & Blog Management

• Update and maintain website content, including landing pages and general updates

• Format, upload, and publish blog posts

• Ensure content is accurate, up to date, and optimized for clarity and user experience

Collaboration & Execution

• Work closely with marketing, sales, and leadership to support initiatives

• Take projects from concept to completion with minimal oversight

• Manage multiple deadlines while maintaining high-quality output

What Success Looks Like

• Consistent, high-quality visuals that reflect the Paradiso brand
