title: Senior Meta Ads Media Buyer ($7 to $12/ hour )
description:
>>About the role



We are a fast growing performance marketing agency generating leads across multiple industries. Our campaigns are already live. This role is not about launching ads. It is about diving into active accounts, finding what is underperforming, and fixing it with precision.



You will report directly to the Operations Manager and Founders. Your work will be seen and acted on immediately.



>>Core responsibilities



>Monitor all active Meta, Google, and TikTok campaigns daily during BST hours

>Analyze data to identify optimization opportunities across CPL, CPA, and conversion rate

>Diagnose performance drops and implement fixes quickly with clear reasoning

>Spot creative fatigue early and brief new testing angles backed by data

>Adjust targeting, budgets, bid strategies, and campaign structure based on evidence

>Wont need to create ads as the dashboard can create images and videos, they just need to be able to identify new hooks etc.

>If you are comfortable coming up with new angles/hooks etc. 

>Able to research into competitors for new angles and coming up with creative briefs.

>Produce concise weekly performance reports with actionable recommendations

>Communicate daily through Slack and manage tasks in ClickUp independently



>>Requirements



>3 or more years managing Meta Ads in a performance focused 

environment

>Proven experience optimizing existing accounts, not just launching campaigns

>Solid understanding of lead generation funnels and conversion mechanics

>Comfortable analyzing large scale Ads Manager accounts with significant daily spend

>Hands on experience with Google Ads, TikTok Ads, and GoHighLevel

>Available full time during BST business hours

>Strong written communication and self managed workflow



>>Logic question  (required)



You are managing a Meta lead generation campaign. Over the past 7 days CPL has increased by 68?spite budget, audience, and creative all remaining unchanged. iOS traffic accounts for 60% of impressions. Frequency is at 2.1. Landing page conversion rate has dropped from 18% to 9%.



Walk us through your full diagnostic process. What do you check first, in what order, and why? What is your hypothesis and what action do you take?



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We are evaluating how you think, how you structure a problem, and the depth of your knowledge.



>>Video introduction  (required)



Record a 2 to 3 minute video and upload to Loom or Google Drive. Include the link in your application. Cover who you are, your experience with paid media, a specific result you are proud of with real numbers, and why this role is the right fit for you.



Read carefully before applying



To confirm you have read this post in full, begin your cover letter with the exact phrase "I want to be lucky". Applications that do not open with this phrase will not be reviewed.



>>What we offer



$7 to $12 USD per hour based on experience, reviewed after probation



Full time remote position with a stable and growing agency

Direct access to Founders and Operations Manager with no middle layers



Fast moving environment where your decisions have immediate visible impact



****How to apply****

Submit your cover letter starting with the required phrase, and your video link. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: WordPress & Shopify Store Developer
description:
Arispheris is looking for a highly skilled Website Developer to join our team for a 3-month full-time project term, with potential for extension. This is a remote position, but we require a designer who can work independently, take initiative, and bring fresh, original creativity to the table—no AI-generated websites will be accepted.



If you thrive in an environment that values creative autonomy, attention to detail, and hands-on design skills, we’d love to hear from you.



Company Overview

Arispheris is a staffing firm that provides authentic and connective staffing solutions for small business owners. We take pride in our in-depth recruiting process, ensuring that every professional we bring on board has the skills and drive to succeed.



We are actively expanding our design team and are looking for a Website Developer who excels at crafting fast and SEO ready websites to support clients in reaching their target audiences to increase revenue and website traffic. If you want to be part of a team that values true creative expertise, this is the perfect opportunity for you!



Requirements & Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Web development or related field, or relevant experience.

Minimum of 2 years of professional experience in website design and coding.

Website and software application designing, building, or maintaining, without AI.

Using scripting or authoring languages, management tools, content creation tools, applications, and digital media.

Conferring with teams to resolve conflicts, prioritize needs, develop content criteria, or choose solutions.

Directing or performing Website updates.

Developing or validating test routines and schedules to ensure that test cases mimic external interfaces and address all browser and device types.

Editing, writing, or designing Website content, and directing tea
mbers who produce content.

Maintaining an understanding of the latest Web applications and programming practices through education, study, and training. 

Back up files from Web sites to local directories for recovery.

Create daily logs of tasks completed for company and client reference.

Identifying problems uncovered by customer feedback and testing, and correcting or referring problems to appropriate personnel for correction.

Evaluating code to ensure it meets industry standards, is valid, is properly structured, and is compatible with browsers, devices, or operating systems.

Determining user needs by analyzing technical requirements.

Must be highly proficient in both WordPress, their respective plugins, & Shopify—you will be tested during the interview.

Strong sense of design composition.

Ability to create websites quickly and efficiently while maintaining a high standard of design quality.

Excellent communication skills and ability to work collaboratively with clients and teams.

Detail-oriented and capable of handling multiple projects at once while meeting deadlines.

Familiarity with tools like Google Workspace, Slack, and Asana is a plus.

Absolutely no AI-generated designs, portfolios, and websites will be considered.



Software & Platform Requirements:

Expertise in WordPress, Shopify and Elementor

Solid understanding of UX/UI principles

Proficiency in HTML and Python coding

Experience with affiliate marketing strategies

Proficiency with Shopify e-commerce platforms



Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote position (3-month term, potential for extension based on performance)

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills

Bi-monthly pay via money transfer

Paid career training relevant to the role (should you be hired for longer than nine months) 

Performance-based bonuses (available for long-term staff)

Work-life balance and flexible hours



As part of our team, you'll interact closely with clients, forming strong partnerships. You'll use your excellent communication skills to understand, negotiate, and ultimately create tailored solutions that exceed expectations. Does the idea of such meaningful client engagement unnerve you? If not, then you're ready to contribute to our shared vision. Here are the next steps to move forward.



***Very Important***

How to Apply

We will be holding interviews on Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday this week for immediate hiring contingent on your skills, your interview task performance and company fit.



To Apply, Follow These Steps:

Reply with your Name and Position in the subject line. Example: "John Doe – WordPress & Shopify Store Developer"

Define a "backend developer staging area" in WordPress/ CPanel (this is part of your application process).



Submit the following in your response
:

Your resume (CV)

Portfolio links showcasing your original design work (Absolutely NO AI-generated websites. Wordpress & Shopify Shops ONLY)

List links to Wordpress & Shopify Sites you have designed.

One employer reference



Candidates that do not submit the requested items will not be considered. 



Once we receive your application, we will send you a scheduler to book your interview slot. During your interview, you will be required to demonstrate proficiency in Wordpress, Developer Backend, and Shopify Shop Setup.



If you’re ready to bring your creativity to a team that values real site developer expertise, we look forward to your application!

title: Storytelling, Journalism Content Writer (No AI Writers)
description:
Arispheris seeks an experienced and highly driven content writer responsible for creating written content for various platforms such as websites, blogs, social media, and marketing materials for a 3-month full-time project. Their main goal is to create engaging and informative content that will attract and retain the attention of their audience and to create eye-catching marketing and publication materials for online-based businesses, without the use of AI. You will also be responsible for coming up with original content for marketing materials for the company and its clients. They must have excellent writing and communication skills, as well as a strong understanding of SEO principles to create written content that is optimized for search engines, independent of any AI platforms.



You will be collaborating with tea
mbers in the Philippines and clients throughout the US and Europe; therefore, you must have excellent communication skills, a flexible schedule, and the ability to meet and work during specified time zones.



Company Overview

Arispheris is a staffing firm that provides authentic and connective staffing solutions for the small business owner. We provide in-depth recruiting processes to ensure that clients will have the best experience with our remote professionals.



We are actively seeking individuals with your abilities to join our team as we try to expand each of our departments. If you are interested in working remotely with a flexible schedule and demonstrating your creativity by crafting new and compelling written content for our company and diverse clients, then Arispheris is the company for you!



We seek a qualified candidate with the following qualifications for this position:

Bachelor's degree in English, journalism, marketing, or a related field

2+ years of experience in content writing, preferably in a professional setting

Excellent writing and editing skills, with a strong attention to detail, without the use of AI

Knowledge of SEO principles and experience optimizing content for search engines

Ability to research and gather information on various topics, without the use of AI

Strong communication skills and ability to work well in a team environment

Familiarity with content management systems (CMS) and basic HTML skills is a plus



Software & Platform Knowledge & Experience in the following:

Google Workspace

Canva

Microsoft Office Suites

Asana, Slack, Klayvio and Hubstaff

ClickFunnels and Shopfiy is a plus, but not required

Seeking: Expert Level in Excel/Google Sheets 



Job Highlights

Great compensation and benefits

Work-life balance

Work community incentives

Long-term career opportunity

Wonderful coworkers



Key responsibilities of a content writer include:



Researching and gathering information on various topics to create accurate and informative content, without the use of AI

Writing and editing engaging and SEO-friendly content for websites, blogs, social media, and marketing materials

Collaborating with tea
mbers, including designers and SEO specialists, to ensure content aligns with brand guidelines and SEO strategy

Collaborating with tea
mbers and clients to determine content needs and goals

Analyzing and measuring the success of content through metrics such as website traffic and engagement

Participating in brainstorming sessions to generate ideas for new written content

Ensuring all content is proofread and error-free before publication, without the use of AI

Developing ideas and creating outlines for new content

Reviewing and proofreading content for accuracy and grammar errors

Utilizing SEO best practices to optimize content for search engines

Updating and maintaining content on websites and other platforms

Interviewing clients to get acquainted with their overall business identity and branding preferences to create compelling content for the company and clients

Creating a directory and maintaining the organization of all content materials for the company and for each client.

Ensuring that contents and final deliverables comply with company and clients' guidelines, specifications, and preferences, and achieving the highest standard of written quality, without the use of AI.

Maintaining an eagerness to expand individual skillsets by utilizing company resources and leaning into areas of improvement.



The candidate we’re looking for has:

Unrivaled eye for writing, storytelling, creativity, and resourcefulness

Can write without using AI

Capability to create social media captions, postings, publication materials, and similar content on the fly.

Ability to adapt their writing style to fit the tone and audience of their projects

Exceptional verbal and written communication skills

Outstanding interpersonal skills and strong sense of collaboration with different departments

Ability to set priorities and meet deadlines

Comfortable providing suggestions to help the company and clients

Unparalleled attention to detail

Ability to work on multiple projects/clients simultaneously and adhere to strict deadlines

Ability to make evaluative judgments

Flexibility to create strategies quickly & effectively

Attentiveness & integrity

Friendly, emphatic, approachable, and professional demeanor

Ability to work well with internal and external parties



As a Content Writer, you may be entrusted with a variety of duties. The qualifications, responsibilities, and skill sets outlined above are merely a sampling of the duties that you will be responsible for. Job duties are expected to be carried out with minor to no supervision.



Compensation & Benefits

Full-time remote position (3-month term, potential for extension based on performance)

Competitive compensation based on experience and skills

Bi-monthly pay via money transfer

Paid career training relevant to the role

Performance-based bonuses

Work-life balance and flexible hours



How to Apply

We will be holding interviews on Wednesday, Friday, and Saturday of this and next week for immediate hiring, contingent on your skills, your interview task performance and company fit.



To Apply, Follow These Steps:

Reply with your Name and Position in the subject line. Example: "John Doe – Storytelling, Journalism, Writing Content Creator "

Share a story about your favourite food (this is part of your application process).



Submit the following:

Your resume (CV)

Portfolio links showcasing your original written work (no AI-generated content)

Publications you have written and published (if applicable)

title: Senior AI Systems Engineer (Real-Time Voice + Agent Architecture)
description:
We are building a high-performance AI operating system (LifeOS) with real-time execution.



This is NOT a chatbot project.



We are looking for a senior engineer capable of building a real-time AI pipeline with voice interaction and multi-agent routing.



CORE REQUIREMENTS:



1. Voice pipeline (REAL-TIME)

- microphone input

- streaming STT (speech-to-text)

- real-time processing through AI engine

- response generation

- streaming TTS (text-to-speech)



2. Agent routing (CRITICAL)

- ATHENA (Individual) ? must ALWAYS be used for Individual

- TARA (Ventures) ? must ALWAYS be used for Ventures

- NO cross-routing

- must be enforced at backend level (NOT UI)



3. Execution layer

- real actions (calendar, integrations)

- create / update / delete (real API execution)

- NO mock or fake execution



4. Performance

- real-time streaming

- low latency

- stable system



TECH STACK (flexible, but must justify):

- Python / Node.js

- FastAPI / WebSockets

- OpenAI / Claude

- STT: Whisper / Deepgram / Google

- TTS: ElevenLabs / Azure

- Redis / event-driven architecture



IMPORTANT:

- Senior level only

- You must have built real-time systems before

- No junior / no basic AI tools experience



TO APPLY — REQUIRED:

Answer these 3 questions:



1. How would you build a real-time voice pipeline (mic ? STT ? AI ? TTS)?

2. How do you enforce strict backend routing between multiple agents?

3. How do you reduce latency in a streaming AI system?



We are moving fast and expect production-level execution.



No partial delivery. Only complete systems.

title: SharePoint / Microsoft 365 Expert
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



About the Organization 



EJF Real Estate Services and The Nabo Group are growing organizations focused on real estate investment and property/HOA management across multiple regions. Our operations rely heavily on structured document management, secure collaboration, and scalable systems to support property portfolios, boards, and internal teams. 



We are undergoing a transformation to modernize and standardize our Microsoft 365 environment, with a strong focus on SharePoint Online, governance, and operational efficiency. 



Overview 



We are seeking an experienced SharePoint & Microsoft 365 Architect to design and implement a scalable, secure, and governance-driven collaboration environment tailored to a multi-entity real estate and property management organization within the Corporate IT Department. 



This role will focus on building a structured and standardized environment across SharePoint Online, Microsoft Teams, OneDrive, and Microsoft Entra ID, enabling efficient document management, controlled access, and future-ready AI and automation capabilities. 



The ideal candidate is a strategic architect, not just an administrator, with experience designing environments that support distributed teams, regional operations, and complex permission models.



Duties & Responsibilities:



Architecture & Design:

 

•  Design enterprise-grade SharePoint Online architecture aligned to:  

 -  Properties / communities (HOAs)  

 -  Regions / portfolios  

 -  Internal departments (Finance, Operations, Legal, etc.)  

•  Implement a hub-and-spoke model with clear hierarchy and navigation  

•  Define scalable information architecture:  

 -  Metadata vs folder structures  

 -  Content types and taxonomy  

 -  Standardized document libraries  

•  Establish site provisioning models and templates for repeatable property onboarding  

•  Align SharePoint with Microsoft Teams and OneDrive usage patterns  



Governance & Compliance:

 

•  Develop and document a SharePoint governance framework tailored to property management operations:  

 -  Naming conventions (properties, regions, departments)  

 -  Site lifecycle management (onboarding/offboarding properties)  

 -  Permission models (board members, internal staff, vendors)  

•  Implement data governance and compliance controls:  

 -  Retention policies for property records and financial documents  

 -  Sensitivity labels and secure document handling  

 -  External sharing controls for board members and third parties  

•  Ensure alignment with real estate and property management operational needs  



Microsoft 365 Integration:  



•  Architect seamless integration across:  

 -  SharePoint Online  

 -  Microsoft Teams (for property and internal collaboration)  

 -  OneDrive (personal vs organizational data boundaries)  

 -  Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) 

•  Design scalable identity and access strategies:  

 -  Role-based access (internal staff, board members, vendors)  

 -  Group-based provisioning  

 -  Conditional access awareness  



Automation & AI Readiness:

 

•  Structure SharePoint for Microsoft Copilot readiness (clean, well-organized data)  

•  Identify opportunities for:  

 -  Power Automate workflows (approvals, document routing, onboarding)  

 -  Process automation for property management operations  

•  Improve search, discoverability, and document intelligence  



Migration & Optimization:



•  Assess current SharePoint and file storage environments  

•  Identify gaps, duplication, and inefficiencies  

•  Develop a migration and consolidation strategy  

•  Optimize usability for both:  

 -  Internal teams  

 -  Non-technical users (property managers, board members)  



Documentation & Knowledge Transfer:

 

•  Deliver:  

 -  Architecture diagrams  

 -  Governance framework documentation  

 -  Implementation and rollout roadmap  

•  Provide knowledge transfer to internal IT leadership and support teams  





Required Qualifications:

 

•  5+ years of experience with SharePoint Online (modern experience required)  

•  5+ years across the Microsoft 365 ecosystem  

•  Proven experience designing enterprise or multi-entity SharePoint architectures  

•  Strong understanding of:  

 -  Microsoft Teams & SharePoint integration  

 -  Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)  

 -  Complex permission and access control models  

•  Experience with:  

 -  Metadata and taxonomy design  

 -  Governance frameworks  

 -  Scalable site provisioning strategies  





Preferred Qualifications:

 

•  Experience supporting property management, real estate, or HOA environments  

•  Experience with multi-entity or portfolio-based organizations  

•  Familiarity with:  

 -  Microsoft Purview (retention, compliance, labeling)  

 -  Power Platform (Power Automate, Power Apps)  

 -  Microsoft Copilot readiness and data structuring  

• Microsoft certifications (nice to have):  

 -  MS-100 / MS-101  

 -  MS-700  

 -  SharePoint / M365 certifications 



Working Hours: 9:00 am – 5:00 pm EST; Monday – Friday (US time zones)



Benefits: HMO and PTO after 90 days.



How to apply:

1. Please check out the company website before submitting an application: 
.

 attachment with your updated resume in PDF format.

3. Please indicate that you're hourly rate in USD..

4. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description, and include your OnlineJobs.PH profile link.



Kindly send your application to

Looking forward to working with you!

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
description:
Description

We’re looking for a Full Stack Software Engineer to help build and maintain an AI-native product used by real customers in complex, high-stakes environments. This role is product-focused and execution-heavy, ideal for an engineer who enjoys shipping features, fixing real-world issues, and improving systems that people depend on daily.



You will work on a mix of new feature development and ongoing product maintenance, supporting an AI-powered platform that turns scattered organizational knowledge into usable, structured answers. You will not be operating in a vacuum. Designs, direction, and architectural guidance already exist. Your job is to help turn that into reliable, scalable product functionality.



If you enjoy full-stack work, moving quickly with clear direction, and contributing to a meaningful AI product without reinventing everything from scratch, this role is a strong fit.



Why You’ll Want to Join

- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you’re most productive

- Work on a real AI product serving government and enterprise customers

- Clear scope, strong technical guidance, and product-driven priorities

- Opportunity to grow as a product engineer inside an AI-first company



What You’ll Work On



Full-Stack Product Development

- Build and ship full-stack features for an AI-native platform

- Implement product designs using React and TypeScript on the front end

- Develop and maintain backend services using Node.js

- Work within existing architecture while contributing clean, maintainable code

- Turn well-defined requirements into working product features efficiently



Maintenance and Product Hardening

- Fix bugs and address issues in existing production systems

- Improve configurability and self-service capabilities for customers

- Support updates and refinements required for ongoing customer use

- Help keep the platform stable, reliable, and easy to operate



Collaboration and Execution

- Work closely with US-based engineers on scoped feature work

- Follow established patterns and architectural guidance

- Communicate clearly about progress, blockers, and tradeoffs

- Contribute to documentation and handoffs when needed



Infrastructure Support (Secondary)

- Assist with infrastructure-related tasks as needed

- Help deploy tools or support foundational infrastructure work when scoped

- Collaborate with infra-focused contractors or engineers as required



What You Bring

- 6+ years of experience as a software engineer working on production systems

- Strong experience building full-stack applications

- Proficiency with React, TypeScript, and Node.js

- Comfort working within an existing codebase and improving it incrementally

- Ability to debug issues, ship fixes, and move features forward independently

- Clear written and verbal communication skills

- Experience working in product-driven or startup environments



Nice to Have

- Experience working on AI-powered or data-heavy products

- Familiarity with government, enterprise, or compliance-driven systems

- Exposure to infrastructure or deployment workflows

- Experience supporting long-lived products, not just greenfield builds



How to Apply

Please include:

1. Your updated resume

2. A short 1 to 2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and describing a full-stack product you’ve worked on, including what you owned and shipped

Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be considered.



If you enjoy building real product features, improving existing systems, and contributing to an AI platform that helps organizations actually use their knowledge, this role offers clear scope, strong support, and meaningful impact without chaos.



Application Process Overview

Our comprehensive selection process ensures we find the right fit for both you and our clients:

1. Initial Application - Submit your application and complete our prequalifying questions

2. Video Introduction - Record an video introduction to showcase your communication skills and work experience

3. Role-Specific Assessment - Complete a homework assignment tailored to the position (if applicable)

4. Recruitment Interview - Initial screening with our talent team

5. Executive Interview - Meet with senior leadership to discuss role alignment

6. Client Interview - Final interview with the client team you'd be supporting

7. Background & Reference Check - Professional reference verification

8. Job Offer - Successful candidates receive a formal offer to join the team



Each stage is designed to evaluate your fit for the role while giving you insights into our company culture and expectations. 



We'll keep you informed throughout the process and provide feedback at each step.

title: Backend Software Engineer (AI Systems & Automation)
description:
Description

We're looking for an AI-enabled, product-minded Backend Software Engineer to strengthen the technical foundation of a global, digital-first higher education institution.



This is not a traditional backend role and it is not a purely internal one. More than 60% of your time will be spent working directly with a small number of high-value enterprise accounts through Slack and Zoom, camera on, alongside the business team and their product engineers. You will handle complex backend integrations, navigate regulated workflows, and design solutions for real client concerns in real time. The ability to communicate clearly and confidently on camera with technical counterparts at enterprise customers is not optional here.



The remaining time is spent strengthening the internal product: designing scalable systems, integrating AI into production workflows, and contributing to long-term architecture. AI usage must go beyond personal productivity. You need hands-on experience integrating AI into live systems, and practical experience using Claude Code or similar AI coding copilots in real development environments.



This role requires full alignment with US working hours.



Why You'll Want to Join

- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- High-ownership engineering role inside a product-driven organization

- Opportunity to shape long-term architecture and AI-enabled workflows

- Direct collaboration with product, engineering, and enterprise clients



What You'll Work On

Enterprise Client Support and Technical Engagement

- Spend more than 60% of your time embedded with a small number of high-value enterprise accounts through Slack and Zoom

- Engage directly with technical counterparts at enterprise customers, camera on, to understand their needs and design solutions

- Handle complex backend integrations and regulated workflows on behalf of enterprise clients

- Translate client requirements into clear technical solutions and communicate tradeoffs confidently

- Collaborate with the business team and client-side product engineers to ensure solutions land correctly



AI-Integrated Product Architecture

- Design and implement backend systems that integrate AI directly into production workflows

- Use Claude Code or similar AI copilots as a core part of your engineering workflow

- Build AI-powered features that support core product functionality

- Identify automation opportunities across internal and client-facing systems

- Contribute to AI architecture decisions and long-term scalability planning



Backend System Design and Scalability

- Architect and build scalable, reliable backend services

- Design APIs and service layers that support complex product and client initiatives

- Work with distributed systems, databases, and cloud infrastructure

- Improve performance, reliability, and resilience across the product



End-to-End Product Ownership

- Take ownership of technical components from design through deployment and optimization

- Collaborate with product and design teams to translate user needs into robust technical solutions

- Proactively identify bottlenecks, inefficiencies, and architectural risks

- Contribute to long-term roadmap planning and infrastructure decisions



Engineering Standards and Team Contribution

- Write clean, maintainable, well-tested code

- Contribute to CI/CD pipelines, observability, and monitoring improvements

- Participate in architectural discussions and technical trade-off decisions

- Support junior and mid-level engineers through thoughtful code reviews and mentorship



What You Bring

- 4+ years of professional software engineering experience in a product-focused startup environment

- Backend-leaning engineering profile with comfort pushing full stack end-to-end when the work calls for it

- Demonstrated experience integrating AI into production systems and workflows

- Practical experience using Claude Code, strongly preferred, or comparable AI coding copilots in real development environments

- Proven ability to communicate clearly and confidently on camera with technical counterparts at enterprise or high-value accounts

- Strong system design fundamentals including databases, service architectures, and distributed systems

- Experience working in fast-paced or scaling startups

- Background in product companies rather than services, agency, or consulting-heavy environments

- Strong ownership mindset with ability to work autonomously

- Full availability during US business hours



Preferred but not strictly required:

- Experience with TypeScript, Python, or Java

- Exposure to GCP, Spanner, Redis, or similar cloud infrastructure

- Strong academic background from a reputable university



Nice to Have

- Experience building AI-powered user-facing features

- Background in EdTech or regulated industries

- Experience contributing to architectural modernization efforts

- Prior mentorship or technical leadership experience



How to Apply

Please include:

1. Your updated resume

2. A short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes) describing a production system where you integrated AI into backend architecture, how you used Claude Code or similar tools in your development process, and an example of a time you worked directly with a client or enterprise stakeholder to solve a technical problem



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be considered.



If you are a backend-leaning engineer who integrates AI into real systems, communicates confidently with enterprise clients on camera, and thrives in fast-moving product environments, this role offers architectural influence, direct client impact, and meaningful technical ownership.



Application Process Overview

Our comprehensive selection process ensures we find the right fit for both you and our clients:

1. Initial Application - Submit your application and complete our prequalifying questions

2. Video Introduction - Record an video introduction to showcase your communication skills and work experience

3. Role-Specific Assessment - Complete a homework assignment tailored to the position (if applicable)

4. Recruitment Interview - Initial screening with our talent team

5. Executive Interview - Meet with senior leadership to discuss role alignment

6. Client Interview - Final interview with the client team you'd be supporting

7. Background & Reference Check - Professional reference verification

8. Job Offer - Successful candidates receive a formal offer to join the team



Each stage is designed to evaluate your fit for the role while giving you insights into our company culture and expectations. 



We'll keep you informed throughout the process and provide feedback at each step.

title: Lead Generation - Permanent WFH
description:
We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Lead Generation Specialist to drive consistent and high-quality leads from hospitals across the United States. This in-house role will be responsible for

identifying, researching, and engaging decision-makers in the healthcare industry to support our sales and marketing goals. 



The ideal candidate has experience in
 outreach, understands hospital industry dynamics, and is capable of creating and executing campaigns that align with our brand voice while building trust and opening conversations with qualified prospects. 



 



???? Key Responsibilities: 



Identify and build lists of verified hospital contacts based on our target audience (specific roles, titles, and regions). 

Conduct manual research to validate contact information and relevance. 

Develop tailored outreach messaging based on pain points and campaign objectives. 

Execute
 campaigns using platforms like SendGrid (aligned with Odoo). 

Monitor, manage, and respond to lead replies to nurture them through the pipeline. 

Maintain a consistent tone and messaging aligned with the Cube Care brand. 

Track campaign performance and report on lead quality, objections, and interest. 

Collaborate with sales and marketing to refine messaging and target segments. 

Ensure compliance with
 marketing best practices to avoid blacklisting, especially with healthcare servers. 

 



???? Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): 



Number of verified hospital contacts added monthly (target: 300+). 

Number of high-quality, engaged leads generated (target: 10–15 per month). 

 open rate (target: >35%) and reply rate (target: >8%). 

Number of
 campaigns executed per quarter (target: 2–3). 

Conversion rate from lead to opportunity (measured jointly with sales). 

Timely reporting and insights provided weekly. 

Consistency in messaging and alignment with brand tone and values. 

 



???? Requirements: 



Proven experience in lead generation, sales development, or
 outreach (healthcare industry preferred). 

Strong research skills and attention to detail. 

Familiarity with tools like SendGrid, Odoo (or similar CRM) 

Clear, persuasive written communication skills. 

Ability to work independently and manage time effectively. 

Comfortable handling large data lists and segmenting based on target criteria. 

 



???? Preferred: 



Prior experience generating leads within hospitals or the healthcare industry. 

Experience integrating CRM data for outreach and reporting. 







System Requirements:



Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording

title: B2B Sales Represenatative
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embody Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Sales Professionals!



Key Responsibilities:

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Tech-savvy, with proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, CRM software, and virtual communication tools (e.g., Microsoft Teams, Zoom).



System Requirements:

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

title: Fluent English Healthcare Appointment Setter – Part-Time – 5 Hours/Day to start
description:
We are hiring a high-quality appointment setter who can do more than just make calls. We need someone who can generate real meetings, communicate clearly, and speak fluent, professional English.



This is a remote, part-time outbound calling role focused on booking qualified 20-minute introductory Zoo
etings with healthcare-related buyers in the United States.



In this position, you will be calling healthcare-related businesses, distributors, DME/HME companies, and other relevant accounts, identifying the correct contact, and setting meetings for our sales team.



This is not a general virtual assistant position.



This is a phone-based sales role for someone who is confident, organized, professional, and comfortable speaking with U.S. business contacts.



What You Will Be Doing



Make outbound cold calls to targeted healthcare-related accounts in the United States

Professionally navigate gatekeepers

Identify the appropriate buyer or decision-maker

Schedule qualified 20-minute Zoo
etings

Send follow-up and reminder
s

Update Zoho CRM in real time with notes, call outcomes, and next steps

Stay organized with follow-up activity and help keep opportunities moving forward



What We Sell



We represent a growing healthcare product line with a broad product portfolio.



Who This Role Is For



This opportunity is best for someone who:



Speaks very clear, fluent English

Sounds natural, confident, and professional on the phone

Has real cold calling and appointment setting experience

Is comfortable calling U.S. businesses

Knows how to professionally work through gatekeepers

Can stay organized and disciplined in CRM

Wants a performance-driven role where results matter



Requirements



Excellent spoken English and strong listening skills

Proven experience in cold calling and appointment setting

Experience calling U.S. businesses

Experience calling healthcare, medical, HME/DME, distribution, or other B2B accounts is a major plus

Comfortable using Zoho CRM or a similar CRM platform

Available 5 hours per day, 25 hours per week, during U.S. Pacific Time business hours

Reliable internet connection and a quiet calling environment

Strong follow-up habits and attention to detail



Compensation



Hourly rate, depending on experience



Plus



$25.00 to $40.00 for every qualified appointment that attends the Zoo
eting



What Success Looks Like



You sound polished, warm, and credible on the phone

You know how to get to the right person

You can create interest without overexplaining

You consistently book qualified meetings

You keep CRM notes accurate, clean, and current

You help generate a real pipeline



How To Apply



Please send all of the following:



A short summary of your cold calling and appointment setting experience

A voice recording introducing yourself and explaining your background

The industries you have called into before

Any results you can share, including appointments booked, show rates, or conversion numbers

Your hourly rate expectation



To show attention to detail, please put the phrase “Fluent English” in the subject line and also apply with 7 Apply Points.



Important



We are looking for someone who can actually move the needle.



If you are fluent in English, confident on the phone, organized in CRM, and know how to book real meetings with U.S. prospects, we would like to hear from you.
salary: $ per hour DOE + 25 - 40$ for appts set

title: Pixel-Perfect Web Developer for 1:1 Single-Page Replica (Offline Personal Project)
description:
Hey there! I am looking for a talented front-end developer to help me "vibe code" a one-for-one offline replica of a specific single-page website.



This is strictly for a personal project. I’ve tried doing it myself using AI coding assistants like Claude Code and Manus, but I just couldn't get it to look exactly right. I need the human touch—someone with a meticulous eye for detail who can take an image/screenshot I provide and recreate it so it looks absolutely identical to the original.



Since I’m not a coding expert, I need someone who can handle the technical heavy lifting using their own tools. Right now, this is just a one-page project, and it will be used completely offline.



What You Will Do:

*Take an image/screenshot of a webpage and translate it into a functional, 1:1 exact HTML/CSS replica.

*Ensure the layout, spacing, fonts, and colors are a pixel-perfect match to the reference image.

*Package the files so I can easily open and view the single-page site offline on my local computer.

*If needed, guide me through creating any free accounts (like GitHub, etc.) just to transfer or host the files so I can download them easily.



What I’m Looking For:

*Strong Front-End Skills: Excellent grasp of HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript (if needed for the page's layout/animations).

*Insane Attention to Detail: "Close enough" won't work for this; I need it to be identical to the image provided.

*Independence: You have your own workflow and tools to get the job done efficiently.

*Great Communication: You can explain simple steps to someone who isn't a coding pro.



To Apply:

Please start your application by telling me about a time you had to do a "pixel-perfect" design conversion. If you have any portfolio links showing an original design next to your coded version, please include them!



Once hired, I will provide the reference image and we can get started right away.

title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:
Do you love video editing and want to grow your career in content creation?



We're looking for talented video editors who are ready to take on a bigger role as a Content Specialist.



In this role, you'll do more than just edit. You’ll be trained on our internal systems to create short-form captions using AI, schedule social media posts through our platform, and manage content workflows for your assigned client.



We are a content agency, and we often repurpose longer-form videos for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, as well as audiograms and graphics for social media. We also edit their raw videos for YouTube and edit podcast episodes as well.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit short-form and long-form content (YouTube, Reels, TikTok, podcasts)

Use our AI captioning system to create short-form captions

Schedule content to automatically post inside our proprietary platform

Follow creative direction and provide consistent, high-quality execution

Participate in weekly training sessions to continually improve your skills



Who We’re Looking For:



Professional experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools

Strong eye for motion design and storytelling

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage your time independently

Positive attitude and willingness to receive feedback

Excellent communication skills and a self-starter mindset

Comfortable learning new tools and systems



What We Offer:



Guaranteed client placement upon successful training

Monthly salary of $700 to $1,000 USD paid directly by the client

Weekly training and ongoing support

100% remote work

title: E-commerce Customer Support Specialist
description:
We are an e-commerce jewelry brand focused on quality and customer trust. We are looking for a proactive, detail-oriented professional to manage our daily customer interactions and supplier logistics.



The Mission

Your goal is twofold: provide a premium experience that keeps customers happy and protect the brand by minimizing complaints and chargebacks through proactive management.



Core Responsibilities



Proactive Support: 

Manage all incoming customer inquiries 
/Social Media) with a high degree of empathy and brand alignment.



Chargeback Prevention: 

Monitor high-risk orders, verify addresses, and resolve disputes before they escalate to bank-level chargebacks.



Supplier Coordination: 

Daily communication with suppliers to ensure order accuracy, track shipments, and resolve stock issues.



Logistics Monitoring: 

Perform daily audits of tracking numbers. If a delay is spotted, you must inform the customer before they reach out to us.



Issue Reporting: 

Maintain a daily log of common product complaints or supplier errors to help the manager improve the supply chain.



Requirements



Languages: Native Spanish and Fluent English are mandatory. French is a strong plus.



Availability: 2-3 hours per day, 7 days a week. Consistency is key to preventing shipping delays and customer frustration.



Skills: Strong negotiation skills (for supplier relations) and a "customer-first" problem-solving mindset.

CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Required Experience & Education

title: Program Operations Manager – IT Infrastructure Training Programs
description:
Google Docs Version [Copy & Paste In Browser]: 



We are seeking a competent Program Operations Manager to join our team. This role is responsible for managing student onboarding, progress, execution, and accountability across our online IT training programs, specifically Community Masterclass and Career Launcher.



This position includes working directly with the founder, Dexter & our Infrastructure support team to onboard new students after enrollment and ensure they are properly set up, oriented, and aligned with program expectations from day one.



We are looking for a full-time Program Operations Manager who can guide students through onboarding, monitor progress, enforce structured execution, and maintain high program standards throughout the student lifecycle. This role is ideal for someone with IT help desk or systems administration experience who understands how infrastructure concepts build in real-world environments.



If you're willing to take ownership, follow systems, and help others succeed in a structured learning environment, you will be SUCCESSFUL and find a long-term career opportunity with room for growth.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             

Time spent in the organization should reflect a 90/10 ratio for production/organization.



Your Essential Techs:



Your Essential Techs is a top-rated digital marketing agency in El Cajon, California, founded in 2021 by Dexter Blanco. We streamline, optimize, and scale local businesses’ online presence with data-driven SEO, CRO, and web design.



We also operate an Information Technology training and mentorship division, helping individuals break into IT roles through hands-on labs, structured programs, and accountability-driven education.



Role Purpose:

->Ensure students are properly onboarded and set up for success

->Maintain structure, accountability, and execution across training programs

->Deliver a professional, real-world learning experience aligned with IT environments

->Support student progress from onboarding through completion

->Build a disciplined, high-standard learning culture



Key Responsibilities:

->Student Onboarding (With Founder Support)

->Assist Dexter with onboarding new students after enrollment

->Guide students through:

-->Platform access

-->Community orientation

-->Program structure and expectations

->Ensure students understand:

-->How the program works

-->What accountability looks like

-->What “completion” actually means

->Identify onboarding issues early and escalate when needed



Community Masterclass (Intake & Readiness):

->Track student progress and completion percentages

->Monitor engagement and implementation behavior

->Identify students who are ready for Career Launcher

->Flag students who need more preparation before advancing

->Maintain clear visibility into student readiness



Career Launcher (Execution & Accountability):

->Track chapter-by-chapter completion

->Enforce correct task order and prerequisites

->Monitor:

-->Core-4 fundamentals (Hardware, OS, Networking, Active Directory)

-->Hands-on lab execution

-->Documentation and portfolio requirements

->Follow up with students who stall, skip steps, or fall behind

->Identify technical blockers vs accountability issues

->Uphold program standards consistently



Progress Tracking & Reporting

->Maintain accurate student records and status tracking

->Provide weekly summaries to leadership:

-->Newly onboarded students

-->Active students

-->Stalled students

-->Completion trends

->Report recurring execution or curriculum friction points



Preferred IT Background (Strong Advantage):



This role is strongly preferred for candidates with IT experience, including:



->IT Help Desk / Service Desk Leadership Experience

->Junior Systems Administrator or Infrastructure Support experience

->Exposure to virtualization (VMware, Proxmox, Hyper-V, Nutanix, etc.)

->Linux fundamentals

->Windows Server & Active Directory

-->Users, groups, OUs

-->Domain concepts

->Strong foundational networking knowledge (IP addressing, DNS, DHCP, WAN & LAN)



You do not need to be a senior engineer — but you must understand how these systems work in practice and lead others to success using them.



Our Core-4 Knowledge Alignment:



You should be comfortable at an intermediate level with:



->Computer Hardware

->Operating Systems (Windows & Linux)

->Systems Networking

->Active Directory



This allows you to understand student blockers and enforce standards effectively.



Requirements:



->Strong English written and verbal communication skills

->Excellent organization and follow-up abilities

->Comfort enforcing structure and accountability

->Ability to manage onboarding, progress, and workflows simultaneously

->Experience working full-time for one employer is strongly preferred

->Self-starter — requires minimal supervision

->Strong work ethic, punctuality, and consistency

->Ability to evaluate information, identify patterns, and escalate issues clearly

->Desire to be part of a structured, success-driven team



How to Apply:



To apply for this position, please visit Your Essential Techs Careers Page and submit an application. We encourage all applicants to include a cover letter with their submission.



This is a full-time remote position (40 hours per week). During the initial phase of the role, work hours will primarily align with US Pacific Daylight Time, typically:



~ 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST, Monday through Friday, to start [There will definitely be a need for weekend work / flexibility in the schedule after being established in the role for 2-3 Months and building relationships with students & community members]



This role is long-term, and schedule adjustments will be communicated clearly in advance as operational needs change.



Equal Opportunity Employer:



Your Essential Techs is an equal-opportunity employer. All employment decisions, hiring, promotion, discipline, or discharge, are based on merit, competence, performance, and business needs. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender identity/expression, sexual orientation, veteran status, or any protected category under local, state, or federal law.

title: Video Editor / Content Creator (Instagram Ads)
description:
We are an e-commerce jewelry brand looking to scale our paid social campaigns across multiple markets. We need a creative, conversion-focused video editor to produce high-performing Instagram Reels and Ads that drive sales.



The Mission

Your goal is to turn raw footage, product images, and trends into thumb-stopping, high-converting video ads in both Spanish and English. You understand that in e-commerce, the first 3 seconds of a video dictate its success.



Core Responsibilities

Direct-Response Editing: Create engaging, fast-paced video ads (15–30 seconds) optimized specifically for Instagra
ta Ads (9:16 aspect ratio).



Bilingual Content Creation: Write highly effective on-screen text, captions, hooks, and call-to-actions (CTAs) in both native Spanish and fluent English.



Hook Creation: Develop strong visual and textual hooks for the first 1–3 seconds to maximize watch time across both language demographics.



Trend Adaptation: Incorporate culturally relevant trending audio, native text overlays, and dynamic transitions while maintaining an elegant brand aesthetic.



Variation Testing: Deliver multiple variations of a single concept (e.g., swapping the first 3 seconds or the CTA) so our media buyer can A/B test effectively.



Requirements

Languages: Native/Fluent Spanish and Fluent English are mandatory. You must understand how to write compelling sales copy in both languages.



Experience: Proven portfolio of e-commerce video ads (preferably in the fashion, beauty, or jewelry niche).



Software: Mastery of CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects.



Platform Knowledge: Deep understanding of Meta Ads best practices, including platform "safe zones" (so text isn't covered by Instagram's UI).

Requirements

coordination experience

teams (even small ones)

Notion, Trello, Asana, or similar)

communicate with a US-based founder daily

others miss

minimal hand-holding

during US Eastern time overlap (at least 4

hours/day, 8am–12pm EDT)

time zones

Nice to Have

workflows (sprints, pull requests, deployments)

accounting industries

certification

description:
We are seeking a video editor to join our team part time or on a pay-per-video basis. We are a marketing agency who works with furniture businesses, and we are continuing to grow and expand. Our next step is to find a video editor capable of generating high quality video edits for our clients.

title: Social Media Strategist
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Social Media Strategist who specializes in identifying and analyzing viral creatives on TikTok and Instagram worldwide.



Your main responsibility is to source high-performing content and translate insights into actionable strategies for our team.

You will work closely with our Social Media Manager and Affiliate Manager, providing weekly reports and creative direction that help us go viral and scale content performance.



Your Responsibilities

Source and identify top-performing viral creatives (UGC & ads) globally on: TikTok & Instagram



Focus specifically on:

- Hair styling tools niche (must-have experience)

- Viral ad creatives from brands

- Organic UGC content that performs exceptionally well



Deliver a weekly weekend report, including:

- Best performing creatives (with links/examples)

- Key patterns and trends

- Why these creatives perform (hooks, angles, formats)

- Recommendations for replication



Provide strategic insights, including:

- How to adapt creatives to our brand

- Improvements based on awareness stages & target persona

- Ideas for new viral concepts



Advise on:

- What we are currently doing wrong (if applicable)

- How to improve creative performance

- Opportunities to go viral



Work independently and take full ownership of your role



What You Are NOT Responsible For

> Contacting creators

> Managing partnerships

> Outreach



???? Your role is purely focused on sourcing, analysis, and strategy



Our Goals

1. Get as many videos as possible into the algorithm

2. Consistently create viral-performing content

3. Scale winning creative angles globally



Requirements

The ideal candidate:

1. Has proven experience in finding viral content on TikTok & Instagram

2. Has experience within the hair styling tools niche (required)

3. Understands UGC, paid ads, and viral content mechanics

4. Can translate insights into clear, actionable strategies

5. Strong understanding of:

Hooks & retention

Creative angles

Awareness stages & personas

6. Is highly communicative and structured

7. Works independently and takes ownership

8. Uses tools/platforms to identify trending & viral content

9. Shows initiative and thinks proactively

10. Is motivated for a long-term collaboration



Exclusivity Requirement (non-negotiable)

> You are not currently working with, or planning to work with, competing e-commerce brands within the hair styling tools niche

> Full discretion and confidentiality are expected



Compensation

- Fixed hourly rate and minimum weekly hour planning

- Performance-based pay increases

- Bonuses for exceptional results

- Long-term collaboration opportunity



What We Offer

Full flexibility — work when it suits you (weekend reporting required), we care

about the reults.

No micromanagement — we focus on results

Freedom and ownership in your role

Opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling team

Direct impact on brand growth and viral success

To Apply

> A short introduction

> Examples of viral creatives you’ve found (preferably in our niche)

> Case studies or insights you've generated before

> Tools you use to find viral content

> Your availability
