- Viral ad creatives from brands

- Organic UGC content that performs exceptionally well



Deliver a weekly weekend report, including:

- Best performing creatives (with links/examples)

- Key patterns and trends

- Why these creatives perform (hooks, angles, formats)

- Recommendations for replication



Provide strategic insights, including:

- How to adapt creatives to our brand

- Improvements based on awareness stages & target persona

- Ideas for new viral concepts



Advise on:

- What we are currently doing wrong (if applicable)

- How to improve creative performance

- Opportunities to go viral



Work independently and take full ownership of your role



What You Are NOT Responsible For

> Contacting creators

> Managing partnerships

> Outreach



???? Your role is purely focused on sourcing, analysis, and strategy



Our Goals

1. Get as many videos as possible into the algorithm

2. Consistently create viral-performing content

3. Scale winning creative angles globally



Requirements

The ideal candidate:

1. Has proven experience in finding viral content on TikTok & Instagram

2. Has experience within the hair styling tools niche (required)

3. Understands UGC, paid ads, and viral content mechanics

4. Can translate insights into clear, actionable strategies

5. Strong understanding of:

Hooks & retention

Creative angles

Awareness stages & personas

6. Is highly communicative and structured

7. Works independently and takes ownership

8. Uses tools/platforms to identify trending & viral content

9. Shows initiative and thinks proactively

10. Is motivated for a long-term collaboration



Exclusivity Requirement (non-negotiable)

> You are not currently working with, or planning to work with, competing e-commerce brands within the hair styling tools niche

> Full discretion and confidentiality are expected



Compensation

- Fixed hourly rate and minimum weekly hour planning

- Performance-based pay increases

- Bonuses for exceptional results

- Long-term collaboration opportunity



What We Offer

Full flexibility — work when it suits you (weekend reporting required), we care

about the reults.

No micromanagement — we focus on results

Freedom and ownership in your role

Opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling team

Direct impact on brand growth and viral success

To Apply

Send us:

> A short introduction

> Examples of viral creatives you’ve found (preferably in our niche)

> Case studies or insights you've generated before

> Tools you use to find viral content

> Your availability



Add the word “VIRAL” in the subject line to confirm you’ve read the full job description

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
WORK FROM HOME!

Looking to jumpstart your career from home? Join our team!



Mr. Rooter Plumbing of Ottawa is looking for a passionate customer service professional to engage with customers on behalf of the company. Open to full-time employment with a flexible schedule that includes rotating and weekend shifts.

 

Duties & Responsibilities:

Maintaining the productivity and quality of company operations by:

> Receive incoming calls in a professional and courteous manner

> Prioritize and coordinate the scheduling of services

> Coordinate delays in schedule with customers and service technicians

> Use customer development techniques to solicit work through phone,
, mail, and personal customer contacts

> Perform other duties as needed which may include cross-training in related positions

> Work closely with staff to communicate any challenges and come to a resolution.

> Monitoring and implementing standard operating procedures.

 

Background & competencies we’re looking for:

> Experience with call handling in a BPO environment/call center is a must!

> Proven ability to work with minimal supervision.

> Strong verbal & written communication skills in ENGLISH are required.

> Must be willing to work a rotational shift including weekends. 

> Must have a quiet environment to work, away from background noises. 

 

Technical Requirements:

> Good working laptop/computer, i5 or higher

> Stable high-speed wired internet connection of at least 20MBPS or higher

> A stable power supply in your area

> Noise cancellation headset





Send your resume to

title: Customer Service Representative (AMS 360)
description:
We're looking for a Customer Service Representative with hands-on experience in AMS 360 to support an insurance-focused client operation. This is a client-facing role where accuracy, responsiveness, and system fluency matter. You will handle inbound customer inquiries, manage policy-related requests, and navigate AMS 360 to keep records accurate and service moving without delays.



If you have worked in an insurance agency environment, know your way around AMS 360, and take pride in delivering clear and professional customer support, this role is a strong fit.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Stable, client-facing role with clear ownership over customer interactions

- Direct impact on client satisfaction and retention



What You'll Work On



Customer Support and Communication



- Handle inbound customer inquiries via phone,
, or chat professionally and promptly

- Resolve customer issues, answer policy-related questions, and escalate complex cases as needed

- Follow up on open items and ensure every customer interaction is closed properly

- Maintain a professional, clear, and empathetic communication style across all channels



AMS 360 System Management



- Navigate AMS 360 to access, update, and manage customer and policy records accurately

- Process policy changes, endorsements, renewals, and cancellations within the system

- Ensure data integrity across all records and flag discrepancies for review

- Generate reports and pull information from AMS 360 to support internal and client needs



Administrative and Operations Support



- Maintain organized records and documentation for all customer interactions

- Support internal teams with data entry, record updates, and workflow coordination

- Identify recurring customer issues and surface them to the team for process improvement



What You Bring



- Proven experience working with AMS 360 in a professional capacity

- Background in insurance agency operations, customer service, or a related field

- Strong written and verbal communication skills in English

- High attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and record management

- Organized, self-sufficient, and comfortable managing multiple open cases simultaneously

- Comfortable working fully remotely with minimal oversight



Nice to Have



- Experience in a licensed insurance agency or brokerage environment

- Familiarity with insurance policy types including personal lines, commercial lines, or benefits

- Experience with other agency management systems alongside AMS 360



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your updated resume

2. A short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself, describing your experience with AMS 360, and walking through how you handle a high-volume or complex customer service situation



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.



If you know AMS 360, communicate clearly under pressure, and want a stable client-facing role where your attention to detail directly drives customer satisfaction, this role gives you the ownership and the consistency to do your best work.

title: Bilingual Administrative Assistant (Mandarin)
description:
We're looking for a bilingual Admin Assistant who is fluent in English and  Mandarin to support a boutique law firm based in California, serving clients throughout the San Francisco Bay Area. The firm practices family law, employment law, and civil rights, and roughly half of its clients are Chinese-speaking. This role exists to make sure those clients are never left without clear, accurate communication at any point in their experience with the firm.



The split is approximately 30% live interpretation and translation, 70?ministrative support. You do not need a legal background. You do need to be sharp, dependable, and comfortable switching between languages in real client-facing situations.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Up to **14 days** of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you’re most productive

- Direct involvement in meaningful legal matters that affect real people

- Small team environment where your work has immediate visibility and impact



## What You'll Work On



**Interpretation and Translation**



- Provide live interpretation between English and Mandarin during client calls, consultations, and case discussions

- Translate written documents,
s, and client-facing materials as needed

- Ensure accuracy and tone are preserved across both languages in sensitive legal contexts

- Serve as a communication bridge between the legal team and Chinese-speaking clients

- Step in for interpretation support on short notice when client needs arise



**Administrative Support**



- Handle data entry, document management, and file organization across firm systems

- Assist with basic bookkeeping tasks including expense tracking and invoice logging

- Draft, review, and respond to
s on behalf of the team as directed

- Support day-to-day operations across scheduling, client follow-ups, and internal coordination

- Maintain organized records with attention to detail and confidentiality



**Marketing Support (Nice to Have)**



- Assist with social media posting, content scheduling, or basic digital marketing tasks

- Help draft client-facing communications or update website copy when needed

- Support any outreach or visibility initiatives the firm pursues



## What You Bring



- Full professional fluency in English and Mandarin, written and spoken

- Mandarin fluency is strongly preferred

- Prior experience in an administrative, legal, or client-facing support role

- Comfort handling live interpretation in professional or high-stakes conversations

- Strong written communication skills in both English and Chinese

- Proficiency in standard productivity tools including
, spreadsheets, and document management platforms

- High attention to detail and a strong sense of confidentiality

- Ability to manage shifting priorities in a small, fast-moving team



## Nice to Have



- Background in legal, paralegal, or professional services environments

- Basic bookkeeping or accounting experience

- Experience with any legal practice management software

- Social media or digital marketing skills



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** introducing yourself in both English and Cantonese or Mandarin, and briefly describing a situation where you had to communicate clearly across a language barrier in a professional setting



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are fluent in both worlds, can hold a room in two languages, and take pride in making every client feel understood, this role puts you at the center of work that genuinely matters.

title: TikTok Video Editor
description:
I’m a U.S.-based attorney and content creator creating a mix of lifestyle (travel, soft luxury, friendships, daily life) and legal content (trademark + business education) on TikTok.



I’m looking for a video editor who can bring a warm, cozy, aspirational aesthetic to my content. I want it to feel soft, feminine, and relatable for ambitious women.



Think:

Soft lighting, warm tones

Clean but emotional storytelling

Subtle zooms, smooth transitions (not overly “TikTok-y”)

Natural captions

A balance between elevated/luxury + real/relatable



. I want someone who understands vibe, pacing, and storytelling.

title: Business Operations Coordinator
description:
Our client, a growing player in the e-commerce and distribution space, is looking for a highly skilled Business Operations Coordinator** with strong Excel skills, outbound communication experience, and an interest in sales support and portal management.



This is a hybrid operations  sales support role focused on data analysis, portal coordination, cost updates, and reseller follow-through. If you're confident in Excel (especially VLOOKUP and formulas), comfortable with cold calling outbound reps, and love keeping things running behind the scenes—this is the role for you.



---



Perks & Benefits



- Paid in USD (bi-monthly payouts: 15th & 30th)

- Up to 14 days of Paid Time Off annually (starting Day 1)

- Paid Philippine Regular Holidays

- 100% remote – work from anywhere

- Exposure to major reseller portals, PIM systems, and retail data workflows

- Supportive, collaborative team culture with long-term growth opportunities



---



What You’ll Be Doing



Excel Reporting & Data Coordination



- Maintain and update Excel spreadsheets to track POS data, cost changes, and sales progress

- Use VLOOKUP, advanced formulas, and formatting to calculate, compare, and analyze data

- Work with pre-built templates to organize large datasets and generate summaries



Retail Portal & Back-End Support



- Manage B2B portals for resellers and manufacturers (new item setup, online placements, catalog submissions)

- Pull data and create reports related to inventory, sales, chargebacks, or shipping issues

- Keep internal tracking tools up to date with accurate info pulled from multiple portals



Sales Support & Outbound Communication



- Reach out via cold calls and follow-ups to U.S.-based reseller reps and internal account managers

- Keep sales reps aligned with goals, track objectives, and support client-facing progress updates

- Assist in coordinating account check-ins, training decks, or quarterly performance presentations



Project Management & Admin Tasks



- Coordinate with both manufacturers and resellers to ensure alignment on launches, content, and updates

- Support PIM system maintenance for image and copy management

- Document SOPs and contribute to process improvement

- Help manage ad hoc tasks including customer service escalations, pricing changes, or presentation assembly



---



Who You Are



- Excellent English communication skills (written & spoken)

- Advanced Excel user – confident in VLOOKUP, formulas, and spreadsheet logic

- Experienced with cold calling and outbound follow-up to internal and external stakeholders

- Familiar with retail portals, reseller platforms, or catalog systems

- Organized, consistent, and great at managing your time across multiple priorities

- Bonus: Background in e-commerce, merchandising, customer service, or account coordination



---



Working Hours



- Full-time, Monday to Friday

- Shift: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST

- Occasional weekend support may be requested



---



How to Apply



Please submit:



1. Your updated resume

2.  A 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and highlighting your Excel and sales support experience

3. Share a few sample reports or cold outreach materials you’ve created



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.



---



We’re looking for someone structured, communicative, and ready to take ownership of the backend operations that keep our business moving—if that sounds like you, apply now.

title: IT Device Management Specialist (Samsung Knox)
description:
I'm Hiring!



Type: Fully Remote





Position: IT Device Management Specialist (Remote, PH)



Looking for IT Device Management Specialist to manage and support the mobile device environment used by our clinical teams. This role will primarily focus on managing Android tablets used by nurses and field staff, ensuring devices are reliable, secure, and properly configured for daily operations.



The specialist will own device configuration, enrollment, and ongoing platform improvements while helping scale device management processes as the company grows. This role will work closely with IT leadership, engineering, and operations teams to ensure the device platform continues to support clinical workflows effectively.



Requirements:

- Ideally comfortable navigating production databases (SQL) and running scripts via the command line (CLI) to investigate issues. At a minimum, able to serve on IT access and help-desk style support.

- Experience managing **Android devices in an enterprise or large-scale environment**

- Experience with **mobile device management (MDM) platforms**

- Strong troubleshooting experience with mobile device systems

- Experience configuring device policies, profiles, and security settings

- Ability to document processes and work cross-functionally with IT and operations teams

- Experience with **Samsung Knox device management**



To Apply:

Send your updated resume, and a 1–2 minute introduction video

title: Marketing / Paid Ads Specialist
description:
I'm Hiring!

Type: Fully Remote

Rate: Paid in USD bi-monthly (every 15th and 30th)

Position: Marketing / Paid Ads Specialist



I'm looking for a Paid Ads Specialist to support and execute performance marketing campaigns for education and training businesses focused on student enrollment growth. This role is hands-on and execution-driven — ideal for someone early to mid-career with agency experience who wants to deepen their skills across Google, Meta, and TikTok ads.

You'll start by supporting senior advertisers and managing smaller ad accounts, with a clear path toward owning campaigns end to end.



What You'll Work On

- Support active ad accounts across Google Ads, Meta, and TikTok

- Help manage campaigns with monthly budgets ranging from $3K to $15K USD

- Assist with campaign setup, ad creation, budget pacing, and optimizations

- Monitor daily performance metrics and flag issues or opportunities

- Assist with testing creatives, audiences, and campaign structures



Requirements

- 2–3 years of hands-on paid ads experience, ideally in an agency environment

- Experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads required



Nice to Have

- Exposure to LinkedIn and TikTok Ads

- Experience with lead generation or education-focused campaigns



How to Apply:



Send the following:

- Your updated resume

- A short 1–2 minute video introducing yourself and explaining your paid ads experience and what accounts or platforms you've worked on

- Portfolio of creatives

title: $3,000+/Month Part-Time — Only 2 Spots Left
description:
We are hiring part-time remote Customer Success Managers. Only looking for candidates based in the Philippines with an active LinkedIn profile.



We are only accepting 2 more people into this round so apply fast.



Compensation:



$50 per month base salary paid via Wise on the 1st of every month. $150 commission per closed deal. No cap. Top performers are already earning $500 to $3,000+ per month. After 30 days you receive a free LinkedIn Sales Navigator upgrade worth $99 per month.



Referral bonus: Once you are onboarded you get a personal referral link. Every person you refer who joins earns you 10% of their monthly pay as a recurring bonus. Refer 10 people and that is an extra $50+ per month on top of everything else.



What the role involves:



You will represent our company on LinkedIn as part of our remote sales team. During onboarding we set up your profile and connect our internal tools. Our senior team manages all outreach and strategy. You monitor inbound messages from prospects and flag warm leads. Flexible schedule. No fixed hours. No micromanagement.



Requirements:

title: Full-Time Video Editor for Tech Education YouTube Channel
description:
## About Us



We are a growing YouTube channel focused on teaching a widely used software program to thousands of learners worldwide. Our content includes long-form tutorials, tips and tricks, and short-form content across YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram. We are looking for a talented and creative video editor to join our team full-time and help take our content to the next level.



This is not a "just cut and trim" kind of role. We want someone who thinks like a creator, brings fresh ideas to the table, and knows how to make educational content visually engaging and easy to follow.



---



## What You Will Be Doing



- Editing 2 to 4 long-form YouTube videos per week (tutorials, walkthroughs, tips)

- Editing 4 to 5 short-form videos per week for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Instagram Reels

- Adding smooth transitions between slides and screen recordings

- Creating basic animations and motion graphics (e.g., icons, graphics, visual callouts)

- Applying strategic zoom-ins and zoom-outs to highlight key areas on screen

- Adding clean annotations, text overlays, and on-screen labels

- Selecting and adding background music and sound effects where appropriate

- Suggesting creative ideas to improve the flow, pacing, and visual quality of each video

- Repurposing long-form content into engaging short-form clips

- Delivering final exports optimized for each platform (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram)



---



## What We Are Looking For



- A strong portfolio or sample reel showing your editing skills (this matters more than years of experience)

- Working knowledge of Microsoft Excel

- Experience editing educational, tutorial, or screencast-style content is a big plus

- Proficiency in professional editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)

- Ability to add basic motion graphics, animations, and visual elements (you do not need to be a full motion designer, but you should be comfortable with these)

- A good eye for pacing, timing, and visual storytelling in educational content

- Ability to take raw footage and independently produce a polished, publish-ready video

- Strong attention to detail (clean audio, proper alignment, consistent styling)

- Reliable internet connection and the ability to handle large file transfers

- Responsiveness on Google Chat for daily communication and updates



---



## Work Setup



- You will receive raw screen recordings and footage from us

- You will edit independently and deliver polished, final videos

- Expected turnaround time: 24 to 48 hours per video

- No fixed working hours. Work on your own schedule as long as deadlines are consistently met

- Daily communication via Google Chat



---



## Why You Will Enjoy This Role



- Long-term, stable, full-time position (not a one-off project)

- Creative freedom to suggest and implement editing ideas

- Work with a growing channel in the education space

- Flexible schedule with no micromanagement

- Room to grow as the channel scales



---



## How to Apply



**IMPORTANT: Please do NOT apply through the onlinejobs.ph messaging system.**



Instead, fill out our short application form here: 



Applications submitted only through onlinejobs.ph without filling out the form will not be considered.



---



## Hiring Process



1. Application form review

2. Short interview via Google Meet

3. Free test edit using a sample clip we provide

4. Final decision

description:
Our client is a SaaS company specializing in influencer management, helping niche, hobby-driven brands grow through creator partnerships. They focus on communities such as golf, photography, fitness, and indoor gardening—supporting brands built by passionate enthusiasts. With established lead lists and outbound
 systems, the company is now expanding into strategic outbound calling to drive demos and revenue growth.



About the Role

We are looking for a Sales Development Representative (SDR) to generate qualified leads, engage prospects, and book meetings for the sales team. This role focuses on building relationships with decision-makers and introducing solutions that enhance how brands manage influencer partnerships.



Key Responsibilities

Conduct outbound cold calls to generate interest and qualify leads

Schedule demos and meetings with key decision-makers

Research prospects and support lead list development using tools like Seamless.ai

Maintain accurate records of calls, notes, and outcomes in HubSpot

Communicate value by discussing influencer marketing and creator partnerships



Requirements

Proven experience in outbound sales, lead generation, or appointment setting

Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

Comfortable with cold calling and objection handling

Familiarity with CRM and sales tools (HubSpot, Seamless.ai, Salesforce, GoHighLevel is a plus)

Driven, resilient, and performance-oriented

BPO sales experience is an advantage

title: Front Office & Client Intake Specialist | Full Time | 13month Bonus + Yearly Raises
description:
About Our Company:

The Growth Consultant is a leading business consulting company that helps entrepreneurs streamline operations, strengthen internal systems, and reduce daily workload so they can focus on growth and scaling. We support fast-paced, client-driven businesses by building efficient workflows and providing reliable operational support. As our partners in the healthcare and wellness space continue to grow, we are expanding our team to ensure clients receive a seamless and high-quality experience from first contact to onboarding.



Job Summary:

We are seeking a personable and results-driven Front Office & Client Intake Specialist to serve as the first point of contact for prospective and existing clients. This role is responsible for handling inbound inquiries, converting leads into paying clients, and ensuring a smooth onboarding experience.



The ideal candidate is confident in communication, highly organized, and skilled in both customer service and sales. You will play a key role in creating a positive first impression while maintaining accurate client records and supporting overall front-office operations.



Key Responsibilities:



Front Office & Customer Support

- Answer incoming calls and respond to client inquiries professionally and promptly

- Provide accurate information about services, programs, and pricing

- Deliver a warm, welcoming, and client-focused experience



Client Conversion & Intake

- Engage with prospective clients and confidently convert inquiries into bookings or paid clients

- Guide clients through the onboarding and registration process

- Schedule appointments and coordinate bookings

- Ensure a seamless and positive intake experience



CRM & Data Management (GoHighLevel)

- Enter and maintain accurate client information in GoHighLevel (GHL)

- Update notes, statuses, and client records

- Track leads and follow up with prospective clients

- Maintain organized and up-to-date CRM data



Administrative & Front Office Support

- Assist with general administrative and front-office tasks

- Maintain digital records and documentation

- Coordinate with internal tea
mbers to ensure smooth operations



Requirements:

- 1–3 years of experience in customer service, front desk, or client intake roles

- Proven ability to convert inquiries into paying clients

- Excellent verbal and written English communication skills

- Strong interpersonal and sales skills with a customer-focused mindset

- Experience with CRM systems; GoHighLevel (GHL) experience is a plus

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote environment

- Background in healthcare, wellness, or medical services is an advantage

- Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup



We Offer:

Fully remote position

13th-month pay

Annual salary increases

Supportive and collaborative work environment

Opportunities for long-term growth within the company

title: HIRING: Customer Research Specialist — Long-Term Role with Scandinavian E-Commerce Brand
description:
???? HIRING: Customer Research Specialist — Long-Term Role



We're a fast-growing e-commerce brand based in Sweden scaling our paid ads on Meta.



We need someone who can find what real customers think, feel, fear, and desire — in their own words.



This is not a writing job. This is a digging job.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



We give you a product and a customer. You go find:



• Exact quotes from real people describing their problem (Reddit, Amazon reviews,
 groups, YouTube comments)

• What frustrates them about current solutions

• What their life looks like when the problem is solved

• What specific 
nt made them start looking for a solution

• What competitor brands are saying in their ads



You deliver everything in a clean, organized document. Raw quotes only — never paraphrase.



---



TO APPLY



Answer this one question and send it to us:



We sell a product for women who want to cover their gray roots quickly at home.



Where would you go to find out exactly what frustrates these women — and what would you search for?



Be specific. Show us how you think.



---



$750 per month, paid weekly

Long-term role

title: Sales Representative
description:
We are a US-based custom manufacturing company, and we are looking for dedicated and loyal individuals that can contribute to our goals. We are looking for individuals who Embody Our Core Values, Serve Others and Own It!



We are looking for Sales Professionals!



Key Responsibilities:

- Identify and generate sales leads through prospecting, website inquiries, databases, cold-calling, and other promotional strategies.

- Schedule and conduct virtual meetings and presentations with potential clients.

- Develop and deliver compelling sales presentations on company products and services.

- Maintain accurate records of sales activities, prospects, and customer interactions in the company CRM.

- Track customer reorders and follow up to ensure continued satisfaction.

- Communicate customer and prospect product pain points to appropriate departments.

- Maintain a well-developed pipeline of prospects.

- Collaborate with internal teams to address customer pain points and improve offerings.

- Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with customers and prospect.

- Consistently meet or exceed sales quotas and performance targets.



Qualifications:

- Fluent in English (both verbal and written) with excellent communication skills.

- Proven success in sales, with a strong track record of meeting or exceeding quotas.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision while maintaining high productivity.

- Strong relationship-building and negotiation skills.

- Self-motivated with a results-oriented mindset and a proactive approach.

- Friendly, fast learner who can adapt to change and have a “can-do” attitude

- Tech-savvy, with proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Suite, CRM software, and virtual communication tools (e.g., Microsoft Teams, Zoom).



System Requirements:

- Computer Processor: Minimum 5th generation Intel i5 processor or equivalent

- Computer Memory/RAM: Minimum 4.00 GB

- Computer Operating System: Windows 10 or Mac OSX - No Linux, Unix, or any operating system other than what is required.

- Internet Speed: Running on a 5.0 MBPS plan or higher (Both primary and backup) - If your backup connection cannot serve as your primary connection, that does not qualify as a backup connection

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

- REQUIRED Headset: Noise-cancelling headset connected via USB port

- REQUIRED WebCam: At least 3 megapixels capable of 720p recording



***We’re picky. You must be smart, savvy, strategic, fun, and ready to learn fast and work hard. If you’re up for the challenge, we want to hear from you!

title: Customer Service Representative (Luxury and Fashion)
description:
We're looking for a Customer Service Representative with experience supporting high-end luxury or fashion brands to deliver a premium client experience. This is not a standard support role. The clients you serve expect a level of care, polish, and responsiveness that matches the brand they have chosen to engage with. Every interaction reflects the standard of the brand itself.



You will handle customer inquiries, resolve issues, and manage the full customer journey with the discretion, warmth, and professionalism that luxury clientele expect. If you have worked in a high-end retail, fashion, or luxury brand environment and understand what white-glove service actually looks like in practice, this role is a strong fit.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in USD (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- Paid Time Off in accordance with company policy

- Observance of Holidays per company guidelines

- 100% remote setup so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Client-facing role inside a premium brand environment where your communication sets the tone

- Opportunity to build long-term relationships with high-value customers



 What You'll Work On



Premium Customer Support



- Handle inbound inquiries from luxury brand customers via
, chat, or phone with professionalism and warmth

- Resolve order issues, returns, exchanges, and complaints in a way that protects the customer relationship and reflects brand standards

- Anticipate customer needs and go beyond transactional responses to deliver a genuinely premium experience

- Manage escalations with composure and escalate internally when situations require senior involvement



Order and Account Management



- Track and manage customer orders, shipping updates, and delivery inquiries accurately

- Coordinate with internal teams and third-party partners to resolve fulfillment or product issues

- Maintain accurate customer records and interaction histories

- Follow up proactively on open cases without waiting to be asked



Brand Representation



- Uphold brand voice, tone, and communication standards in every customer interaction

- Adapt communication style to match the expectations of high-net-worth or brand-loyal clientele

- Represent the brand with discretion, attention to detail, and genuine care for the customer experience



 What You Bring



- Experience in customer service for a luxury brand, fashion label, or premium retail environment

- Polished written and verbal communication skills in English with a strong command of tone and professionalism

- Ability to handle sensitive customer situations with composure and discretion

- High attention to detail and a genuine sense of ownership over every customer interaction

- Organized, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple open cases without dropping details

- Comfortable working fully remotely with a high degree of self-direction



Nice to Have



- Direct experience with fashion, accessories, or lifestyle luxury brands

- Familiarity with luxury e-commerce platforms or CRM tools used in premium retail

- Experience working with international or high-net-worth clientele

- Multilingual ability, particularly in French, Italian, or Spanish



How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your updated resume

2. A short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes) introducing yourself, describing your experience with luxury or fashion brands, and sharing how you handled a difficult customer situation while maintaining brand standards



Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.



If you understand what luxury service actually means, communicate with polish and precision, and want to represent a premium brand where every interaction matters, this role gives you the platform and the ownership to deliver it at the highest level.

title: Staff Accountant to support accounting operations within a growing real estate investment firm
description:
Project Overview:

Dominion Properties (DP) is a dynamic and expanding real estate investment firm specializing in the acquisition of single-family homes, multifamily properties, and land. We are seeking a detail-oriented and reliable Staff Accountant to join our team on a contract basis. The ideal candidate will have strong accounting knowledge, experience handling day-to-day financial operations, and the ability to work independently while meeting deadlines.



In this role, you’ll manage general ledger reconciliations, journal entries, and data entry across multiple entities while keeping our accounting records clean and reliable. If you bring strong accounting experience, proficiency with QuickBooks, and thrive in a fast-paced environment, we’d love to hear from you. Please share your background in accounting, the reconciliations and reporting you’ve handled with clear examples, the systems you’ve worked in, and your earliest availability.



As a Staff Accountant You Will:

Complete daily and monthly bank reconciliations for multiple accounts. Record and post accurate journal entries. Perform comprehensive general ledger account reconciliations across multiple entities. Execute data entry tasks to support accounting operations, ensuring accuracy and completeness. Maintain supporting documentation for financial transactions. Use QuickBooks and Excel daily to manage reconciliations, reporting, and data validation.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

We’re looking for someone with a strong foundation in accounting. A degree in Accounting is preferred. 5+ years of bookkeeping and general ledger reconciliation experience is required. You should be highly proficient in Microsoft Excel and QuickBooks (desktop), detail-oriented, and accurate in your work. The right candidate will also be comfortable working independently after initial training, with the ability to meet deadlines and maintain precision across tasks.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us: 

• Long-term, steady work with a growing real estate investment firm. 

• 100% remote role—work productively from anywhere.

• Supportive, collaborative team culture that values accuracy, efficiency, and teamwork. 

Timeline: 

• Full-Time, Long-Term 

• 8:00 AM – 4:30 PM Eastern Standard Time 

• Ongoing position

title: Operations Manager
description:
Join the Aventus Team!



We are Aventus — a boutique customer experience BPO in Charleston, South Carolina, with over 10 years of providing omnichannel support to 100+ amazing clients and partners in the e-commerce industry.



Check out our website: 



We’re looking for a dynamic and results-driven Operations Manager to ensure the success of assigned campaigns by overseeing daily operations, driving performance, and building strong client relationships. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, balances people development with operational rigor, and brings a strategic lens to campaign management.



What You’ll Be Doing:

As an Operations Manager, you’ll oversee client campaigns, coach and develop team leaders, monitor performance, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure KPIs and SLAs are consistently achieved. You’ll also play a key role in identifying opportunities for growth, innovation, and operational excellence.



Your Core Responsibilities:

**Coach Development

- Equip coaches to meet client SLAs and KPIs

- Provide mentorship and actionable feedback to enhance agent performance

- Foster continuous learning and personalized growth plans for coaches

**Performance Management & KPIs

- Ensure SLA and KPI goals are consistently met or exceeded

- Monitor and drive performance through daily, weekly, and monthly reporting

**Client Relationship Management

- Identify growth opportunities within client accounts, including volume and channel expansion

- Collaborate with the Client Success team to support expansion proposals

- Maintain strong, trusted client relationships to exceed expectations

**Process Improvement & Innovation

- Identify and implement process improvements based on data and best practices

- Enhance service quality and efficiency through continuous improvement initiatives

**Operational Compliance & Risk Management

- Ensure compliance with client protocols, industry regulations, internal policies, and PCI requirements

**Technology & Tools Optimization

- Partner with IT and Product teams to optimize CRM, ticketing, QA, and e-commerce platforms (e.g., Shopify, Gorgias)

**Cross-Functional Leadership

- Lead initiatives with QA, Training, Workforce, and HR to support business continuity, certification, and scaling



What You’ll Bring to the Table

- 3–5+ years’ experience in operations management, preferably in BPO, customer experience, or e-commerce support

- Proven success in meeting and exceeding SLAs, KPIs, and client expectations

- Strong leadership skills with experience in coaching and developing managers/coaches

- Excellent client-facing communication and relationship management skills

- Data-driven mindset with the ability to translate insights into strategy and action

- Familiarity with CRM, CX, and e-commerce platforms (e.g., Gorgias, Shopify)



Core Competencies

- Customer Centricity: Advocates for the customer while balancing efficiency

- Strategic Thinking: Aligns team goals with broader business objectives

- Results Orientation: Focused on achieving measurable outcomes (CSAT, AHT, FCR, conversion rates)

- Team Empowerment: Builds a coaching culture of accountability, feedback, and growth



What’s In It For You?

- 100% Remote Work – Work from anywhere in the Philippines

- Career Development – Grow your leadership and operational expertise in a scaling organization

- Competitive Compensation – $11/hr + bonuses + benefits as an independent contractor

- Inclusive Culture – Join a team that values transparency, balance, and kindness

- Purposeful Work – Lead meaningful initiatives that impact clients and their customers every day



Ready to Drive Operational Success?

If you’re a strategic leader who thrives on building teams, exceeding client expectations, and driving operational excellence, we’d love to meet you!

title: Klaviyo Flow Specialist (PH Based)

Common Traits We Are Seeking:

- Comfortable working within a larger retention team 
 marketers, designers, copywriters)

- Enjoys identifying inefficiencies and turning them into optimized automations



Our Core Values

- Results Driven Focus



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



- Build, launch, and optimize
 flows in Klaviyo across multiple DTC brands



- Own the entire customer journey via
 automations - from strategy to execution



- Develop segmentation strategies and conditional logic to create personalized experiences

title: UGC & Project Manager
description:
What this position is responsible for:



We’re looking for a highly organized and proactive UGC & Project Manager to oversee creator relationships and manage the operational flow of UGC campaigns. This role plays a critical part in ensuring that creator partnerships, campaign deliverables, and internal collaboration run smoothly from start to finish. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced digital marketing environment, is detail-oriented, and can confidently coordinate between creators, internal teams, and clients to ensure campaigns are executed at a high standard.



Requirements/Experience:

- 1–3+ years of experience in UGC management, influencer marketing, social media marketing, or digital marketing operations



- Experience sourcing, recruiting, and managing UGC creators or influencers across platforms such as TikTok and Instagram



- Strong project management and organizational skills, with the ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



- Excellent communication and negotiation skills when working with creators and coordinating with internal teams



- Ability to manage timelines, deliverables, and campaign documentation with a high level of attention to detail



- Familiarity with social media trends, creator ecosystems, and UGC-style content



- Experience reviewing content and ensuring it follows brand guidelines, scripts, and campaign briefs



- Proficiency with project management tools, spreadsheets, and communication platforms (e.g., Google Sheets, Notion, Slack, Trello, etc.)



- Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to identify risks, delays, or bottlenecks early



- Self-starter mindset with the ability to work independently in a remote environment





Roles & Responsibilities for this position:



UGC Management



- Source and recruit high-quality UGC creators across platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, and other relevant social media channels to support ongoing campaigns.



- Build, maintain, and continuously grow a reliable roster of creators, ensuring access to talent that aligns with brand positioning and campaign goals.



- Conduct creator outreach and relationship management, including communication, negotiation of deliverables, and maintaining professional partnerships.



- Distribute campaign briefs, scripts, and brand guidelines to creators, ensuring all expectations and creative requirements are clearly communicated.



- Review and evaluate creator submissions to ensure content meets campaign standards before forwarding for internal or client approval.



- Track and document creator performance, reliability, and content quality to inform future collaborations.



- Maintain and organize creator databases, ensuring accurate records of contact details, past performance, and campaign participation.



Project Management



- Coordinate campaign timelines and deliverables between creators, internal team members, and clients to ensure smooth campaign execution.



- Monitor campaign schedules to ensure all deliverables are completed on time and meet required deadlines.



- Organize and maintain campaign assets and documentation, including briefs, scripts, and project files.



- Track overall project progress, proactively identifying potential delays, bottlenecks, or issues that may impact timelines.



- Communicate updates across teams to maintain alignment and ensure all stakeholders are informed throughout the campaign lifecycle.



- Support the overall campaign workflow by ensuring tasks, deadlines, and responsibilities are clearly defined and executed.



Apply today to join our team!



Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full-time

Target Start Date: ASAP

title: Replo Landing Page Developer
description:
We're looking for a Replo Landing Page Developer who will play a critical role in turning high-level creative concepts into conversion-focused, revenue-driving eCommerce experiences. This role sits at the intersection of design, development, and performance, ensuring that every landing page is pixel-perfect, on-brand, and optimized to convert traffic into customers. You’ll be directly responsible for building, optimizing, and maintaining Shopify landing pages that support aggressive growth goals for modern eCommerce brands.



Requirements/Experience:

- Proven experience building Shopify landing pages using Replo

- Strong ability to translate Figma designs into pixel-accurate, responsive live pages

- Hands-on experience with Shopify-native functionality, including products, variants, carts, and checkout flows

- Solid understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) principles for eCommerce

- Experience building responsive layouts for desktop, tablet, and mobile

- Familiarity with brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards

- Ability to use AI tools to increase efficiency, speed, and consistency in workflows

- High attention to detail with a strong eye for design accuracy and usability

- Ability to manage multiple builds simultaneously while meeting deadlines

- Clear communication skills and comfort collaborating with designers, marketers, and strategists



Roles & Responsibilities for this position:

- Build high-converting eCommerce landing pages in Replo, using Figma designs as the source of truth while ensuring clean, scalable builds that align with performance goals



- Translate Figma files into pixel-accurate, fully responsive Replo pages, ensuring consistency across desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences



- Implement Shopify-native functionality within Replo, including product selection, variants, add-to-cart behavior, and checkout flows that function seamlessly for the end user



- Ensure all pages strictly follow brand guidelines, design systems, and UI standards, maintaining visual consistency and professionalism across every build



- Optimize page layouts using CRO best practices, including above-the-fold clarity, strategic CTA placement, trust elements, and friction reduction



- Leverage AI tools to improve development efficiency, speed up repetitive tasks, and enhance overall output quality without sacrificing accuracy



- Collaborate with designers and performance marketers to ensure pages not only look great but are built to support testing, iteration, and measurable results





Notes:



Candidates must be available to work Central Standard Time (CST) business hours.

Schedule: Full time position

Target Start Date: ASAP

title: Mortgage Processor - Investor Loans (DSCR, Fix & Flip, and Construction)
description:
We are looking for an experienced loan processor who wants more than just another processing job.



At PropFunder, this role is important. You will help keep investor loan files moving, communicate with borrowers and third parties, solve problems as they come up, and play a real part in helping the company grow.



We are a small but growing company, so this is a good fit for someone who likes ownership, takes pride in doing things well, and wants the chance to grow into more responsibility over time.



This position requires non-QM, DSCR, fix-and-flip, or construction loan processing experience. Without it, you'll be automatically filtered out during screening.



What you’ll be doing



You will help process investor loan files such as:



• DSCR loans

• fix-and-flip loans

• bridge/refinance investor loans

• ground-up construction loans



Your day-to-day work may include:



• managing files from application through closing

• collecting and reviewing borrower documents

• staying on top of conditions and missing items

• following up with borrowers, lenders, title, insurance, appraisal, and other third parties

• keeping files organized and moving

• communicating clearly about what is needed and what is still outstanding

• helping improve workflows and systems as we continue to grow



What matters most in this role



We care a lot about:



• honesty

• transparency

• urgency

• clarity

• follow-through



We want someone who is dependable, organized, proactive, and comfortable taking ownership of a file without letting things slip through the cracks.



You may be a strong fit if you:



• already have loan processing experience

• are comfortable managing multiple active files

• communicate well with borrowers and third parties

• know how to follow up and keep 
ntum on a file

• are detail-oriented without losing sight of the bigger picture

• want a role where your work actually matters

• are interested in growing with a company over time



This role may not be the right fit if:



• you do not have loan processing experience

• you need constant direction to stay on task

• you are looking for a highly structured big-company environment

• you are not comfortable with urgency, follow-up, and problem-solving



Why someone may want this role



This is a chance to join a growing company early, make a real impact, and build something alongside us.



The right person will have room to grow here. We are not just looking for someone to complete tasks, we are looking for someone who can become a key part of the processing function as the company grows.



To apply, please include:



1. your loan processing experience

2. what loan products you’ve worked on

3. the systems/tools you’ve used

4. how many files you’ve handled at one time

5. one example of a difficult file you helped get to closing

title: Senior Webflow Developer (Philippines Hire)
description:
About uBloom Digital



uBloom Digital is an Australian web design and brand development agency. We work with ambitious builders, architects, and property developers, helping them stand out, attract better clients, and grow through premium websites and sharp digital strategy.



Our work is held to a high standard. Every project we take on is built to make a genuine impact on our client's business, not just look good. We combine strong design, smart positioning, and technically polished execution to deliver websites that actually move the needle for the people we work with. Our team is everything to us and is what makes it all possible!



Job Details



As the Senior Webflow Developer, you will work closely with the CEO to lead the build and delivery of client projects from start to finish. You will take Figma designs, creative briefs, and strategic direction and turn them into premium, high-performing websites in Webflow.



This is not a support role. You will own the development side of every project, manage your own workload across multiple active builds, and be trusted to deliver without constant oversight. Over time, you will take on direct client communication and become a key part of how uBloom operates and grows.



This role suits someone who is highly skilled, self-directed, and genuinely proud of the work they put out. You care about the details, you communicate clearly, and you want to be part of something that is building toward something real.



uBloom is a growing creative and digital studio working with premium architecture, construction, and lifestyle brands. This role offers the opportunity to become deeply embedded in the business, develop strong development and project management skills, and take on increased responsibility over time. Prior experience is essential; a strong work ethic, sound judgement, and willingness to be part of the team are key.



Time requirement



9am - 6pm Brisbane Time (1 hour lunch)

Monday - Friday

13th Month Included

Australia Holiday Schedule



Responsibilities



Client project delivery



- Take completed Figma designs and build them in Webflow to a premium, pixel-accurate standard

- Develop custom interactions and animations using GSAP and native Webflow to a high level of polish

- Write clean JavaScript to extend functionality beyond native Webflow where required

- Work from partial briefs or design direction and apply enough design judgement to execute independently

- Manage multiple active projects simultaneously inside Notion without losing detail or missing deadlines

- Handle DNS configuration, domain setup, and full site launches independently



Existing project management



- Audit and clean up Webflow projects inherited from previous developers

- Restructure class names, organise styles, and implement cleaner development systems into existing builds

- Fix bugs, resolve layout and interaction issues, and improve overall project quality

- Implement website changes, new features, and additional functionality onto live client websites

- Navigate complex Webflow projects calmly and methodically without breaking what already works



Internal systems and frameworks



- Help build and refine uBloom's internal Webflow frameworks and component systems

- Contribute to the development of repeatable build processes that improve speed and consistency across projects

- Assist in building and improving internal task management systems inside Notion

- Document processes clearly so systems can be followed, improved, and handed over where needed



Standards and organisation



- Maintain clean, organised class naming conventions across every project without being asked

- Structure Webflow projects for long-term maintainability from the very first build session

- Communicate progress proactively, flag blockers early, and keep work moving without being chased

- Follow and actively contribute to uBloom's internal SOPs and build processes



Requirements for consideration



- 4+ years Webflow experience with a strong portfolio of premium, design-forward builds

- Advanced GSAP skills used regularly and confidently across real client projects

- Include an animal that best represents you in the subject line (required)

- Solid JavaScript ability for custom interactions, logic, and extended functionality

- Strong Figma-to-Webflow workflow with the design understanding to fill gaps independently

- Demonstrated ability to audit, clean up, and improve Webflow projects built by others

- A disciplined, consistent approach to class naming and project organisation

- Experience managing DNS settings and handling full site launches without support

- Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining a high standard of quality

Systems minded. You think about how to do things in a repeatable, scalable way, not just how to get the current task done

- Clear, professional written communication in English

- Reliable internet connection and consistent availability during agreed working hours

- Familiarity with Notion for project and task management

- Finsweet attributes experience is optional but a good advantage

- This must be your only role. Exclusive commitment is required



Why you’ll love working at uBloom Digital



This role goes well beyond executing tasks from a list. This is a fully remote role where you will be trusted with real responsibility from day one. You will be given genuine ownership over your work and the space to do it well. The work you build will be seen by hundreds of thousands of eyeballs across Australia and will directly shape how our high-end clients businesses grow and compete.



Culture matters at uBloom. We are a small, tight team that takes the work seriously but does not take itself too seriously. We care about quality, we move fast, and we back the people we work with. Outside of work the founders and team are into fitness, sport, health, and generally having a fun lifestyle, and we think that balance matters.



As the business grows, there is a real opportunity to grow with it. We value long-term relationships, reliability, and people who want to keep getting better. Initiative is rewarded with more responsibility, better projects, and progression over time. If you want to do some of the best work of your career inside a thoughtful and ambitious agency, this role is for you.

$
USD per month

13th Month Guaranteed



Overall, we are looking for a person with a positive attitude, professionalism, reliability, great time management skills, open communication, and a passion to learn! If this is you or someone you know, please apply with your resume and cover letter

title: Paid Ads & Digital Marketing Specialist (Meta, Google, TikTok)
description:
ABOUT US

We are an online education company selling digital courses ($47-$297 price range) that help business owners use AI to scale their operations. We have a fully built sales funnel (Kajabi),
 sequences, ad creatives, and a ScoreApp quiz funnel ready to go. We need someone who can take all of this and run profitable paid ad campaigns from day one.



JOB TYPE: Full-Time (40 hours/week)

SCHEDULE: Flexible hours, some overlap with US Eastern Time preferred

LOCATION: Remote (Philippines)

SALARY: $600 - $900 USD/month + performance bonuses



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Primary focus — Paid Advertising (70% of your time):

- Set up, launch, and manage Meta 
/Instagram) ad campaigns end-to-end

- Set up and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, YouTube, Display)

- Set up and manage TikTok ad campaigns

- Monitor campaign performance daily — adjust targeting, bids, budgets, and creatives based on data

- Run A/B tests on ad copy, creatives, audiences, and landing pages

- Track conversions using Meta Pixel, Google Tag Manager, and TikTok Pixel

- Build and manage retargeting and lookalike audiences

- Provide weekly performance reports with clear recommendations



Secondary responsibilities (30% of your time):

- Schedule and publish organic social media content across platforms (content will be provided)

- Monitor Kajabi dashboard —
 sequence performance, enrollments, and customer support inquiries

- Respond to basic customer support
s and questions

- Help maintain and update Kajabi sales pages and funnels as needed

- Assist with Zapier automations between ScoreApp, Kajabi, and other tools



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- 2+ years managing paid ad campaigns on Meta Ads Manager (this is the most important skill)

- Proven track record of running profitable campaigns for digital products, courses, or e-commerce

- Experience with Google Ads (Search and YouTube campaigns)

- Strong understanding of conversion tracking, pixel setup, and attribution

- Comfortable reading ad dashboards and making data-driven optimization decisions

- Experience with audience building: lookalikes, retargeting, interest-based targeting

- Good written English — you may need to tweak ad copy and respond to customers

- Self-starter who can manage campaigns independently without daily direction

- Reliable internet connection



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience with TikTok Ads Manager

- Familiarity with Kajabi (or similar course platforms like Teachable, Thinkific)

- Experience with ScoreApp, Zapier, or similar automation tools

- Background in marketing online courses or digital info products

- Basic understanding of funnel strategy (TOFU/MOFU/BOFU)



HOW TO APPLY

Send your application with:

- Screenshots or case studies showing ad campaign results you have managed (ROAS, CPA, or revenue metrics preferred)

- A short message explaining which ad platforms you are strongest on and the types of products you have promoted

- Your expected monthly salary in USD



Applications without proof of ad management experience will not be reviewed.

Required Qualifications:

* Experience communicating with borrowers, processors, and vendors

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* Ability to manage multiple loan files simultaneously

During peak season (summer), we produce 25–30 listings per week (Monday–Sunday).

On some days, we may shoot 6–7 listings, and other days 2–3 listings.

Because videos are filmed in order, edits are streamlined. Our current editor averages 40-60 minutes per listing. The instagram sample video provided, we need you to be able to edit those within 2-3 hours.



You may work around 25-30 hours a week or possibly more when we get busier during the season .

-50% of edits: required within 8–12 hours

-Fast response to revisions is essential

-Weekend availability is required

-Must be okay using Hubstaff for time tracking (used for data and workflow planning, not micromanagement)



Starting rate: $10 CAD/hour

Looking forward to hearing from you,

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:
Position Overview:



As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.





Pay Range: $8 per hour with a performance review scheduled after 90 days of employment. We believe in rewarding exceptional talents.





About Power Plus Systems:



Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.





Objectives:

• Manage and organize the CEO's daily schedule, including meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements.

• Act as a gatekeeper, screening and prioritizing communications to the CEO.

• Coordinate and facilitate communication between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.

• Anticipate the CEO's needs and proactively handle tasks to ensure optimal time management.

• Coordinate special projects and initiatives as assigned by the CEO.





Competencies:

• Exceptional organizational and multitasking skills, with keen attention to detail.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills.

• Ability to maintain confidentiality and exercise discretion in handling sensitive information.

• Proficient in using Microsoft Office and Google Suites.

• Familiarity with scheduling software; experience with additional productivity tools is an advantage.

• Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.





Equipment Requirements:

• Must own a reliable computer or laptop capable of handling administrative tasks efficiently.

• Must own and actively use an iPhone and/or MacBook or Mac computer for efficient communication and task management.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.





Physical Requirements:

• Extended periods of sitting at a desk and working on a computer.



Benefits:

• Growth opportunities in a well-established company.

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

• A supportive and collaborative work environment.

• Company-observed paid United States holidays (full time).

• Paid vacation.

mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers

Join us at Power Plus Systems, LLC, and be part of our continued success as we embark on the next 20 years of excellence in residential electrical contracting!

How the job works:



We already have a template project file ready for you.



It includes:



All effects

All graphics



You don’t need to create anything from scratch.

Just copy/paste what’s already there and change text if needed.



What you’ll actually do:

Cut down the bodycam footage to make it more interesting

Make sure the video flows well and isn’t confusing

Add narration into the video





About the narration:

All narration is done with AI.



You’ll Paste a news article into AI

It will give you the full narration (intro, middle, outro)

You just place it into the timeline where it tells you



Time:



Each video usually takes 1–3 hours since most of the work is already set up.



How to apply:



Send over some of your past editing work.



Thanks, looking forward to your application!

title: Customer Service Respresentative
description:
We’re looking for a Customer Service Representative who will take full responsibility for handling customer inquiries, exchanges, and returns for our E-commerce fashion dropshipping stores.

You’ll be part of a dedicated customer service team, working closely with other representatives and a manager to ensure that as much revenue as possible is driven and retained through customer service.



We’re not looking for someone who just “replies to
s.” We’re looking for someone who thinks and acts like an A-player: disciplined, proactive, and committed to excellence.

You communicate with empathy, and take ownership of every situation. You always look for solutions instead of excuses and understand that every interaction is a chance to create value for both the customer and the company.



You must already have experience in customer service for Shopify fashion dropshipping stores, and know how to communicate effectively, handle returns and exchanges, and solve problems efficiently, keeping customers happy while protecting company profits.

You should know how to use Shopify and ParcelPanel, maintain a professional and calm tone under pressure, and be able to work according to the New York (US) timezone, since most of our customer interactions follow that schedule.

Experience with return funnels and ChatGPT for communication improvement is a must.



You’ll handle
s, refunds, replacements, and order inquiries together with other tea
mbers, ensuring a fast, professional, and solution-oriented customer experience every day.

We value people who are organized, reliable, and detail-oriented, who identify problems before they escalate, and who constantly aim to improve how things are done.



You understand that great customer service doesn’t just solve issues. It drives revenue and keeps profits within the company.



This is a position for someone who takes pride in delivering world-class service and wants to be part of a high-performing, professional team.



Please answer these questions in your application:

1. What is your experience with customer service for Shopify fashion dropshipping stores, and for how long?

2. Have you worked for other fashion dropshipping stores before? If yes, which ones?

3. What are your main strengths, and how can you make the company better? What knowledge or ideas can you bring?

4. Are you familiar with Shopify, Zendesk, ParcelPanel, and ChatGPT?

5. Do you have experience with return funnels?

6. Do you speak and write English fluently?

7. Are you currently working for another company?

8. How many hours and days per week are you available? Are you also available during weekends?

9. Can you work according to the New York (US) timezone?

10. Do you always have a stable Wi-Fi connection?

11. What is your desired monthly compensation?

12. What’s your favorite dish?



Please include your phone number in the application so we can contact you directly through Whatsapp!

title: Delivery Executive
description:
Send your resume to 



WFH

Graveyard Shift

1 year contract required



***Role Overview

The Delivery Executive serves as the “Architect of Execution,” acting as the second-in-command responsible for translating the company’s strategic vision into actionable, scalable operational workflows. This role partners closely with the CEO to ensure the organization has the right people, processes, and systems in place to achieve sustainable growth and operational excellence.



***Key Responsibilities



Strategic Execution: Translate the CEO’s vision and company goals into clear, structured, and executable operational plans across all departments.



Operational Leadership: Oversee day-to-day operations, including service delivery, production, customer success, and internal support functions such as HR and IT.



Performance Management: Develop, implement, and monitor KPIs and OKRs to ensure teams consistently meet or exceed performance targets.



Financial Oversight: Work closely with the Finance team to manage budgets, optimize costs, and ensure efficient allocation of resources aligned with growth objectives.



Culture & Change Management: Lead organizational improvements and transformation initiatives while promoting a culture of accountability, performance, and continuous development.



Process Optimization: Identify operational inefficiencies and implement streamlined or automated solutions to improve productivity and service quality.



Cross-Functional Collaboration: Ensure alignment and seamless coordination between departments to support business objectives and enhance overall execution.



Client & Delivery Excellence: Maintain high standards of service delivery, ensuring client satisfaction, retention, and consistent operational performance.



***Qualifications



- Minimum of 5 years of experience in a senior leadership or operations role, preferably in a high-growth environment.



- Strong understanding of operational strategy, business processes, and organizational scaling.



- Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and drive measurable results.



- Experience in performance management frameworks (KPIs, OKRs).



- Financial acumen with experience in budgeting and resource planning.



- Excellent communication, leadership, and stakeholder management skills.



- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with a data-driven mindset.



-Industry experience in [e.g., BPO, SaaS, Logistics, etc.] is highly preferred.



***Success Metrics (First 12 Months)



- Achieve measurable efficiency improvements (e.g., reduce operational costs or increase productivity by at least 15%).



- Successfully scale operations within a key department or market segment.



- Improve service delivery performance and client satisfaction metrics.



- Maintain or improve employee retention and engagement levels.



- Implement at least one major process improvement or automation initiative.



Reporting Line

Reports directly to the CEO.

 management

title: Video Editor – Short Form (Flexible Schedule)
description:
We’re Hiring Remote AI Video Clip Editors



We’re expanding our content team and looking for reliable Short-Form Video Editors to help process high volumes of short real estate content using AI-powered editing software.



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate company producing daily short-form video across multiple platforms.



This is a remote, flexible, task-based position.



If you’re comfortable working with AI tools and enjoy structured, repeatable workflows, this could be a strong fit.



What You’ll Do



• Use AI editing software to process short-form video clips

• Clean up, trim, and format videos for social platforms

• Apply simple style guidelines and formatting standards (provided)

• Upload and submit completed clips by deadline



No filming

No scripting

No content strategy required

This is execution-focused editing work.



Compensation



Pay is based on finished video length:



• $0.25 USD per finished minute

• 1-minute video = $0.25

• 3-minute video = $0.75

• 4-minute video = $1.00



Most videos are 1–3 minutes long.



• Paid per completed video

• Unlimited earning potential

• Consistent volume available



The more videos you complete accurately and on time, the more you earn.



Schedule



• Fully remote

• 100% flexible schedule

• No fixed hours

• No required shifts



This is output-based work, not hourly.



Ideal Candidate



This role is a strong fit if:



• You’re comfortable using AI tools (or can learn quickly)

• You prefer structured, process-driven tasks

• You’re detail-oriented and follow instructions closely

• You want flexible, independent work

• You’re consistent and dependable

Requirements:



At least 3 years of virtual assistant, administrative, or customer service experience (HVAC experience a plus).



Highly organized with ability to multitask.



Comfortable with scheduling and field-service software.



Excellent written and verbal communication skills. 



BEFORE SENDING YOUR RESUME- Please send a 1-minute voice recording of a pretend call where you're speaking with a customer who has an AC issue. You can play both parts. Here's a quick example:  

Sample Script:  

You:

Hi! This is [Your Name] with Tiger Air — where we earn our stripes daily!

Who do I have the pleasure of speaking with today? 

Customer:

Hi, it’s John. My AC isn’t working. 

You:

I’m sorry to hear that, John. Is it not turning on, or is it blowing warm air?

Has this happened before? 

Customer:

It’s blowing warm air. Happened once last summer too. 

You:

Thanks for the info! I’ll schedule a tech and send over a confirmation.  





Looking forward to hearing your recording!

title: Hvac Estimator

Location: Dallas

Job Overview:

We are seeking a detail-oriented and experienced HVAC Estimator to join our team. The estimator will be responsible for preparing accurate cost estimates for residential and/or commercial HVAC projects, analyzing project plans, and coordinating with project managers and technicians to ensure successful bids and proposals.



Responsibilities:

Develop and submit competitive bids and proposals.

Maintain records of estimates, bids, and completed projects for future reference.



Qualifications:

Minimum 2 years of experience as an HVAC estimator or in a similar HVAC project coordination role.



Strong understanding of HVAC systems, materials, and installation processes.



Proficiency with estimating software (such as FastEST, QuoteSoft, or equivalent) and Microsoft Office.



Excellent math, analytical, and communication skills.



Ability to read and interpret blueprints and technical documents.
