title: Order Management Specialist
description:
TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:


/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagZk1jvydfqYXGy9/form



Applications submitted through onlinejobs.ph will not be reviewed. We look forward to reviewing your application.



TO BE RESPECTFUL OF YOUR TIME, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT MEET THE JOB REQUIREMENTS. We evaluate against these requirements strictly. If you do not have the requisite experience, please do not apply.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for an energetic and detail-oriented individual with extensive experience managing customer order flow to join our growing team. As an Order Management Specialist, you will be responsible for processing customer orders and coordinating fulfillment logistics. The ultimate goal is to ensure that customer orders are processed efficiently, accurately and on-time.



As an Order Management Specialist, you will work as a member of our company’s Operations team. To be successful at the role, the ideal candidate must have strong customer service, communication and interpersonal skills. You will work closely with our internal team and our customers (via
 and phone) to fulfill their orders. You can expect to learn a lot about how our business functions, be professionally challenged and have plenty of opportunities for career development!



We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who will stay and grow at our company! Please apply if you have full-time availability and can commit to a long-term, mutually beneficial role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Bring in customer orders daily from various sources, including customer portals, EDI,
s and faxes

- Respond to incoming
s and phone calls with same-day service

- Confirm purchase order changes and make changes to orders in our ERP system

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions/conversations/issues (through Front and Airtable)

- Release orders/backorders for shipping in a timely fashion

- Organize order releasing for easy picking and communicate with our Warehouse team for shipment alignment

- Create delivery slips and invoice shipped orders

- Upload/enter shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Create, send inventory, shipping and invoicing EDI documents

- Handle payment issues, solve order-related problems and interact with account managers as needed

- Interact with customers and provide them with information on order-related questions (such as inventory availability) and product inquiries

- Understand and ensure departmental KPIs, objectives, and guidelines are followed

- Ensure customer SLAs are followed

- Work on other duties as assigned



WHO YOU ARE

- A Bachelor's Degree

- 1-3 years experience with order management, data entry and customer service

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills; additionally, strong interpersonal skills, particularly in a customer-facing capacity

- EDI experience

- Excellent attention to detail

- Strong organizational skills; self-motivated and proactive

- MS Excel ability

- Excellent English skills

- Ability to work with our US team via
, Slack and Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion

- Positive, kind and easy to work with

- A team player mentality - one team, one dream!

- Positive and kind

- A desire to learn and grow within our organization

- Willingness to learn and adopt new tools

- Reliable and detailed-oriented

- Stable, trustworthy highly dependable. Ideally someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



HOURS

Fixed Schedule, M-F, US Central Time



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents creates designer bedding and home decor. Founded by a husband-wife team in 2005, we remain a family business today. Our customers love our unique designs across a wide range of styles, everyday luxury pricing and commitment to excellent service. We sell on both a wholesale as well as retail basis and are based in Irving, TX.



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?

Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, are a committed professional and a straight shooter, you’ll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

- Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow and develop their careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented and committed as you are

title: Digital Presence & SEO Strategist
description:
About Principal IT Consultants

We are a managed IT and digital presence company serving small and mid-sized businesses across Northern Virginia and the greater DMV. Our team brings 26 years of Fortune 500, DoD, and federal IT experience to SMB clients who deserve enterprise-grade technology and marketing without the enterprise overhead. Our service stack spans managed IT, cybersecurity, website and SEO, reputation management, business listings, POS systems, cloud services, compliance, and fractional CIO services. We move fast, we work smart, and we are building something worth being part of.



About This Role

We are looking for an experienced digital strategist to step into a lead position on our VA team. This is not a task-executor role. You will own our clients' digital presence strategies end to end, set the quality bar, and be directly responsible for the development of our junior specialist. You will work alongside our CEO to translate PITC brand standards and client goals into executable deliverables that produce measurable results.



The right person for this role is someone who does not need to be managed into action. You identify what needs to happen, you communicate proactively, you catch problems before they become client issues, and you hold your work to a high standard without being asked twice.



Core Responsibilities

Team Leadership and Quality Control

• Serve as the direct point of oversight for the Junior SEO & Web Specialist

• Review and approve all junior deliverables before submission to the CEO or client

• Build and maintain SOPs for recurring tasks (content publishing, SEO audits, reporting)

• Identify skill gaps in the junior role and run structured training sessions to close them

• Escalate blockers and risks proactively with proposed solutions, not just problems

SEO Strategy and Execution

• Lead keyword research, competitive gap analysis, and on-page optimization across PITC and client sites

• Conduct and document quarterly SEO audits using SEMrush or equivalent

• Build and maintain local SEO infrastructure: Google Business Profile optimization, citation consistency, schema markup

• Develop and manage content calendars tied to SEO targets for PITC and clients

• Write and publish SEO-optimized blog posts on IT, cybersecurity, and digital marketing topics

• Repurpose long-form content into social posts, GBP updates, and
 snippets

• Track and report on organic performance monthly with clear trend analysis and recommended actions

WordPress and Web Management

• Build, redesign, and maintain WordPress sites (currently hosted on Hostinger using Bold Builder and native WordPress)

• Handle DNS, domain configuration, SSL, and hosting-level tasks in hPanel

• Execute site migrations, theme changes, plugin updates, and performance optimization

• Collaborate with our Junior Web Specialist (Gal) approximately 3 times per week in focused working sessions of about 1 hour each; provide real-time direction, review completed work, and keep deliverables on track

• Serve as Gal's primary point of escalation for technical WordPress questions and quality feedback

• Maintain technical hygiene across all managed sites: uptime, load speed, security plugin health

Social Media and Brand Consistency

• Manage and schedule posts across
, Instagram, and LinkedIn for PITC and select clients

• Maintain brand voice consistency across all channels per PITC content guidelines

• Produce or direct Canva-based graphics and short-form video assets for Reels and Shorts

• Review and approve all social content produced by the junior specialist before publishing

Reporting and Client Operations

• Produce monthly performance reports covering SEO, social, GBP, and web health

• Maintain organized lead and outreach lists in Vendasta or HubSpot as directed

• Participate in weekly check-in calls with the CEO for alignment and prioritization



Qualifications

Required

• 3 or more years of hands-on SEO experience, with demonstrated ability to own strategy from audit to reporting

• Proven WordPress experience: site builds, migrations, plugin management, DNS and hosting configuration

• Proficiency with SEMrush or a comparable platform (Ahrefs, Moz)

• Strong written English with the ability to write professional, technically grounded blog content

• Experience managing social media accounts across multiple brands simultaneously

• Ability to mentor or train a less experienced tea
mber with patience and structure

• Comfortable working independently with minimal oversight; self-managing and deadline-driven

Preferred

• Experience with Hostinger (hPanel), including WordPress management and DNS configuration

• Familiarity with local SEO: Google Business Profile management, citation tools, schema markup

• Experience with HubSpot, Vendasta, or similar CRM and business presence platforms

• Background supporting IT, cybersecurity, or technical service businesses a strong advantage

• Experience producing or directing Canva graphics and short-form video content



What We Offer

• 10-20 hours per week with a flexible schedule, all remote

• Long-term role with growth potential as the company scales

• Direct access to the CEO and a seat at the table on strategy decisions

• A clear lane to grow into a broader digital operations leadership role over time

• Pay: $8.00 to $10.00 USD per hour based on demonstrated experience



How to Apply

Send the following to 



• Your resume

• Portfolio of web, SEO, or social media work (links or attachments accepted)

• Two blog writing samples on technical or business topics

• A brief note (3 to 5 sentences) describing how you approach training a less experienced tea
mber



To confirm you have read this posting in full, include the phrase DigitalLead in the subject line of your application. Applications without this will not be reviewed.

title: Direct Response Video Ad Scriptwriter
description:
We're a performance marketing team looking for a dedicated scriptwriter, not a virtual assistant, who understands why people buy, not just someone who writes grammatically correct English. Our video ads (Meta and YouTube, 30 seconds to 3 minutes) use psychological persuasion frameworks like PAS, FOMO, social proof, urgency, and loss aversion. If those terms mean something to you, keep reading.



What you'll actually do:



Your core job is writing video ad scripts that stop the scroll and drive conversions. This means:

* Writing 2–3 short-form video ad scripts per day using proven direct response frameworks (we'll provide training, templates, and a swipe file of our winning scripts)

* Creating 3–5 hook variations per script — the first 3 seconds determine whether the ad works or fails

* Rewriting and iterating on existing scripts based on performance data (you'll see what's working and why)

* Researching hooks, angles, and competitor ads using Meta Ad Library, TikTok Creative Center, and VidTao, as well as other Social medias.

* As you grow: voicing scripts with AI tools, briefing our video editor in ClickUp, and contributing original creative concepts



What we need from you:

* You understand persuasion psychology, not just writing. You know the difference between features and benefits. You can explain why loss aversion works differently than social proof.

* Strong conversational English writing that sounds like a real person talking to a friend, not a brochure.

* You can write WITHOUT AI generating your scripts. (AI as a brainstorming tool is fine. Copy-pasting ChatGPT output is not. We will test for this.) When you reach out to apply, include the word "hook" in the title of your message so we know you read the full posting.

* Available to work 3 hours/day, 5 days/week (Monday–Friday). Preferred hours: 10 AM–1 PM EST / 10 PM–1 AM Manila time, with flexibility once you're ramped up.

* Familiar with or willing to learn: ChatGPT or other AI tools (as a research aid), ClickUp (task management),
 (daily communication).



Compensation:

* $5–$7/hour to start based on experience

* Performance bonuses when your scripts scale

* Clear path to higher rate and more hours as you prove your ability

* Paid monthly via PayPal



How to apply:

Send me a message here with a brief introduction and I will send you a link to our application form.

The form includes a few questions about your background and a short writing exercise to see how you think and write under real conditions. We just want to see how you approach persuasion and creative problem-solving in your own words.

We review applications on a rolling basis over the course of a week to give more candidates an opportunity to apply. 



About us:

We're a performance marketing team. We value skill and initiative over credentials. If you deliver scripts that convert, you'll be rewarded with raises, bonuses, and more responsibility. We've designed a structured onboarding process with training materials, a script library, and clear frameworks so you can ramp up quickly.

title: Affiliate Marketing Position - Earn 25%-30% Commissions in a Booming Market
description:
We're looking for driven, entrepreneurial individuals to join our affiliate program - previously exclusive to US-based partners, now open to international talent for the first time.

You can earn $1,000–$5,000+/month building your own income stream with established e-commerce brands.

This isn't a typical VA role. You'll be building something for yourself while helping scale real brands. And the best part? We have a server built with all the resources and information needed to succeed. You won’t be doing this alone.



How It Works: 3 Levels:

Level 1: Affiliate (Entry)



No retainer — pure commission

25% commission on all sales you generate

Prove yourself here first. Show us you can move product and you level up.



Level 2: Senior Affiliate (Proven Performers)



$300/month retainer (guaranteed)

30% commission on all sales

You've shown results, now you get stability + higher payouts



Level 3: Affiliate Manager (Manage the entry affiliates)



$800+/month retainer (negotiable based on team size)

30% commission on your own sales

10% override on every sale your team generates

You're leading people, building systems, and scaling the whole operation





What We're Looking For:



Some copywriting or editing experience - you know how to write things that sound human and sell

AI tool experience: Know how to use Veo3, eleven labs, heygen, image generating tools. Of course there will be a course on how to use them specifically for the job.

Fast learner - you pick things up quickly and don't need hand-holding

Entrepreneurial mindset - you see this as building YOUR income, not just "a job"

Reliable and responsive - you move fast, communicate clearly, and don't disappear





Why This Is Different:

Most affiliate programs for non-US talent offer 5% commissions at best. We're offering 25–30?cause we want partners who are actually invested in results.

You'll get full training, brand assets, and support — but we expect you to show up and put in the work. If we don't see effort or progress within 1–2 months, we part ways. Simple.



To Apply:

Send a short message explaining:



Your experience with copywriting or content editing

Why you want to build income through affiliate marketing

How many hours/week you can dedicate to this



Move fast. We're only onboarding a small group.

title: Recruitment Assistant Manager
description:
We’re hiring a Recruitment Assistant Manager to directly support our Recruitment Manager and help oversee the day-to-day operations of our Selection Team.



This is a higher-level recruitment operations role focused on team coordination, performance tracking, reporting, and workflow management. You’ll play a key role in ensuring recruiters and sourcers stay organized, accountable, and aligned with hiring goals.



This position is ideal for someone with recruitment management or team lead experience who is comfortable supporting leadership and driving operational efficiency.



Role Details

• Pay: $1300 USD/month

• Type: Full-time, long-term

• Work Setup: Remote

• Commitment: No other active jobs

• Work Schedule: 9am-5pm MST



What You’ll Do

• Oversee daily operations of the recruitment / selection team

• Support the Recruitment Manager with reports and performance tracking

• Monitor recruiter and sourcer pipelines and activity

• Help manage team workflows, follow-ups, and deadlines

• Maintain and improve recruitment trackers and reporting templates

• Provide feedback and coordination support to recruiters and sourcers

• Ensure hiring processes and SOPs are followed consistently

• Assist with operational improvements to increase hiring efficiency



Requirements

• Experience in recruitment coordination, operations, or management

• Background supporting recruiters or sourcing teams

• Strong reporting skills (Excel / Google Sheets)

• Proficient with Microsoft Excel formulas and functions

• Excellent organization and attention to detail

• Strong written and verbal English communication

• Comfortable working in a leadership / team coordination role

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities

• Experience with Go High Level (preferred) 



**Recruitment management or team lead experience is strongly preferred.



This role is a strong fit if you:

• Have experience supporting or managing recruitment teams

• Enjoy improving structure and workflow efficiency

• Are comfortable tracking performance and reporting metrics

• Want a higher-level, long-term role in recruitment operations



About Us

We are an award-winning, top-performing insurance district in Colorado and a leader across all of Farmers Insurance. Known for consistent growth and elite production, we are proud to be a 13-consecutive-year qualifier for President’s Council—an honor reserved for the top 1% of the organization.



In this role, you’ll work directly with experienced leadership and support a high-performing recruitment team responsible for building one of the top-tier districts in the country. This is a unique opportunity to step into a leadership support role and help drive recruitment operations at a high level.



How to Apply

Please send:

1. A summary of your recruitment operations or management experience

2. Tools you’ve used (ATS, trackers, reporting tools, etc.)

3. Your updated CV

4. Confirmation of full-time availability

title: Virtual Assistant- Operations Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Virtual Assistant – Operations Coordinator to support daily operations in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate has strong experience working as a Virtual Assistant, is comfortable with changing schedules, and has hands-on knowledge of VICIdial and operational reporting. This role requires attention to detail, adaptability, and the ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Responsibilities:



Collaborate with other departments to ensure updates, corrections, and escalations are handled quickly and accurately.

Maintain reliable communication rhythms to keep teams aligned and accountable.

Monitor  lead lists throughout the day via ViciDial

Coordinate team updates using WhatsApp 

Liaise with external ViciDial support for escalations or troubleshooting.

Coordinate and support daily operations and administrative tasks

Manage and monitor VICIdial systems (lists, campaigns, agent activity, reports)

Create, update, and maintain reports using spreadsheets (Google Sheets)

Use formulas to analyze data, track performance, and ensure accuracy

Communicate with team members and management regarding operational needs

Adapt quickly to changing priorities and schedules

Support process improvements and ensure operational efficiency





Qualifications:





3+ years’ experience as a Virtual Assistant, Operations Coordinator, or in appointment setting, call center operations, or similar remote roles.

Background in appointment setting or insurance support is a plus.

Strong familiarity with ViciDial — or with similar dialer systems; with analytical ability to interpret reports, identify trends, and manage lead lists with precision.

Experience with Go High Level (GHL) for calendar and note updates (preferred but not required); experience or knowledge of other CRM tools/platforms can be considered.

Familiarity with US time zones (EST, CST, MST, PST) and international time zones 

Exceptional attention to detail — able to catch and correct errors.

Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage priorities and meet deadlines.

Proactive “A-player”: makes sound decisions with limited input, anticipates needs, and suggests better systems.

Tech-savvy and quick to learn new tools or systems.

Strong familiarity with Google Workspace specially in using Google Spreadsheets and fixing formulas



You’re a Great Fit If You:



? Enjoy taking ownership of daily operations so the founder can focus on scaling.

? Can manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, global team environment.

? Are proactive, detail-oriented, and tech-savvy.

? Believe in supporting team members through encouragement and guidance, not fear-based management.

? Adapt quickly to new systems and can suggest improvements as the company grows.



Time Commitment:

? Full-time position

? 100% Remote work setup







Remote Work Equipment Requirements (Mandatory)



Primary Device (Main Work Computer)



Desktop or Laptop (Windows or macOS)

Processor: Intel i5 / Ryzen 5 (10th gen or higher) or Apple M1/M2

RAM: Minimum 16 GB

Storage: 512 GB SSD

Operating System: Windows 10/11 or macOS (latest stable version)

Display: 14”–24” screen (dual monitor is required)



Backup Device (Required)



Secondary laptop or desktop ready for immediate use

Processor: Intel i3 / Ryzen 3 (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 8 GB

Storage: 256 GB SSD

Must be fully functional and internet-ready



Internet & Connectivity



Primary Internet: Minimum 50 Mbps (fiber preferred)

Must have a backup Internet:

Stable connection suitable for real-time systems



Power Backup



UPS or power station capable of supporting at least 30–60 minutes of work

Reliable electricity with minimal downtime











Work Schedule



Monday to Friday, 10am to 7pm Eastern

title: Full Time Real Estate- Cold Caller Mon- Fri 9am-5pm PST
description:
Location: Remote | Hours: Full-Time | Compensation: Based on experience + performance bonuses



Are you a motivated and tenacious cold caller with a proven ability to generate leads and uncover seller motivation? We’re looking for someone who thrives on the phone, can handle objections with ease, and isn’t afraid to dig deep to get the information we need.



About the Role:

We are a fast-growing real estate investment company seeking a skilled Cold Caller to help us connect with property owners across the U.S. Your job will be to initiate outbound calls, pre-qualify sellers, build rapport, and gather critical property information for our acquisitions team.



Key Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls daily to motivated and non-motivated seller leads

Qualify prospects and identify pain points, motivation, timeline, and condition

Overcome objections and maintain a friendly yet persistent approach

Accurately document all call notes and lead information

Set follow-up appointments and warm transfers for acquisitions

Use dialer software to manage lead flow efficiently



What We’re Looking For:

1+ years of experience in cold calling or sales (real estate experience preferred)

Strong English communication skills (verbal and written)

Spanish-speaking ability is a big plus

Comfortable working full-time in a remote setting

Confident, proactive, and not afraid of rejection

Detail-oriented with strong listening and rapport-building skills



Tools You’ll Use:

Dialer 

CRM system

Scripted call guides (with flexibility for your own style)



What We Offer:

Full-time position with consistent hours

Competitive pay + performance bonuses

Supportive and results-driven team environment

Opportunity for long-term growth and advancement





How To Apply: Send your resume and a short voice recording introducing yourself (in English, and Spanish if applicable) and why you’d be a great fit for this role.

title: LinkedIn Engagement and Community Specialist
description:
Role Overview:



We are seeking a 
munity Manager with a proven track record to lead and enhance our social media presence on LinkedIn. This role is pivotal in driving brand visibility, fostering meaningful engagement, and contributing to business growth. You will work closely with our content and copywriting teams to transform content into engaging LinkedIn posts, strategically incorporating tags, hashtags, and other platform-specific features. If you are looking for a traditional "lead generation" role, this position is not for you.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategic Content Management: Collaborate with our content and copywriting teams to adapt and optimise content for LinkedIn, ensuring posts are engaging and aligned with our strategic goals. This includes selecting appropriate tags, hashtags, and other LinkedIn features to maximise reach and impact.

Engagement and Community Building: Actively engage with new and existing audiences by initiating conversations, tagging relevant individuals and organisations, and fostering meaningful interactions that drive brand awareness and community growth.

Trend Monitoring and Adaptation: Stay ahead of industry trends and LinkedIn platform updates, using insights to recommend new strategies and content formats that keep our brand relevant and engaging.

Performance Analysis: Regularly track and analyse LinkedIn metrics, providing actionable insights and reports to refine our content strategy and optimise engagement.

Collaborative Integration: Work seamlessly with internal teams to ensure LinkedIn initiatives align with broader marketing strategies, contributing to the overall success of our campaigns.

Profile Optimisation: Continuously review and optimise LinkedIn profiles to maximise visibility, reach, and impact across all our LinkedIn activities.

Responsive Communication: Manage inquiries and feedback on LinkedIn promptly and professionally, ensuring our community feels heard and valued.



Key Skills and Competencies:



LinkedIn Expertise: Deep understanding of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices, with at least 2 years of professional experience managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Content Optimisation: Ability to work with content and copywriting teams to turn content into engaging LinkedIn posts, utilising tags, hashtags, and other features to enhance visibility.

Analytical Mindset: Proficient in using LinkedIn metrics and analytics to drive performance improvements and inform content strategies.

Collaborative Spirit: Ability to work effectively with cross-functional teams, integrating LinkedIn efforts with broader marketing and business goals.

Proactive and Trend-Focused: A keen eye for spotting emerging trends on LinkedIn and the initiative to implement them in our strategies.

Strong Communication: Excellent written communication skills, with an emphasis on clarity, creativity, and attention to detail.

Organisational Skills: Capable of managing multiple tasks and projects simultaneously while maintaining a high level of quality and consistency.



Qualifications and Experience:



Professional Experience: Minimum of 2 years managing LinkedIn accounts for businesses or clients.

Educational Background: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field.

Platform Proficiency: In-depth knowledge of LinkedIn’s platform features, tools, and best practices.

Content Optimisation: Experience in adapting and optimising content for LinkedIn to enhance engagement.

Analytical Skills: Demonstrable experience with LinkedIn metrics and analytics for performance tracking and improvement.



Application Requirements: This role demands a full-time commitment and is not compatible with another full-time job. To be considered, kindly fill out the form using this link: 

*Incomplete submission will not be considered*

*Please do not apply if you do not meet the above requirements*



Compensation: Php 30,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)

title: Junior Finance Assistant (Accounting Graduate)
description:
APPLICANTS WHO APPLY THROUGH THE LINK BELOW WILL BE SCREENED

***Only complete submissions will be considered.***



Who we are:

Join our growing team at gigCMO Ltd, a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



Position Overview:

As a Junior Finance Assistant at gigCMO Ltd, you will play a crucial role in ensuring our operations' financial integrity and efficiency. Reporting to the financial controller, you will be responsible for various financial and analytical tasks working closely with your Finance Associate colleague as well as the Controller, CEO and COO.



Key Responsibilities:

Perform project-specific financial analysis.

Verify and analyse the billing process for accuracy and timeliness.

Oversee accounts payable, including invoice and bill payments and other financial transactions.

Respond to financial queries and actively contribute to budget management.

Collaborate with the financial controller to optimise financial operations.

Process payroll efficiently.

Handle general accounting and month-end closing tasks.

Manage accounts payable and receivables.

Produce comprehensive financial reports.

Assist in external audits conducted by our UK accountants for Annual Accounts and Taxation.

Engage with clients professionally.

Audit all documents to ensure contracts and change orders have appropriate approvals, signatures, and accurate billing.

Participate in month and year-end processes.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date Expense sheets.



Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in Accounting.

2+ years of experience in public accounting or related fields.

Experience and Certification in QuickBooks

Excellent communication and organisational skills.

Proficient in Excel, including pivot tables, v-lookup, data extracts, and analysis.

Unsurpassed accuracy and attention to detail.

Ability to work well under pressure and handle multiple concurrent demands.

Initiative to identify, prioritise, and implement necessary elements for the team's responsibilities.

Knowledge of UK VAT Taxation is a plus.



Application Process:

This full-time opportunity demands commitment and dedication. To apply, kindly fill out the application form using this link: 

***Only complete submissions will be considered. Please refrain from applying if you do not meet the specified requirements.***



Join us on this exciting journey of growth and success! We look forward to welcoming talented individuals to our dynamic team at gigCMO Ltd.

title: Podcast Operations Coordinator
description:

Execute comprehensive podcast production workflows using established AI-powered processes and coordination systems. You'll manage all operational aspects of our podcast series from guest sourcing through to publication, following detailed SOPs and coordinating across multiple teams and platforms.



Key Responsibilities:

- Execute established podcast workflows following our existing AI tools and project management systems

- Manage pre-production briefings and interview preparation using AI-generated content

- Coordinate recording sessions, including technical setup and guest liaison

- Oversee post-production handoffs and content distribution across platforms

- Maintain project timelines and quality gates throughout the production cycle

- Coordinate between multiple teams, including but not limited to the content team, creative team, executive assistants, and production team

- Track analytics and maintain content calendars



Essential Requirements:

- Strong project coordination and process management experience

- Excellent organisational skills with attention to detail

- Comfortable using AI tools and following detailed SOPs

- Experience with multiple digital platforms and project management tools

- Strong written communication for guest and stakeholder coordination

- Proactive problem-solving mindset



Preferred Experience:

- Familiarity with CMS platforms and project management tools

- Experience coordinating virtual events or recordings

title: Product Manager - SaaS
description:
gigCMO is a dynamic growth consultancy providing strategic marketing leadership and expertise to start-ups, scale-ups, and SMEs, propelling them toward profitable revenue growth. Nestled in the heart of the City of London, United Kingdom, we specialise in supporting B2B clients in expanding their reach domestically and internationally. Our dedicated team, operating under the banner of Magnacca International, is strategically based in the Philippines. We chose this location for its pool of talent, strong social skills, enthusiasm, and unwavering loyalty.



We are seeking a dedicated and dynamic Product Manager to lead and enhance our Digital Church Platform®. The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing the product development lifecycle, managing development resources effectively, and ensuring rigorous final testing processes before releasing software updates. You will also play a critical role in translating the strategic vision held by the founder into actionable roadmaps and product deliverables.



Key Responsibilities:



- Manage the Product Development (PD) pipeline, ensuring alignment with organisational goals.

- Prioritise and allocate development resources efficiently to align with strategic priorities.

- Conduct comprehensive final testing and quality assurance to guarantee smooth, error-free software updates before public release.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and stakeholders to deliver product enhancements that meet user needs and drive platform adoption.

- Communicate clearly and proactively with stakeholders regarding project timelines, milestones, and release schedules.

- Translate strategic vision and high-level ideas from leadership into actionable product roadmaps, user stories, and specifications. 

- Facilitate clear and consistent communication between non-technical stakeholders and technical teams, ensuring all parties are aligned.

- Set up and manage internal systems (e.g. Basecamp and HubSpot) to track backlog, sprints, and milestones.

- Gather feedback from churches and users to shape future features and improvements. 

- Monitor product performance or user feedback loops to inform decisions and prioritisation. 

- Monitor incoming requests via helpdesk and chat channels, triage issues, and ensure timely resolution either directly or by coordinating with the development team.



Qualifications:



- Proven experience in Product Management, ideally within digital platforms or SaaS environments.

- Strong organisational skills with an ability to manage multiple development priorities simultaneously.

- Exceptional attention to detail, particularly in software testing and quality assurance.

- Demonstrable capability in managing software product lifecycles effectively.

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, able to engage stakeholders at various levels.

- Previous experience in digital community platforms or faith-based digital services is advantageous but not essential.

- Experience writing product requirements, specs, and user stories to support development.

- Understanding of user needs in faith-based or nonprofit contexts, particularly around compliance, admin, or community tools, is highly desirable. 

- A mindset geared toward scalability, continuous improvement, and hands-on problem solving in an early-stage SaaS environment.



Application Requirements:



- This role demands a full-time commitment and is not compatible with another full-time job. To be considered, kindly fill out the form using this link: 

- Incomplete submissions will not be considered.



Compensation: Php 30,000 - 40,000 (depending on whether the applicant meets 100% of the requirements)
